name: Billie Eilish - Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D)
description: This immersive 3D concert film captures a sold-out world tour from one of the biggest pop artists of her generation. It aims to bring the energy, scale, and live atmosphere of the show to the screen.

name: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
description: A charming thief brings together a mismatched group of adventurers for a daring quest to recover a lost relic. Their plan quickly spins into danger as magic, monsters, and rival forces turn the mission into a chaotic fantasy adventure.

name: The Bus: A French Football Mutiny
description: This documentary revisits a controversial 2010 World Cup and the bus strike that erupted into global headlines. It explores the resulting national outrage and the political fallout surrounding the team and its leadership.

name: Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets of Dumbledore
description: A dark wizard plans to seize control of the wizarding world, and a well-meaning magizoologist must lead a determined team to stop him. Along the way, they encounter a mix of familiar and brand-new beasts as the danger escalates with the wizard’s growing followers.

name: Fast X
description: A tight-knit crew that’s beaten impossible odds faces its most dangerous enemy yet: a vengeful force from the past determined to tear their lives apart. As the threat closes in, they’re pushed into nonstop chases, fights, and globe-spanning chaos to protect what matters most.

name: F9
description: Dominic and his crew clash with a highly skilled assassin and an elite driver they’ve never faced before: Dominic’s estranged brother. Their search for a dangerous device quickly escalates into nonstop, absurd action as the team is pulled into escalating trouble.

name: In the Heights
description: In Washington Heights, a bodega owner feels pulled between keeping ties to a close-knit neighborhood and chasing a long-held dream in the Dominican Republic. Around him, music, family, romance, and community hopes shape a lively story about home and ambition.

name: Jurassic World: Dominion
description: Dinosaurs now roam beyond their former island home, forcing humanity to face a world where ancient predators are part of everyday life. As this uneasy balance spreads across the planet, people must confront whether they can truly coexist with creatures that challenge their place at the top.

name: Minions: The Rise of Gru
description: A devoted wannabe villain sets out to become evil enough to join a notorious supervillain group, aided by his chaotic followers. Racing against trouble and rival villains, he searches for a powerful gem as escalating mayhem unfolds.

name: Red Notice
description: An Interpol-issued Red Notice launches a worldwide hunt for the world’s most wanted. When a high-stakes heist throws together an FBI profiler and two rival criminals, the mission turns into a globe-trotting scramble filled with danger and uncertainty.

name: Ron's Gone Wrong
description: In a future where walking, talking, digitally connected bots are kids’ everyday best friends, an 11-year-old discovers his robot buddy doesn’t fit in like the others. As his robot malfunctions and behaves differently, the two are forced to figure out what friendship really means.

name: Sing 2
description: Buster Moon and a new troupe chase their dream of debuting a glamorous show at the Crystal Tower Theater in Redshore City. With help from a risky plan and a bold pitch to bring a reclusive rock lion back to the stage, Buster sets out to convince the isolated legend to return.

name: Avatar: The Way of Water
description: More than a decade after the first film, the story follows a family trying to stay safe as danger closes in. As they endure battles for survival and mourn what they lose, they search for ways to protect each other, even when the world around them refuses to calm down.

name: The Croods: A New Age
description: Searching for a safer place to live, the prehistoric Crood family finds a bright, walled-in paradise with everything they need—until they also have to share it with the Bettermans, who live by different rules. As neighbor tensions build, an outside danger pushes both families into an adventure that tests teamwork and survival.

name: The Hunt
description: Twelve strangers wake up in a remote clearing with no idea where they are or why they’ve been gathered. In the shadow of a dark internet conspiracy, ruthless elites assemble to hunt humans for sport, until the hunted starts turning the tables on her pursuers.

name: Bad Boys for Life
description: Marcus and Mike reunite as Miami cops, now pulled into a newly formed elite team to stop a ruthless drug-cartel leader. Their mission forces them to juggle escalating danger, career changes, and personal midlife crises while the threat closes in.

name: The New Mutants
description: Five young mutants are held in a secret facility while they struggle to understand dangerous new abilities. As fears and painful memories close in, they must confront what haunts them and find a way to protect themselves.

name: The Woman in the Window
description: An agoraphobic woman living alone in New York starts watching her new neighbors from inside her home, believing something is happening next door. Her quiet routine turns into a tense mystery after she witnesses a disturbing act of violence.

name: Barbie
description: In the bright, seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land, Barbie and Ken are living their best life until a trip to the real world shakes up everything they thought they knew. What follows is a fish-out-of-water journey that blends humor with the joys and perils of dealing with humans.

name: Top Gun: Maverick
description: A veteran Navy pilot avoids being grounded and is pulled back into the elite training program to prepare a new group of aviators for a high-risk, one-of-a-kind mission. As the pressure builds, he must prove he can still lead from the cockpit while facing the weight of past choices and new responsibilities.

name: Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny
description: Near retirement and feeling out of place in a changing world, an aging adventurer is pulled back into danger when an old enemy resurfaces. The chase centers on a powerful ancient artifact that must be kept from those who would use it for sinister purposes.

name: Raya and the Last Dragon
description: In a once-united fantasy world, an ancient threat returns after centuries of peace, leaving divided lands in danger. A lone warrior sets out to find a legendary dragon, hoping to restore harmony and bring people back together.

name: The Flash
description: A young hero tries to change a painful family moment, but his choice sends him into a different reality with the world in danger and few allies available. To set things right, he must confront the risks of time travel, personal loss, and heroic responsibility.

name: Vivo
description: A music-loving kinkajou sets off on a heartfelt journey to fulfill his destiny and deliver a love song to an old friend. Along the way, he faces obstacles and keeps the music at the center of everything as he tries to make it happen.

name: Wicked
description: In Oz, a misunderstood green-skinned student is forced to room with a popular classmate at a magical university. Their unlikely bond grows as they navigate prejudice, ambition, and growing tensions in a world where reputation and power can reshape how people are seen.

name: Wish Dragon
description: A determined teenager hopes to reconnect with a childhood friend, but an unexpected meeting with a wish-granting dragon opens up a world of magical possibilities. Along the way, the story explores friendship, promises, wealth, and what success can really mean.

name: Wonder Woman 1984
description: After a botched store robbery, Wonder Woman is pulled into a worldwide battle against a powerful ancient force. The threat puts her abilities at risk as a wish-driven chain of events spreads, while a shady businessman and a shy outcast get entangled in the chaos.

name: Words on Bathroom Walls
description: After a mental health diagnosis during high school, a witty, introspective teen tries to keep it hidden while navigating the pressures of everyday life. As romance begins to grow with a brilliant classmate, he’s pushed toward opening up and not letting his condition define him.

name: Ava
description: A black ops assassin’s job goes wrong, forcing her into a desperate fight to stay alive. As she struggles to survive, the danger spills into her personal life and puts her family and loyalties under pressure.

name: The French Dispatch
description: As an American magazine bureau in France prepares its final issue, the staff revisits a set of vivid feature stories. The collection moves from an imprisoned artist and a burst of student unrest to an offbeat kidnapping case, all tied together by a love of writing, art, and eccentric local life.

name: Eternals
description: An ancient team of immortal beings has lived in secret on Earth for thousands of years. After a sudden tragedy brings them back together, they must reunite to face a deadly threat tied to their oldest mission and decide how far they are willing to go to protect humanity.

name: Black Panther: Wakanda Forever
description: After a devastating loss, Wakanda faces pressure from outside powers while its leaders try to protect the nation and chart a future. As tensions rise, old alliances are tested and new help arrives from unexpected places, pushing the kingdom toward a difficult new chapter.

name: Deadpool & Wolverine
description: A listless mercenary tries to live a civilian life, but an existential threat to his homeworld forces him to team up again with a reluctant ally. Pulled into escalating multiverse trouble, they must suit up and face danger together as the stakes rise fast.

name: Birds of Prey and the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn
description: After a chaotic breakup leaves a reckless antihero without protection, old enemies start closing in. When a stolen diamond puts a young girl in danger, several women with very different skills are pulled into a wild fight against a ruthless crime lord.

name: The Boy and the Heron
description: During World War II, a grieving teenager moves from Tokyo to the countryside to live with his father and new stepmother. As he struggles with loss and change, a strange gray heron draws him toward a mysterious world that feels both magical and unsettling.

name: Dune
description: Paul Atreides travels to a dangerous desert world to protect his family and people, caught in a struggle driven by a priceless resource. As hostile forces collide over the planet, Paul must confront fear and uncover what his destiny may demand.

name: The Trial of the Chicago 7
description: A peaceful protest spirals into a violent confrontation with police, leading to a high-profile courtroom battle that tests ideas of justice, power, and dissent. The film follows the fallout as competing accounts and political tensions collide under intense public scrutiny.

name: All the Bright Places
description: Two teens dealing with deep personal struggles form a bond and set out on a cathartic journey through Indiana. Along the way, their connection brings moments of wonder and hope amid heavy themes like depression and loss.

name: Nosferatu
description: A haunted young woman becomes the focus of a vampire's growing obsession, setting off dread, illness, and fear that spread through her world. This retelling leans into dark romance and gothic horror as loved ones try to understand the evil closing in.

name: Rebecca
description: A young woman enters a whirlwind marriage with a wealthy widower and moves to his grand family estate, where the memory of his late wife casts a long shadow. Surrounded by tension, secrets, and an unsettling household, she struggles to find her place in a home that feels far from welcoming.

name: The King's Man
description: When history’s most notorious tyrants and criminal masterminds assemble for a catastrophic plan, one determined man races to stop it before a war can spiral out of control. Set against the chaos building toward World War I, his efforts push him to act fast as powerful influences tighten their grip.

name: The Empty Man
description: Following the search for a missing girl, an ex-cop uncovers a secretive cult tied to an unsettling supernatural presence. As the investigation deepens, the story shifts into a grim mystery filled with dread, strange beliefs, and escalating danger.

name: The Devil All the Time
description: In a bleak rural community, troubled lives collide as violence, faith, and corruption shape a young person’s struggle to protect family from surrounding darkness. The story unfolds across years, linking several grim paths in a tense, heavy small-town drama.

name: Black Widow
description: Natasha Romanoff, known as Black Widow, faces a dangerous conspiracy tied to her past while being relentlessly pursued. As she tries to navigate the fallout from years of espionage, she must confront old wounds and complicated relationships long before her time with the Avengers.

name: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
description: The original illusion team reunites with a new generation of performers to take on a wealthy diamond heiress who runs a criminal empire. As their biggest operation yet gets underway, the old and new magicians must set aside differences to work together—while competing forces also try to seize the prize.

name: Eurovision Song Contest: The Story of Fire Saga
description: Two small-town singers chase their pop star dreams when they get the chance to compete at a global music contest. As high stakes, rival scheming, and onstage mishaps strain their bond, their journey turns into a fight to stay together and make their mark.

name: Black Adam
description: After thousands of years sealed away, an ancient superpowered figure is released into the modern world and brings a harsh idea of justice with him. His return sparks clashes with other powerful figures as a threatened city looks for hope.

name: Extraction
description: A battle-worn mercenary is hired to rescue a kidnapped boy in Bangladesh, but the job quickly turns into a desperate fight through a hostile city. As the danger grows, the mission becomes about survival as much as escape.

name: Maestro
description: Maestro is a sweeping, emotionally driven love story that traces the lifelong relationship between Leonard Bernstein and his wife, showing devotion, family life, and tension that builds over time. Set against Bernstein’s world of life and art, it captures love’s endurance through both joy and strain.

name: The Good Nurse
description: Suspicious that her colleague may be behind a string of mysterious patient deaths, a nurse puts herself at risk to uncover the truth. As authorities get involved, her urgent search pushes the situation into a tense investigation with unsettling implications for the hospital.

name: Zola
description: A waitress agrees to join an exotic dancer, her put-upon boyfriend, and a mysterious roommate on a road trip to Florida in pursuit of quick money at a high-end strip club. Their plan turns into a wild, dangerous journey with escalating chaos.

name: The Courier
description: During the Cold War, an ordinary businessman is drawn into a dangerous intelligence mission involving a Soviet contact and the escalating Cuban Missile Crisis. As pressure builds, he must navigate trust, secrecy, and personal risk in a tense true-story thriller.

name: The Willoughbys
description: When four siblings are left to fend for themselves, they must adapt their old-fashioned habits to a modern world that barely knows what to make of them. Along the way, they search for a way to build the kind of family life they have always wanted.

name: Killers of the Flower Moon
description: In 1920s Oklahoma, oil wealth brings danger to the Osage Nation as members of the community are targeted in a series of killings. This sweeping historical crime drama follows greed, racism, and a growing investigation into a devastating true story.

name: Cruella
description: Set in 1970s London during the punk rock revolution, a young designer-in-the-making teams up with two streetwise friends and builds a life full of mischief. When a fashion legend takes notice, their choices set off a chain of revelations that push her toward a wicked, revenge-bent persona as her style takes center stage.

name: The Lodge
description: A father abruptly leaves his children at their holiday home with his new girlfriend as a blizzard traps them inside a remote lodge. As frightening events unfold, the isolation and the girlfriend’s unsettling past start to resurface, summoning disturbing forces.

name: West Side Story
description: In 1950s New York, two young people from rival street groups fall for each other as hostility rises around them. Their romance offers a brief sense of hope, but growing pressure from friends, family, and prejudice pushes everyone toward heartbreak.

name: Happiest Season
description: A young woman plans a romantic proposal at her girlfriend’s family’s annual holiday gathering, only to learn her partner isn’t ready to be open with her conservative parents. As the visit unfolds, the couple faces awkward expectations and mounting pressure while trying to keep the night on track.

name: Guillermo del Toro's Pinocchio
description: In 1930s Italy as fascism rises, a father’s cherished wooden creation comes to life and must face the heavy weight of expectations. Alongside troubling times and shifting loyalties, this magical tale explores what it means to be human and how love, identity, and self-acceptance shape the journey.

name: Pinocchio
description: A wooden puppet embarks on a thrilling adventure to become a real boy.

name: Being the Ricardos
description: Lucille Ball and Desi Arnaz hit a rough stretch that threatens both their careers and their marriage. Set amid the pressures of a busy TV production week, the story shows how tensions on and off the set collide as bigger controversies loom.

name: Wolfwalkers
description: In a world shaped by superstition and magic, a young apprentice hunter arrives in Ireland to help eliminate the last wolves. A surprising friendship with a wild local girl opens the door to ancient folklore, challenging old fears about nature and belonging.

name: Guns Akimbo
description: An ordinary guy is suddenly forced into a gladiator-like fight broadcast on a dark website, where survival depends on taking down a much more experienced, heavily armed opponent. Driven by the need to rescue his kidnapped ex-girlfriend, he battles while trying to stay alive in escalating violence.

name: I'm Thinking of Ending Things
description: A woman with growing doubts joins her new boyfriend on a road trip to a remote farm to meet his parents. As they travel and settle in, nothing feels fully straightforward, and the visit begins to blur expectations with unsettling ambiguity.

name: A Quiet Place Part II
description: After a devastating ordeal at home, a surviving family must leave their fragile shelter and step into a dangerous wider world. As they search for safety, they face sound-hunting creatures and discover that other survivors can be just as frightening.

name: Fantasy Island
description: A group of contest winners arrives at a remote island resort to live out their biggest dreams. But the fantasies quickly twist into dangerous, nightmare situations, forcing the guests to confront unexpected consequences and figure out what the island really wants from them.

name: The First Omen
description: A young American woman arrives in Rome to begin a life of service to the church, but unsettling events shake her faith. As she investigates strange goings-on, she uncovers a disturbing conspiracy tied to the birth of evil.

name: Everything Everywhere All at Once
description: An overwhelmed immigrant mother is pulled into a wild multiverse adventure while trying to keep her family and struggling business together. As strange realities collide, she must face emotional distance, mounting pressure, and a dangerous force that threatens everything she cares about.

name: Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon a Time
description: After a devastating event leaves Earth in ruins, three survivors live in a rare pocket of humanity where life looks very different than before. But a new, looming catastrophe threatens to bring everything to its final conclusion.

name: Without Remorse
description: An elite Navy SEAL searches for justice after his pregnant wife is murdered, then finds himself uncovering an international conspiracy. As he digs deeper, the mission turns into a tense fight against powerful forces tied to the crime.

name: The Little Mermaid
description: A curious young mermaid dreams of exploring life beyond the ocean, even though contact with humans is forbidden. After a chance encounter on the surface, she makes a risky bargain with a sea witch that offers a new world on land but threatens everything she loves.

name: Roald Dahl's The Witches
description: In late 1967, a young boy is sent to live with his loving grandmother in rural Alabama. When they cross paths with dangerous witches, they flee to a seaside resort—only to arrive as the Grand High Witch convenes her followers.

name: The Many Saints of Newark
description: In Newark’s turbulent 1960s and 70s, a young man comes of age while local gang tensions grow and the old order starts to crack. Guided by an admired family figure, he is drawn deeper into a world of crime, loyalty, and shifting power that will shape the person he becomes.

name: The Dry
description: A police officer returns to his drought-stricken hometown for a funeral, reopening a decades-old wound tied to the unsolved death of a teenage girl. As he digs for answers, the case grows more complicated and turns the return into a tense investigation.

name: Soul
description: A jazz-loving teacher finally gets a big break, but an unexpected accident sends him into a strange place where souls discover what makes them tick before heading to Earth. To find his way back, he teams up with a stubborn soul-in-training and starts rethinking what it really means to live fully.

name: Space Jam: A New Legacy
description: A basketball superstar and his son get pulled into a digital world controlled by a rogue artificial intelligence. To escape, he teams up with a chaotic cartoon crew and must win a wild, high-stakes game against powerful virtual opponents.

name: Onward
description: In a suburban fantasy world where magic feels scarce, two teenage elf brothers set off on an extraordinary quest to see if there’s still a little magic left. Their journey becomes a road trip of peril, humor, and growing closeness as they search for what they need most.

name: Antlers
description: In a small Oregon town, a teacher and her brother, the local sheriff, uncover unsettling signs that a young student is hiding a dangerous secret. As they dig deeper, the situation escalates into frightening consequences for everyone around them.

name: Ammonite
description: In 1840s England, a palaeontologist and a young woman sent to recover by the sea develop an intense connection. Despite differences in class and temperament, they come to feel less alone and begin a passionate, life-altering love affair that challenges social expectations.

name: Snake Eyes
description: A tough loner earns a place in an ancient Japanese clan after saving the life of its future leader, and begins intense training in the ways of the ninja. As old ties and buried secrets resurface, loyalty and honor are put under pressure, forcing difficult choices that could cost hard-won trust.

name: Blonde
description: A fictionalized portrait of Marilyn Monroe traces a troubled path from a difficult childhood to fame and tangled relationships. Told in a stylized, often unsettling way, it explores the gap between her public image and private pain while blurring the line between fact and imagination.

name: Beverly Hills Cop: Axel F
description: Decades after a landmark case in Beverly Hills, a rule-bending Detroit detective returns to the city to tackle a new crime and stir up trouble along the way. The movie mixes action, comedy, old connections, and a fresh family-driven conflict.

name: The Secret: Dare to Dream
description: A young widow raising three children hires a handyman to help fix her home during a major storm. As he works alongside the family, he shares an uplifting belief that positive thinking and trust in life can open the door to hope and new possibilities.

name: Oxygen
description: A woman wakes up trapped inside a sealed cryogenic chamber with no memory of how she got there. With an onboard AI and a rapidly shrinking air supply, she must piece together clues, manage rising panic, and find a way to escape before time runs out.

name: The Batman
description: In his second year fighting crime, Batman digs into corruption across Gotham City as a serial killer leaves clues that point toward unsettling connections to his own family. The investigation forces him to dig deeper while trying to keep up with a growing web of threats tied to the Riddler.

name: Free Guy
description: A bank teller learns he’s not living a normal life, but a background role inside an open-world video game. Determined to change that, he sets out to become the hero of his own story and save his world before it’s too late.

name: Moonfall
description: When a mysterious force pushes the moon out of orbit, Earth faces a growing global disaster. A small group races to understand what is happening and find a way to stop the collision before life as we know it is destroyed.

name: Monster Hunter
description: A portal pulls a military team into a strange world ruled by dangerous monsters. Stranded and outmatched, they must survive relentless attacks while joining forces with a mysterious hunter who may know the way back home.

name: Gladiator II
description: Years after a famous hero’s death, a conquered Rome forces a young man into the Colosseum when tyrannical rulers take control. Pushing back with rage and a sense of honor, he looks to what shaped him to help restore glory to Rome and its people.

name: Malignant
description: A woman is haunted by vivid visions of brutal murders, only to realize they may be connected to real events. As the danger grows, she is pulled into a disturbing mystery tied to her past.

name: Sound of Metal
description: A heavy-metal drummer begins to lose his hearing and fears his life and career are slipping away. After being sent to a deaf community for support, he has to face a painful new reality and decide what kind of future he wants.

name: tick, tick... BOOM!
description: On the brink of turning 30, a theater composer tries to balance love, friendship, and big creative pressure as a ticking clock closes in. The story follows the drive to create something great before time runs out.

name: Ferrari
description: Set during the summer of 1957, an ex-racecar driver and his wife face a crisis as bankruptcy threatens the company they built from nothing. Their tempestuous marriage is strained by family grief and difficult personal acknowledgement, all while he weighs high-stakes plans involving the team and a famous endurance race.

name: The Invisible Man
description: After an abusive relationship ends and a fortune is left behind, a woman suspects the death was faked and begins receiving signs that someone is hunting her unseen. As coincidences pile up and escalate into danger, she fights to prove she’s not imagining it—while others doubt her.

name: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
description: A young Brooklyn hero is pulled into a sprawling Multiverse after reconnecting with a friend from another world. There, he meets a vast society of web-slinging protectors, but a growing threat and clashing ideas about heroism force him to make difficult choices on his own.

name: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
description: Mario and Luigi, Brooklyn plumbers working underground, are suddenly transported through a mysterious pipe into a magical new world. Separated from one another, Mario sets off on an epic quest to find Luigi while navigating strange places and dangerous foes.

name: Despicable Me 4
description: Gru, Lucy, and their daughters welcome a new baby to the family, but trouble follows when a new enemy and an escaped villain force them to flee. The household gets pulled into fresh schemes and sudden danger as they try to stay one step ahead and keep everyone safe.

name: Hellraiser
description: A young woman struggling with addiction gets an ancient puzzle box and accidentally reconfigures it to summon the Cenobites, terrifying supernatural beings from another dimension. What begins as a desperate choice turns into a nightmare of temptation, survival, and escalating horror with the Cenobites pressuring her and the people around her.

name: The Outpost
description: A small unit of U.S. soldiers, alone at the remote Combat Outpost Keating, located deep in the valley of three mountains in Afghanistan, battles to defend against an overwhelming force of Taliban fighters in a coordinated attack. The Battle of Kamdesh, as it was known, was the bloodiest American engagement of the Afghan War in 2009 and Bravo Troop 3-61 CAV became one of the most decorated units of the 19-year conflict.

name: Escape from Pretoria
description: In late-1970s South Africa, two anti-apartheid activists are jailed by the regime and forced to endure harsh prison life. Refusing to give in, they begin a meticulous plan to break out, turning everyday routines into a tense fight for freedom.

name: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
description: After a respected former police captain is accused of corruption, two veteran detectives set out to prove he was framed. Their search for the truth quickly turns dangerous when they become targets themselves and must stay ahead of both criminals and the law.

name: Annette
description: In present-day Los Angeles, a controversial stand-up comedian and a world-famous opera singer present a polished public romance while their lives shift after they welcome a baby with a rare, life-altering gift. Their carefully crafted image starts to strain as the child’s extraordinary abilities bring major consequences for everyone around them.

name: Wonka
description: Willy Wonka arrives with a big dream to change the world through chocolate, only to find his path blocked by powerful forces and unfair deals. With the help of unlikely allies, he faces trouble, plots his way forward, and works toward making his creations possible.

name: M3GAN
description: After a family tragedy, a busy toy designer turns to an advanced AI companion doll to help a grieving child feel less alone. The bond starts as a comfort, but the doll’s protective instincts begin pushing things into unnerving territory.

name: Gunpowder Milkshake
description: An assassin with a deadly reputation reunites with a young girl’s family to keep her safe. Together with dangerous allies, they target a ruthless crime syndicate and its large force of henchmen.

name: Love at First Sight
description: Hadley and Oliver start falling for each other on a flight from New York to London, but their connection is tested when they get separated at customs. With odds stacked against them, they must decide whether to fight for a reunion.

name: Bloodshot
description: After a marine and his wife are murdered, he is brought back to life by a team of scientists using nanotechnology. Enhanced with rapid healing and superhuman strength, he initially trains and struggles with missing memories, then breaks out to chase revenge—only to uncover a wider conspiracy.

name: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
description: A single mom and her two kids move to a small Oklahoma town and start uncovering a strange family connection to the original Ghostbusters. As they learn more about the legacy left behind by their grandfather, they are pulled into a mystery filled with unusual happenings, humor, and a few familiar faces.

name: Candyman
description: A Chicago artist becomes obsessed with the macabre legend behind Candyman as he digs into its unsettling history. As his grip on reality slips, the story turns violent, drawing a terrifying wave of harm from the myth and the community around it.

name: Palmer
description: After years in prison, a former local sports star returns to his small hometown hoping to rebuild his life. An unexpected bond with a bullied child from a troubled home gives both of them a chance at healing, acceptance, and a new sense of family.

name: The Old Guard
description: A small team of warriors who can heal from fatal injuries has quietly fought to protect humanity for centuries. When their existence is exposed and a new immortal appears, they’re hunted by people who want to exploit their abilities, forcing the group to fight for survival and purpose.

name: Color Out of Space
description: The Gardner family escapes modern life for a remote farm in rural New England, until a meteorite crash introduces a strange, otherworldly colour. As it spreads, it mutates the land and everything it touches, turning ordinary days into escalating danger and terrifying changes for the family.

name: Mortal Kombat
description: A struggling fighter is pulled into an ancient battle between realms after learning he has a hidden connection to a larger destiny. Hunted by a deadly enemy, he joins other champions to train for a brutal fight with the fate of the universe at stake.

name: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
description: Doctor Strange teams up with mystical allies to navigate dangerous alternate realities across the Multiverse. Together, they face a mysterious new adversary as the journey escalates into mind-bending chaos.

name: Those Who Wish Me Dead
description: A young boy is pursued by two assassins in the Montana wilderness as a survival expert and firefighter races to protect him. A fast-spreading forest fire becomes another dangerous obstacle in their fight to stay ahead and reach safety.

name: Army of the Dead
description: After a zombie outbreak turns Las Vegas into a sealed-off danger zone, a team of hired fighters agrees to one last job: break in, grab a fortune, and get out fast. With the city crawling with the undead and a plan that can fall apart at any moment, the mission becomes a high-stakes gamble.

name: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
description: Black Manta returns seeking revenge, powered by the Black Trident. To protect Atlantis, Aquaman forges an alliance with his imprisoned brother and must defend the kingdom from a growing threat.

name: DC League of Super-Pets
description: When the Justice League is kidnapped, Krypto the Super-Dog teams up with a mixed-up shelter pack to learn and use their newfound powers. Together, they work to rescue the superheroes and prove they can be heroes too.

name: Hypnotic
description: A detective investigates bizarre crimes that warp perception, while searching for his missing daughter. As he uncovers a secret government program, he’s pulled into a reality-bending mystery with dangerous people behind the scenes.

name: Last Night in Soho
description: A fashion-obsessed young woman moves to London and finds herself mysteriously drawn into the glamour of the 1960s. What begins as a dazzling escape into music, style, and nightlife grows darker as the past starts to blur with the present.

name: Marighella
description: Set in the aftermath of a 1964 coup, an Afro-Brazilian poet and politician becomes driven to resist the erosion of civil and human rights under a brutal, racist dictatorship. Leaving his wife and son behind, he takes up arms and grows into a notorious enemy of the ruling power structure.

name: News of the World
description: In post-Civil-War Texas, a wandering traveler reads news from newspapers to townspeople and helps keep their communities informed. When he encounters a young girl who has been kidnapped, he agrees to guide her toward safety, facing harsh conditions and mounting danger across the West.

name: Spenser Confidential
description: A former Boston patrolman, freshly released from prison, teams up with an aspiring fighter to dig into the death of two police officers. Their investigation pulls them into a wider truth they need to unravel together.

name: Infinite
description: A troubled man is haunted by memories and abilities he cannot explain, leaving him unsure whether he is losing his grip on reality. When a hidden group claims those visions are real, he is pulled into a fast-moving conflict tied to lives beyond his own.

name: Nomadland
description: After losing everything in the Great Recession, a woman in her sixties sets out to travel through the western United States, living as a modern-day nomad in her van. Moving from place to place, she encounters a community that shares this off-grid way of life.

name: The Wrong Missy
description: A guy meets the woman of his dreams and invites her to his company’s corporate retreat, only to realize he sent the invitation to the wrong person. What follows is a chaotic mix of mismatched expectations and escalating awkwardness.

name: Da 5 Bloods
description: Four African-American Vietnam veterans return to Vietnam to search for the remains of their fallen squad leader and to recover gold they buried. Their journey brings them face-to-face with both nature and the deep, lasting damage left behind by the war.

name: Enola Holmes
description: A spirited teenage sleuth sets out to find a missing parent while trying to stay ahead of her famous older brothers. Along the way, she becomes drawn into another young runaway’s troubles, mixing clues, danger, and self-discovery.

name: The King of Staten Island
description: A directionless man in his mid-20s is still living at home, avoiding responsibility and nursing old grief after losing his firefighter father as a child. When his mother begins a new relationship, he is pushed to face his pain and consider a more grown-up future.

name: Apollo 10½: A Space Age Childhood
description: In 1969 Houston, a man recounts his life as a 10-year-old boy, blending childhood nostalgia with a fanciful take on an imagined journey connected to the moon. It’s told through lively memories and everyday moments that build toward the feeling of wonder around a historic event.

name: Hotel Transylvania 4: Transformania
description: A mysterious invention from Van Helsing malfunctions and turns Drac and his monster friends into humans, while Johnny ends up transformed into a monster. Now in mismatched bodies, they must race across the globe to find a cure before time runs out—and before they lose their minds trying.

name: After Yang
description: In a near-future world, a family’s beloved android companion suddenly malfunctions, sending the parent on a search for repairs. As the process uncovers unexpected traces of the android’s inner life, the family is pushed to reflect on memory, connection, and the quiet distance that has grown between them.

name: Luck
description: Suddenly swept into the never-before-seen Land of Luck, the unluckiest person in the world has to team up with magical creatures to improve her luck. With good fortune and misfortune both at stake, she must find a way to restore balance.

name: Don't Breathe 2
description: A blind veteran has been living quietly in an isolated cabin, raising a young girl he took in after a tragic fire. When criminals kidnap her, he leaves his safe haven and uses every skill he has to bring her home.

name: Swallow
description: A newly pregnant housewife becomes increasingly compelled to consume dangerous objects as her husband and his family tighten their control over her life. Driven by a growing obsession, she faces the troubling truth behind what’s pushing her to swallow and reclaim control.

name: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning Part One
description: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team race across the globe to find a powerful new weapon before it reaches the wrong hands. With humanity’s fate at stake and shadows from Ethan’s past closing in, they face a mysterious, all-powerful enemy as the hunt turns into a deadly showdown.

name: Final Destination: Bloodlines
description: Plagued by a violent recurring nightmare, a college student heads back home to find the one person who may be able to stop a cycle of deadly events threatening her family. As she digs for answers, she becomes convinced the danger is tied to something from the past that won’t stay buried.

name: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings
description: Shang-Chi is pulled back into the mysterious Ten Rings organization when he’s confronted by the past he thought he left behind. As he gets drawn deeper into their web, he faces dangerous choices tied to family and what he believes is right.

name: Triangle of Sadness
description: A glamorous model couple joins a luxury cruise filled with extremely wealthy guests and a volatile captain. What starts as a picture-perfect getaway turns into a chaotic test of status, privilege, and survival when comfort and hierarchy begin to collapse.

name: Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard
description: A disgraced bodyguard is pulled back into danger when a hitman’s unpredictable wife drags him into a chaotic rescue and a larger international threat. Together, the mismatched trio stumble through bullets, chases, and bickering while trying to stop a powerful villain’s plan in Europe.

name: Love and Monsters
description: Seven years after the Monsterpocalypse begins, a survivor lives underground to stay safe. When a long-distance radio connection sparks hope, he risks venturing outside to reunite with his past love—crossing a world full of dangerous creatures.

name: Are You There God? It's Me, Margaret.
description: After a move from New York City to New Jersey, an 11-year-old girl faces new friendships and big changes as adolescence begins. Balancing school life, feelings about growing up, and questions about faith, she tries to find where she belongs in her new world.

name: No Time to Die
description: Bond leaves active service and tries to enjoy a quiet life in Jamaica, but a CIA ally brings him back for help. A rescue mission involving a kidnapped scientist becomes far more dangerous than expected, pushing Bond toward a villain threat powered by new technology.

name: Fear Street: Part One - 1994
description: After a string of brutal slayings, a teen and her friends confront an evil force tied to their notorious town’s dark history. As fear spreads, they work to survive while uncovering what’s been haunting the place for centuries.

name: Fear Street: Part Two - 1978
description: In 1978, rival groups at Camp Nightwing are forced to work together when a terrifying mystery erupts. As threats connect to their towns’ past, the camp becomes the front line for surviving what has come alive.

name: Pleasure
description: A 19-year-old woman leaves a small town in Sweden for Los Angeles, chasing the dream of becoming a top porn star. But the path toward her ambition is rougher than expected, as she faces pressure, competition, and a harsh reality behind the industry.

name: Respect
description: Respect follows a singer’s journey from a young church choir to global superstardom, showing how talent, ambition, and personal struggles shape the path to success. The film traces her rise while touching on the emotional pressures that come with family and early relationships.

name: Chip 'n Dale: Rescue Rangers
description: Decades after their cartoon hit ended, one of the duo has settled into ordinary life, while the other chases nostalgia and tries to feel relevant again. When a former cast mate disappears, the two have to patch up their friendship and step back into detective mode to find their missing friend and others like them.

name: The Half of It
description: Shy, straight-A student Ellie is hired by a well-meaning but inarticulate jock to help with wooing the most popular girl in school. As their unlikely friendship deepens, Ellie’s own feelings get complicated, turning the plan into something much more personal.

name: Nightmare Alley
description: A driven carnival performer learns how to read and manipulate people, turning deception into a path toward bigger opportunities. As ambition grows, a partnership with a dangerous psychologist pulls the con into darker, riskier territory.

name: Let Him Go
description: After the loss of their son, a retired sheriff and his wife leave their Montana ranch to rescue their young grandson. They travel to the Dakotas, facing a dangerous, off-the-grid family whose grip on the boy puts their resolve—and their limits—under pressure.

name: Kate
description: A ruthless criminal operative has less than 24 hours to carry out revenge on her enemies. On the way, she unexpectedly connects with the daughter of one of her past victims, adding an emotional complication to her deadly mission.

name: To All the Boys: P.S. I Still Love You
description: A young woman and her boyfriend have moved their romance from pretend to officially real. But when another one of her past love letters brings a new person into the picture, their relationship is thrown into doubt.

name: Beckett
description: An American tourist in Greece finds himself in immediate danger after a tragic accident draws him into a political conspiracy. He realizes he’s become a target, forcing him into a tense scramble where staying alive matters more than anything.

name: The Father
description: An aging man resists help from his daughter as his daily life becomes harder to understand. As familiar people, places, and moments feel uncertain, the film follows his growing fear and confusion while those around him struggle to care for him.

name: I Care a Lot
description: A ruthless legal guardian exploits vulnerable older clients by using the system to control their lives and assets. When a seemingly easy new case brings unexpected complications, the scheme turns into a tense battle of greed, power, and survival.

name: Causeway
description: A US soldier returns home after suffering a traumatic brain injury during fighting in Afghanistan, and finds it hard to readjust to life in New Orleans. While handling daily struggles, she meets a local mechanic, and their unlikely connection grows into something quietly meaningful.

name: The Little Things
description: A weary deputy and a driven detective team up to investigate a string of killings in Los Angeles. As the search narrows, the case becomes less about easy answers and more about obsession, doubt, and the personal cost of chasing darkness.

name: The Silencing
description: A reformed hunter and a local sheriff pursue a vicious killer after evidence suggests a long-ago disappearance may be connected. As they close in, their hunt turns into a deadly game of cat and mouse through remote wilderness and small-town fear.

name: Den of Thieves: Pantera
description: Big Nick returns to hunt down Donnie across Europe, closing in as diamond thieves and the Panther mafia circle a massive robbery. With a planned heist targeting the world’s largest diamond exchange, the chase escalates into a dangerous game of shifting loyalties.

name: The Green Knight
description: An epic fantasy retelling of an Arthurian tale follows a reckless knight who sets out on a daring quest to confront a gigantic, emerald-skinned stranger who tests men. The journey blends physical travel with a searching inner path as the appointment draws nearer.

name: John Wick: Chapter 4
description: With a growing bounty and enemies closing in from every direction, a feared assassin searches for a way out from under a powerful criminal order. The journey leads across the globe, where shifting alliances and relentless threats make freedom harder to reach.

name: Bodies Bodies Bodies
description: During a stormy gathering at a remote mansion, a group of wealthy young friends plays a party game about finding a hidden killer. When the night turns frighteningly real, paranoia, old grudges, and messy relationships make it harder to know who to trust.

name: Archive
description: In 2038, a lone researcher nears completion on a human-equivalent AI at a remote facility. With reunions and secrets hanging over the project, he faces mounting pressure as his most personal motive must stay hidden at all costs.

name: Good Luck, Have Fun, Don't Die
description: A man from the future arrives at an LA diner and needs to recruit a very specific group of disgruntled patrons for a one-night quest. Together, they try to stop a terminal threat from a rogue artificial intelligence that could upend society.

name: Boss Level
description: A former special forces operative is stuck reliving the same deadly day, facing constant attacks and learning a little more with each reset. To break the loop, he must uncover who is behind it and find a way to stop the cycle.

name: Mank
description: 1930s Hollywood is reframed through the eyes of a biting, self-destructive screenwriter racing to finish a script for a groundbreaking project. As he works, his past studio battles and turbulent relationships come back into focus, revealing the pressures behind big-screen ambition.

name: The Midnight Sky
description: A lone scientist in the Arctic races to reach a crew of astronauts heading home after a mysterious global catastrophe. As time runs out, he struggles to coordinate from isolation while hoping contact can be made.

name: King Richard
description: A determined father guides his talented daughters through intense training, family expectations, and the challenges of breaking into a demanding sport. The film follows their early journey with a focus on belief, discipline, education, and the sacrifices behind a dream.

name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem
description: After years away from the human world, four turtle brothers try to win over New Yorkers and fit in as normal teenagers. With help from a new friend, they tangle with a mysterious crime syndicate—only to find themselves facing an unleashed army of mutants.

name: Ma Rainey's Black Bottom
description: In 1927 Chicago, a legendary blues singer and her band arrive at a recording studio as tensions flare between the musicians and the people trying to control the session. Set over a single day, the story builds pressure through ambition, conflicting visions, and high-stakes music-making.

name: Holidate
description: Fed up with holiday pressure, two strangers strike a deal to be each other’s platonic plus-ones throughout the year. As they navigate festive events, their arrangement starts to change, bringing unexpected emotions into the mix.

name: Meg 2: The Trench
description: A daring research team plunges into the ocean’s deepest trench to investigate strange threats, but their exploration turns chaotic when a dangerous mining operation gets in the way. As tensions rise, the team is forced into a tense fight for survival against massive sea creatures.

name: Nobody
description: A suburban dad who feels overlooked at home lets years of frustration boil over after a break-in. What follows is a brutal, darkly funny action story as he slips back into a dangerous past he tried to leave behind.

name: A Boy Called Christmas
description: An ordinary young boy sets off into the snowy north to search for his father, who’s chasing the legend of an elves’ village. Along the way, he teams up with a headstrong reindeer and a loyal pet mouse, leading to a magical, heartwarming adventure where hope feels within reach.

name: Spiderhead
description: A prisoner at a cutting-edge facility is asked to test emotion-altering drugs for a wealthy scientific authority. As the experiments shape his feelings, he starts questioning why the program exists and what it’s really doing to the people involved.

name: The Menu
description: A couple travels to a remote island for an exclusive dining experience with a small group of wealthy guests. As each elaborate course arrives, the evening grows stranger, darker, and more threatening than anyone expected.

name: Marry Me
description: After learning her fiancé has been unfaithful, a global pop star impulsively marries a complete stranger from the audience. With the media frenzy in full swing, they both have to figure out whether their unlikely connection can become real love.

name: Minari
description: A Korean American family moves to a rural Arkansas farm hoping to build a better future. As money, work, and unfamiliar surroundings test them, the family faces the everyday strain of chasing a dream while learning what home and resilience can mean.

name: Haunted Mansion
description: A woman and her son move into a haunted home and recruit a mismatched team of so-called experts to rid the place of supernatural intruders. Their efforts hit a roadblock, trapping them inside as they work together to uncover what’s driving the haunting.

name: Thor: Love and Thunder
description: After his retirement is cut short by a powerful threat against the gods, Thor teams up with unlikely allies to track down the mystery behind the killer’s plan. With help from King Valkyrie, Korg, and the newly empowered Mighty Thor, they race across the cosmos to stop it before it’s too late.

name: The Last Duel
description: King Charles VI orders a deadly dispute between a knight and his squire to be settled through a duel. The story is retold from multiple viewpoints, exploring how each account frames the same events and what each person believes truly happened.

name: Reminiscence
description: In a near-future Miami where the rising seas have reshaped daily life, a specialist business offers clients the chance to relive any desired memory. A new connection turns a routine search into a love affair, but later memories point to possible violence tied to the same woman, forcing the truth to surface from the past.

name: Three Thousand Years of Longing
description: A lonely scholar on a trip to Istanbul finds an ancient bottle and frees a djinn who offers three wishes. Unsure what to wish for, she listens as he shares stories from across the centuries, and their unusual encounter slowly changes both of them.

name: Halloween Kills
description: Michael escapes a trap and returns to a violent bloodbath. As one woman fights through serious injuries, she urges her family and the people of Haddonfield to band together against the unstoppable threat.

name: Stillwater
description: An American oil-rig worker travels to France to visit his imprisoned daughter, who insists she did not commit the crime she was convicted for. Facing language barriers and an unfamiliar legal system, he tries to help while slowly building unexpected ties in a new place.

name: Babylon
description: Babylon follows multiple characters as their big dreams collide with the excess and volatility of Hollywood’s late-1920s transition from silent films to sound. Set amid rampant decadence, ambition, and reinvention, their careers rise and fall in a whirlwind of changing industry demands.

name: The Forever Purge
description: All bets are off when the annual Purge doesn’t stop at daybreak, as lawless marauders keep attacking well beyond the usual limits. Their rampage targets a group of immigrants they want to punish, forcing everyone caught in the chaos to flee as fear spreads.

name: Halloween Ends
description: Years after a previous Halloween rampage, Laurie tries to move forward without fear and rage. When a young man accused of a babysitting tragedy sparks a new wave of violence and terror, Laurie is forced to face the evil she can’t control.

name: Chemical Hearts
description: A hopelessly romantic high school senior becomes drawn to a mysterious new classmate, and their connection sparks an unexpected journey. As feelings grow, both learn about love and loss, and how much they still have to discover about themselves.

name: Don't Worry Darling
description: Alice and Jack settle into Victory, an experimental company town that markets itself as the perfect home for workers and their families. As small signs of trouble multiply, Alice begins to suspect something darker beneath the polished life, and her questions about what’s really happening in Victory grow increasingly hard to ignore.

name: Another Round
description: Four high school teachers stuck in dull routines try an unusual experiment: keeping a steady level of alcohol in their systems to see if it improves their confidence, work, and personal lives. What begins as a playful test gradually pushes their friendships, responsibilities, and limits.

name: Babyteeth
description: A seriously ill teenager throws her sheltered family into turmoil when she starts seeing a small-time drug dealer. As the relationship grows, everyone is forced to rethink control, care, and what it means to let someone live on their own terms.

name: The Matrix Resurrections
description: Plagued by strange memories, Neo’s life takes an unexpected turn when he finds himself back inside the Matrix. As familiar ideas collide with new threats, he must navigate this altered world with the help of old and new allies.

name: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
description: A struggling reporter and the alien presence sharing his body try to manage their uneasy partnership while a dangerous imprisoned killer becomes linked to a terrifying new threat. As chaos spreads, their bond is tested in a fast, violent, and often comic superhero showdown.

name: Unhinged
description: A stressed single mother has an ordinary bad morning turn dangerous after an impatient traffic encounter. What starts as road rage grows into a tense pursuit, as a volatile stranger fixates on making her pay for a moment of anger.

name: Arthur the King
description: During a punishing multi-day adventure race across rugged terrain, a determined team finds an unexpected companion in a scrappy street dog. As exhaustion, danger, and tough choices mount, the journey becomes less about winning and more about loyalty, resilience, and connection.

name: The Night House
description: Reeling from the unexpected death of her husband, Beth is left alone in the lakeside home he built for her. As she settles in, she starts uncovering disturbing secrets tied to his recent death.

name: The Electrical Life of Louis Wain
description: The extraordinary true story follows an eccentric British artist whose fast, imaginative artwork changed how people viewed cats. Alongside his creative ideas—including a fascination with electricity—he must juggle family responsibilities and the pressure of everyday bills.

name: The Dig
description: As WWII nears, a wealthy widow invites an amateur archaeologist to excavate the burial mounds on her estate. Their work leads to a striking historic discovery, while looming uncertainty reshapes how they see the past and the future.

name: The Banker
description: Set in the 1960s, the story follows two entrepreneurs building an ambitious business plan aimed at advancing housing integration and fair access to opportunity. As they navigate a deeply unequal system, their goals drive both strategy and risk in their push for the American Dream.

name: Deep Water
description: A wealthy husband lets his wife pursue multiple affairs to avoid a divorce, but that arrangement turns him into a prime suspect when her lovers begin to vanish. As rumors spread, tension builds around what he did—and what everyone thinks he’s capable of.

name: Next Goal Wins
description: A Dutch coach takes on the daunting challenge of reshaping a struggling American Samoa soccer team, aiming to move them from longtime losses toward even one meaningful goal. Based on real events, the story follows their efforts, setbacks, and growing belief as the team and coach figure out how to play together.

name: The Marvels
description: A cosmic anomaly links three very different heroes, causing their powers to overlap in chaotic ways across space. To stop a revolutionary threat, they must learn to trust each other, coordinate their abilities, and face a universe-sized crisis together.

name: Queenpins
description: Bored suburban homemaker Connie and her best pal JoJo, a vlogger with big dreams, turn a simple hobby into a high-stakes counterfeit coupon scheme. Their operation targets mega-corporations for massive payouts, while supermarket investigators close in—joined by a determined Postal Inspector on the trail to “coupon dominance.”

name: Samaritan
description: Thirteen-year-old Sam suspects his mysterious, reclusive neighbor may be a legendary vigilante presumed dead decades earlier. As crime rises and the city teeters toward chaos, Sam tries to persuade his neighbor to return and help prevent disaster.

name: The Bad Guys
description: After years of high-profile heists, a crew of criminal animals finally gets caught. To avoid prison, their leader strikes a deal that forces the group to navigate a risky new path while trying to stay together.

name: The Accountant 2
description: After an old acquaintance is killed, a meticulous problem-solver is pulled into a dangerous investigation. With help from an estranged sibling and a government agent, the search for answers uncovers a far-reaching conspiracy, drawing the trio into the crosshairs of relentless killers determined to keep their secrets hidden.

name: Saint Maud
description: A young, deeply religious nurse begins caring for a frail, hedonistic dancer in a secluded home. As unsettling hints of a darker past surface and her faith grows more intense, her sense of purpose turns increasingly unsettling and complicated.

name: Clouds
description: A young musician learns his illness has spread and he has limited time to live. Rather than giving up, he chases his music dream and records an album, only to find it becomes a viral sensation.

name: Titane
description: A woman carrying a metal plate from a childhood car accident sets off on a bizarre journey. Along the way, she crosses paths with a firefighter who’s been reunited with his missing son after years apart.

name: The Marksman
description: A struggling rancher near the border is pulled into protecting a young boy fleeing cartel violence after a deadly encounter. Their trip to deliver him to safety becomes a tense road chase, as danger closes in and an unlikely bond slowly forms.

name: Pig
description: A lone truffle hunter in the Oregon wilderness travels to Portland after his beloved foraging pig is taken. In a search that pulls him out of isolation, he hunts for the mysterious person responsible while confronting what he’s lost.

name: Spider-Man: No Way Home
description: After a public unmasking, Peter Parker struggles to keep his normal life separate from the responsibilities of being a superhero. Seeking help from Doctor Strange, he triggers even greater danger, forcing him to confront what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - The Movie: Mugen Train
description: A group of young demon slayers boards a mysterious train for a new mission alongside a powerful ally. As a dangerous demon targets passengers and fighters alike, the journey blends action, humor, strange dreams, and high emotional stakes.

name: Rose Island
description: In 1968, an engineer creates an independent island-state off the coast of Rimini, using Esperanto as its official language. Italian authorities challenge the micronation, viewing it as a way to avoid taxes from the crowds of tourists and curious visitors drawn to the experiment.

name: Spirited
description: Each Christmas Eve, a ghostly host targets one harsh soul, sending three spirits to challenge them to change. This time, the wrong man pushes back, turning the visits into a growing rethink of his own past, present, and future.

name: Wrath of Man
description: A cold new security guard joins a Los Angeles cash truck company and quickly reveals surprising precision skills during a heist. The crew starts to question who he is, while his ultimate motive points to a long-awaited score he intends to settle.

name: Nope
description: In a lonely stretch of inland California, local residents witness an uncanny, chilling discovery that turns everyday life upside down. As strange events unfold around their ranch, the situation grows more unsettling and difficult to explain.

name: The Zone of Interest
description: A high-ranking Nazi commandant and his wife try to build a quiet, “dream life” for their family in a home and garden right beside Auschwitz. The story focuses on everyday routines as screams, gunfire, and the camp’s activity bleed through their ordinary world.

name: The Babysitter: Killer Queen
description: Two years after surviving a satanic cult tied to his babysitter, a teen tries to move on and focus on high school life. But familiar evil returns, pulling him back into a fight where he has to outsmart the forces hunting him.

name: The Last Letter from Your Lover
description: In London, a young journalist becomes fixated on handwritten letters she finds, which reveal a passionate, star-crossed romance from the 1960s. As she digs deeper into the past, her search reshapes what love and longing mean in the present.

name: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania
description: Super-Hero partners Scott Lang and Hope van Dyne, along with Hope’s parents Janet van Dyne and Hank Pym and Scott’s daughter Cassie Lang, are drawn into the Quantum Realm. There they face strange creatures and a fast-moving adventure that tests what they thought they could handle.

name: The Unforgivable
description: After being released from prison for a violent crime, a woman returns to a society that refuses to forgive her. As she tries to rebuild her life, her past keeps colliding with new relationships and hard truths.

name: To All the Boys: Always and Forever
description: Senior year takes center stage as Lara Jean returns from a family trip to Korea and starts weighing college plans, while her relationship status adds pressure to every decision. The story balances everyday high school moments with growing up and figuring out what comes next.

name: Plane
description: After a storm-damaged aircraft successfully lands in a war zone, the pilot must keep control as multiple militias threaten to take the plane and its passengers hostage. With help from a dangerous prisoner, the crew and passengers face escalating violence while trying to stay alive.

name: Paddington in Peru
description: Paddington travels to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy, now living at a Home for Retired Bears. When a mystery leads to the Amazon rainforest and the mountain peaks of Peru, the Brown family must follow clues and navigate unexpected dangers to find her.

name: The Harder They Fall
description: Gunning for revenge, outlaw Nat Love sets out with his crew to go after a ruthless crime boss recently freed from prison. As tensions rise, the pursuit turns into a gritty showdown driven by vengeance, loyalty, and escalating violence.

name: Worth
description: Kenneth Feinberg is appointed Special Master of a government compensation fund tied to the 9/11 attacks, tasked with administering payments to victims’ families. As bureaucracy and politics threaten the process, he pushes through to understand the human meaning behind assigning value and discovers what life is worth.

name: The Unbearable Weight of Massive Talent
description: A struggling actor takes a lucrative offer to attend a wealthy fan’s birthday, hoping it will solve mounting personal and financial problems. The trip turns into a chaotic action-comedy adventure when outside forces pull him into a risky situation that asks him to live up to his own larger-than-life image.

name: The Sea Beast
description: A young stowaway joins a famed sea monster hunter aboard a ship bound for dangerous, uncharted waters. Their voyage becomes a sweeping ocean adventure that challenges old beliefs and turns a hunt into something much bigger.

name: The Forgotten Battle
description: During World War II’s Battle of the Scheldt, three people on different sides of the conflict are pulled into dangerous choices. As their paths cross, the cost of war becomes personal, forcing each to face fear, duty, and survival in a rapidly changing battlefield.

name: Dinner in America
description: An on-the-lam punk rocker and a young woman are pulled together by their obsession with a local band. Their bond sparks an unexpected, sprawling road journey through the decaying suburbs of the American Midwest, turning a rough start into an epic adventure.

name: Devotion
description: Devotion is a harrowing true story set during the Korean War, following two elite US Navy fighter pilots as they rise through training and combat. Their loyalty to one another is tested amid danger, while their heroic sacrifices help define them as celebrated wingmen.

name: The Tragedy of Macbeth
description: Macbeth receives a prophecy from three witches that he will one day become King of Scotland. Driven by ambition and pushed forward by his wife, he murders his king and takes the throne for himself.

name: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
description: A foster teen and his siblings can turn into adult superheroes with a magic word, but their teamwork is tested when ancient enemies arrive with a world-threatening weapon. The adventure mixes family worries, big battles, and broad comedy.

name: Cinderella
description: Cinderella is an orphaned girl with big dreams, facing harsh treatment from an evil stepmother. With help from her Fabulous Godmother, she keeps pushing forward, working toward a future where her hopes can come true.

name: The Northman
description: Princehood turns into a brutal quest when a father is murdered, a mother is taken, and an heir grows into a Viking with a single mission. Two decades later, he sets out to rescue his mother, avenge his father, and confront the uncle who set it all in motion.

name: Renfield
description: Having spent centuries as Dracula’s lackey, Renfield is fed up and looking for a fresh start. When he catches feelings for a fiery traffic cop, his search for redemption collides with a chaotic web of crime and corrupt policing.

name: Clerks III
description: After surviving a massive heart attack, one of the old friends pulls in another to help turn their past at a small convenience store into a movie they hope will last. The project grows out of their shared memories and the heavy reality of aging and mortality.

name: Miss Americana
description: Miss Americana is a raw, emotionally revealing look at an iconic songwriter and performer during a transformational period in her life. As she learns to embrace her role, the story focuses on her voice, creativity, and growing confidence as a woman.

name: The Social Dilemma
description: This documentary-drama hybrid examines how social networking platforms can shape behavior, attention, and mental well-being. Through expert perspectives and dramatized examples, it raises concerns about profit-driven technology and encourages viewers to rethink everyday digital habits.

name: The Boogeyman
description: Still grieving the death of their mother, two sisters are plagued by a terrifying presence inside their home. As their father struggles to fully see what’s happening, they must fight off escalating fears before it becomes impossible to stop.

name: Uncle Frank
description: In 1973, a young woman and her uncle take a long road trip to a small South Carolina town for a family funeral. Along the way, an unexpected companion joins them, and the trip becomes a moving look at family tension, growing up, and life in a less accepting time.

name: Pieces of a Woman
description: After a home birth ends in tragedy, a young mother is pulled into a year of grief that strains her relationship with her partner and family. As she tries to keep going, she is forced to face pain, blame, and the difficult work of living with loss.

name: Operation Mincemeat
description: In 1943, two British intelligence officers craft a deception operation by planting false papers on a corpse and sending it ashore off the coast of Spain. Their aim is to mislead Nazi spies about where the Allied attack will come from.

name: One Night in Miami...
description: Set in 1964 after a major boxing victory, the boxer shares a night of conversation with three other influential figures at a motel in the segregated South. As the night unfolds, their talks turn from celebration to intense debate about race, equality, and the Black experience in America.

name: Glass Onion
description: World-famous detective Benoit Blanc travels to Greece to unravel a mystery tied to a tech billionaire and an eclectic group of friends. As tensions rise during their high-profile weekend, Blanc must sift through motives, shifting stories, and carefully arranged clues.

name: A Complete Unknown
description: Early 1960s New York sets the stage as an enigmatic young singer arrives from Minnesota with a guitar and a gift for changing the music world. Moving through the vibrant folk scene, he rises fast, forms key relationships, and reaches a pivotal, controversial festival moment.

name: Joker: Folie à Deux
description: A troubled man wrestles with identity, isolation, and the need to be seen while a new romantic connection pulls him toward music and fantasy. The story blends dark drama with musical moments as he faces confinement, public attention, and emotional pressure.

name: Black Box
description: After a devastating plane crash, a black box analyst starts hearing audio clues that suggest something isn’t right. As he follows the evidence, he is pushed into a dangerous search for the truth while facing pressure from powerful people who want the matter kept quiet.

name: Shiva Baby
description: A college student tries to get through a tense shiva while keeping her life neatly covered, until an unexpected run-in upends everything. With relatives and close connections gathering in the same home, small conversations spiral into mounting discomfort.

name: 365 Days
description: A woman is taken by a powerful mafia boss who keeps her captive and gives her a year to make her fall in love with him. As she’s pulled into his lavish world of wealth, control, and temptation, their volatile dynamic turns into an intense, erotic push-and-pull.

name: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
description: Many generations after Caesar’s time, apes now rule while humans live on the margins. When a powerful ape leader begins building an empire, a young ape sets out on a dangerous journey that challenges everything he believes about his people’s history and the future they should choose.

name: Vacation Friends
description: A straight-laced couple returns from a Mexico vacation only to find the rowdy couple they met has followed them back home. Now they’re stuck dealing with constant prank chaos as the adventurous duo keeps pushing things further.

name: Rebel Ridge
description: A former Marine arrives in a small town to help a family member post bail, but local law enforcement wrongly seizes the cash he needs. With tensions escalating, he pushes back against the town’s corrupt system as the situation spirals into open conflict.

name: Infinity Pool
description: A couple’s luxury island getaway turns unsettling when they follow new acquaintances beyond the resort and encounter a culture of excess and violence. After an accident, they’re trapped by a harsh justice system where money can buy a disturbing alternative to punishment, pulling them into escalating moral and psychological chaos.

name: The Call
description: Connected by phone within the same home but across 20 years, a caller forces a woman’s past choices and present life to collide. As the calls reshape events in real time, the situation spirals into a tense struggle to prevent disaster and alter fate.

name: The Man from Toronto
description: A mistaken-identity mix-up drags a bumbling entrepreneur into danger, forcing him to partner with a notorious assassin known as The Man from Toronto. Together, they race to survive while the situation spirals into escalating chaos.

name: Minamata
description: A war photographer travels to Japan to document the devastating effects of mercury poisoning on coastal communities. As he investigates, the film shows the human cost of an environmental disaster and the fight for accountability.

name: Lilo & Stitch
description: A lonely Hawaiian girl tries to hold her family together while an escaped alien keeps getting into trouble. The pair’s unlikely bond leads to laughter, heartfelt moments, and growing hope for a closer, more supportive “ohana.”

name: The Lost Daughter
description: A woman’s quiet seaside getaway spirals as her fixation on a young mother forces her to revisit unresolved memories from her own past. As her observations deepen, the trip becomes a confrontation with old secrets and the complicated emotional cost of motherhood.

name: The Map of Tiny Perfect Things
description: Two teenagers are stuck reliving the same day in an endless time loop. Instead of giving up, they search their town for tiny moments that make the day feel perfect, while their connection grows stronger with each reset.

name: American Underdog
description: A determined athlete chases a professional football dream while working an ordinary job and building a life with a new family. Based on a true story, it follows perseverance, faith, love, and support through repeated setbacks.

name: The Banshees of Inisherin
description: Two lifelong friends on a remote island reach an impasse when one abruptly ends their relationship. As repeated attempts to fix things backfire, the disagreement escalates into an increasingly uncomfortable standoff with unsettling consequences for both.

name: Don't Look Up
description: Two astronomers discover a comet on a collision course with Earth and scramble to warn the public. As they take their message on a chaotic media tour, they run into political spin, corporate interests, and a culture more focused on distractions than an impending global disaster.

name: Elvis
description: A gifted performer rises from humble roots to worldwide fame while navigating the pressures of stardom, public attention, and a powerful manager’s control. The film follows a turbulent career shaped by music, ambition, image, and complicated loyalty.

name: Creed III
description: A former boxing champion is settled into family life and life outside the ring when someone from his childhood returns after years away. Old wounds and new ambitions collide, pushing both men toward a deeply personal showdown.

name: Sound of Freedom
description: A former US government agent quits his job to devote his life to rescuing children from global sex traffickers. As he searches for a missing child, he takes on a dangerous mission in remote territory and works with uneasy allies to bring answers—and help—where others won’t.

name: The Rescue
description: This documentary follows the urgent 2018 effort to bring twelve boys and their coach out of a flooded cave in Northern Thailand. It turns a real-world crisis into a gripping story of teamwork, danger, and determination under extreme pressure.

name: Justice League Dark: Apokolips War
description: After a disastrous war leaves Earth in ruins, the surviving heroes and antiheroes are forced to regroup under desperate circumstances. With time running out, they must put aside old conflicts, form uneasy alliances, and launch one last push against a powerful cosmic tyrant.

name: Run Hide Fight
