description: A 17-year-old fights to survive and protect classmates when a group of attackers takes over a school. Using wits and survival skills, she tries to keep hope alive while the threat escalates.

name: I Want You Back
description: Peter and Emma were sure life was about to get bigger, until their partners dumped them and moved on. Now they launch a hilarious plan to win their exes back, only for the attempt to trigger a chain of unexpected results.

name: Flee
description: Mostly told through animation, this documentary looks back at a child refugee’s life as he recounts decades of hardship. Living with a long-kept secret, he revisits his journey from Afghanistan and the lasting effects of a life spent fleeing danger.

name: Sputnik
description: During the Cold War, a Soviet spacecraft crashes after a mission goes wrong, leaving the commander as its only survivor. A renowned Russian psychologist is brought in to assess his mental state, but it soon suggests something dangerous has returned with him.

name: Freaky
description: A mystical, ancient dagger sparks a magical body swap between a notorious serial killer and a 17-year-old girl. As they navigate each other’s lives, the change brings fast-moving horror and dark comedy.

name: Where the Crawdads Sing
description: Abandoned as a child, a young woman grows up alone in the marshes outside a small town, learning to survive in isolation. When a former boyfriend is found dead, local suspicion quickly turns toward her, forcing her private life into public judgment.

name: The Alpinist
description: A gifted young climber lives simply and pursues daring solo ascents on rock and ice, often resisting the attention of a film crew. The documentary follows his restless independence, harsh winter climbs, and the awe he inspires among fellow mountaineers.

name: Scream
description: Twenty-five years after a brutal murder spree shocked a small town, a new masked killer targets a group of teenagers. As attacks begin to connect back to the town’s darkest past, surviving characters scramble to follow the “rules” and stop the threat before it spreads further.

name: Mortal Kombat Legends: Scorpion's Revenge
description: After a brutal tragedy, a warrior is pulled into a dark bargain and given a chance at revenge. Meanwhile, a thunder god assembles an unlikely team of fighters to enter a high-stakes tournament, where relentless battles will decide the fate of humanity against a ruthless invading force.

name: Athlete A
description: The story follows Indianapolis Star reporters as they break a major USA Gymnastics abuse scandal, then revisits the process of bringing the truth to light. Through the perspectives of gymnasts and the reporting that followed, the film explores both the harm done and the effort to expose it.

name: David Attenborough: A Life on Our Planet
description: A veteran naturalist reflects on a lifetime spent exploring Earth’s wild places and witnessing dramatic changes to the living world. The documentary blends wonder, warning, and hope as it looks at the challenges facing nature and the possibilities for a better future.

name: The Creator
description: In a future war between humans and artificial intelligence, a hardened ex-special forces agent searches for the elusive architect of advanced AI. His mission is to destroy a powerful new weapon, but grief and a personal connection to a unique AI child complicate everything and risk consequences for mankind itself.

name: Lightyear
description: A determined space ranger gets stranded on a distant planet and keeps pushing to find a way home. Alongside an eager team of recruits and a loyal robot companion, the mission grows into a larger fight that tests teamwork, persistence, and letting go of mistakes.

name: House of Gucci
description: When an outsider marries into the Gucci family, her ambition starts to crack the family’s legacy. As power struggles grow, the story unfolds through betrayal, decadence, revenge, and leads to murder.

name: Billie Eilish: The World's a Little Blurry
description: This documentary gives an intimate look at Billie Eilish as she juggles life on the road, onstage, and at home with her family. It follows her journey as writing and recording her debut album reshapes her days and her world, capturing the pressures and excitement along the way.

name: Roald Dahl's Matilda the Musical
description: An extraordinary young girl discovers her superpower and finds the courage to help others, even when everything seems stacked against her. Along the way, she learns to stand up for what’s right and take charge of her own destiny, with surprising results.

name: Old
description: On a tropical getaway, several families find themselves stuck on a secluded beach where time moves at a terrifying pace, rapidly aging everyone who steps onto the sand. As hours pass like years, they scramble to understand what’s happening and search for a way to escape before it’s too late.

name: Hustle
description: A struggling basketball scout discovers a gifted player overseas and takes a risky chance on bringing him to the United States. Together, they face pressure, doubt, and demanding training as they try to prove they belong at the highest level.

name: #Alive
description: During a deadly virus outbreak, a lone man remains trapped in his apartment, cut off from outside help. With danger closing in, he must rely on digital communication and his own determination to survive and find a way out.

name: The Witcher: Nightmare of the Wolf
description: After escaping poverty, a monster hunter builds a life chasing coin, glory, and dangerous creatures. When a new threat emerges, old wounds and hard choices force a confrontation with the past.

name: Zack Snyder's Justice League
description: After a world-shaking event, Bruce Wayne and Diana Prince plan to assemble a team of metahumans to stop an approaching catastrophe. Together, they recruit new allies and face a rapidly tightening threat that could put everything at risk.

name: Extraction II
description: After barely surviving a past mission, a hardened commando is pulled back into danger for a high-risk rescue. The job involves freeing an imprisoned family tied to a ruthless gangster, setting off a brutal chain of fights, escapes, and desperate survival.

name: A Hero
description: A man imprisoned over an unpaid debt gets a brief leave and tries to negotiate with the person he owes, hoping to regain his freedom. As his plan unravels, public attention and social pressure complicate every choice, raising uneasy questions about honesty, reputation, and what it really means to be seen as a hero.

name: Black Box
description: After losing his wife and suffering memory loss in a car accident, a single father joins an experimental treatment to help him understand who he is. As the process unfolds, he starts questioning his identity and confronting unsettling possibilities.

name: A Whisker Away
description: A young girl makes a surprising choice to get closer to her crush by transforming into a cat. As she tries to hold onto the moment, the boundary between her human life and animal life begins to blur.

name: Emancipation
description: Inspired by a true story, a man risks everything to escape and return to his family, driven by love and the hope of freedom. His dangerous journey turns survival into endurance as he faces relentless pursuit and brutal conditions.

name: The Dissident
description: After a Washington Post journalist vanishes following entry into a consulate in Istanbul, his fiancée and dissidents worldwide search for clues behind a brutal murder. The documentary examines the role of the journalist’s outspoken stance and efforts to expose a wider cover-up.

name: The Kid Detective
description: A former child sleuth, now an aimless adult, spends his days chasing petty local puzzles while struggling with regret and self-doubt. When a new client asks for help with a brutal killing, he finally gets a serious case that forces him to confront the town’s darker side and his own stalled life.

name: Evil Dead Rise
description: A tense family reunion in a city apartment building is shattered when a hidden evil is unleashed. Trapped together as possession and violence spread, a fractured family must fight to survive a nightmare that turns home into a brutal battleground.

name: Spencer
description: During Christmas holidays at the Sandringham estate, a princess navigates intense pressure and isolation within the royal family. As traditions and constant scrutiny weigh on her, she decides to leave her marriage to Prince Charles.

name: Bullet Train
description: Unlucky assassin Ladybug tries to carry out one last job peacefully, but fate derails his plan. A high-speed train ride turns into a chaotic collision course with lethal adversaries worldwide, all chasing connected but conflicting objectives on the world’s fastest train.

name: Hubie Halloween
description: Hubie Dubois is mocked in his hometown of Salem, Massachusetts, even though he loves its legendary Halloween celebration. But this year, something eerie starts happening, and he must step up to protect the holiday.

name: The Woman King
description: In 1800s West Africa, an elite force of women warriors trains new recruits while defending their kingdom from powerful enemies and threats to their way of life. The story blends fierce battles with loyalty, tradition, and the personal cost of strength.

name: Licorice Pizza
description: Set in the San Fernando Valley in 1973, the story follows two young people as they grow up, roam around, and navigate first love. Their connection deepens through school, hustle, and visits to bigger places, bringing both excitement and complicated feelings.

name: The Gray Man
description: After a shadowy CIA agent uncovers damaging agency secrets, he becomes the target of a ruthless rogue operative. The hunt pushes him across the globe as he tries to stay one step ahead of an operation with a bounty on his head.

name: Don't Listen
description: After a tragic turn while fixing up a new home, a person begins hearing ghostly pleas for help. Chased by unsettling voices and strange happenings, they seek out a well-known paranormal expert to understand what’s haunting the place.

name: Nowhere Special
description: A single dad raises his young son and tries to give him a stable, caring life after the child’s mother leaves. When he learns his time is limited, he focuses on finding a safe new home, determined to protect the boy from the harsh reality ahead.

name: Host
description: During lockdown, six friends join a live Zoom séance after hiring a medium. As the session spirals out of control, strange forces begin invading their homes, and the group fights to stay safe while the situation worsens quickly.

name: Sonic the Hedgehog 2
description: A speedy young hero-in-training wants to prove he can protect his new home, but a returning villain and a powerful new rival spark a race to find a legendary emerald with world-shaking power. With help from a clever new friend, he sets off on a globe-trotting adventure filled with comedy, teamwork, and big action.

name: Luca
description: On a sunlit Italian coast, two young outsiders share a summer of friendship, food, scooters, and dreams of adventure. Their fun is complicated by a hidden link to the world beneath the water.

name: Below Zero
description: A prisoner transfer van is attacked, forcing the officer in charge to fight for control both inside the vehicle and out in the bitter cold. As danger escalates around him, he faces a silent, deadly threat while trying to keep the situation from falling apart.

name: My Octopus Teacher
description: In a cold kelp forest at the tip of Africa, a weary filmmaker begins daily swims and encounters a curious young octopus. Over months of careful observation, an unusual bond forms, opening a quiet window into ocean life, trust, and personal renewal.

name: Malcolm & Marie
description: A filmmaker and his girlfriend return home after his movie premiere, but their night quickly turns explosive. As old wounds surface and painful truths come out, their conversations spiral into a romantic reckoning filled with raw tension.

name: American Murder: The Family Next Door
description: This documentary uses raw, firsthand footage to examine a family’s disappearance and the shocking events that followed. It presents the case through real video sources, including police footage and other recordings, tracing how the situation unfolded.

name: Borat Subsequent Moviefilm
description: 14 years after filming a journey across the USA, a provocative character returns with a young daughter and puts himself at risk during travels through the United States. The trip brings new encounters with the COVID-19 pandemic and the election season.

name: Whitney Houston: I Wanna Dance with Somebody
description: This joyous, emotional biographical movie celebrates a legendary R&B-pop vocalist, following her journey from obscurity to musical superstardom. It traces major career milestones alongside the personal relationships and pressures that shape her life.

name: Riders of Justice
description: After a fatal train accident shatters a family, a grieving father is pulled into a troubling investigation when a survivor suggests the crash may not have been accidental. As suspicion grows, a search for answers turns into a dark, emotional path involving loss, revenge, and uneasy companionship.

name: Encanto
description: In the mountains of Colombia, an extraordinary family lives in a magical home where each child is meant to receive a special gift—except one. When the family’s magic seems to be in danger, the ordinary sister sets out to find what the family needs most and how to save their home.

name: Mrs. Harris Goes to Paris
description: In 1950s London, a widowed cleaning lady becomes captivated by an haute couture Christian Dior dress. Determined to make it her own, she takes bold risks with her hard-earned money and heads to Paris, where chance encounters and new connections shape her journey.

name: Army of Thieves
description: In the early stages of a zombie apocalypse, a mysterious recruiter brings a bank teller into a team of would-be thieves. Together, they plan and carry out a top-secret heist, mixing high-stakes crime with the pressure of a collapsing world.

name: Texas Chainsaw Massacre
description: After decades of hiding, Leatherface returns to terrorize a group of idealistic influencers whose plans collide with his carefully protected world in a remote Texas town. Their arrival sparks escalating chaos as the group disrupts what was meant to stay undisturbed.

name: Redeeming Love
description: Set against the California Gold Rush, a young couple’s love is tested by harsh realities and personal demons. One partner struggles with fear and self-worth, while the other searches for her and discovers she can choose the life she wants.

name: The Worst Person in the World
description: The chronicles of four years in the life of Julie, a young woman navigating love and trying to find her footing in her career. As she pursues new experiences, her journey asks what she truly wants, and whether her choices bring real satisfaction.

name: Day Shift
description: In LA, a vampire hunter has one week to earn tuition and braces money for his kid. Juggling dangerous hunts and day-to-day work, he discovers that trying to survive while providing for his family could be even more deadly than the vampires.

name: Confess, Fletch
description: Roguishly charming yet trouble-prone, Fletch becomes the prime suspect in a murder case while searching for a stolen art collection. To clear himself, he works through a long list of suspects, running into eccentric dealers, mismatched neighbors, and complicated connections as the investigation tumbles into chaos.

name: The Black Phone
description: A shy 13-year-old is abducted and kept in a soundproof basement where screaming doesn’t help. When a disconnected phone starts ringing, the trapped boy hears the voices of the killer’s previous victims, who urge him to stop what happened to them from happening again.

name: Orphan: First Kill
description: After escaping from a secure institution in Estonia, a dangerous woman travels to America by posing as a missing child from a wealthy family. As suspicion grows, she is forced into a tense standoff with a mother determined to protect her household at any cost.

name: Living
description: In postwar London, an aging office worker feels trapped by routine, paperwork, and loneliness. After receiving life-changing news, he begins searching for meaning, connection, and a small sense of purpose before time slips away.

name: Leave the World Behind
description: A family heads to a luxurious rental home to unwind, only for a cyberattack to knock out their devices. With communication failing, two strangers arrive at the door, and the situation quickly becomes tense and unpredictable as the world outside feels like it’s falling apart.

name: Slumberland
description: A young girl finds a secret map leading to a dreamworld called Slumberland, and sets off with an eccentric outlaw. Together, they travel through dreams and try to escape frightening nightmares, all while she hopes to reunite with her late father.

name: Your Place or Mine
description: Best friends Debbie and Peter are complete opposites, so they swap homes for a week to see what life is really like on the other side. What starts as a fun experiment sparks unexpected feelings and forces them to reconsider what love can look like.

name: Napoleon
description: A sweeping historical drama follows a driven military leader’s climb through power, war, politics, and a volatile marriage. It aims for grand spectacle while tracing the personal costs of ambition and public life in a turbulent era.

name: The Trip
description: A dysfunctional couple escapes to a remote lakeside cabin claiming they want to reconnect, but both have plans to kill the other. Before either can act, unexpected visitors turn the situation into something far more dangerous than they anticipated.

name: A Man Called Otto
description: A grumpy widower clashes with the arrival of a lively young family next door, especially a quick-witted pregnant woman who pushes him to change. As their unexpected bond grows, his rigid routine begins to unravel, turning everyday life into something far more surprising and heartfelt.

name: Copshop
description: A con artist on the run hides inside a small-town police station to escape a lethal assassin. But when the hit man shows up at the precinct, an unsuspecting rookie cop gets pulled into a tense, dangerous standoff that spirals fast.

name: Blood Red Sky
description: A woman dealing with a mysterious illness is trapped aboard an overnight transatlantic flight when terrorists hijack the plane. To protect her son, she must confront her hidden dark secret and fight back in a terrifying new way.

name: Black Crab
description: In a devastated future where war has spread across the world, a reluctant soldier sets out across a frozen sea with a highly sensitive cargo. Her mission is desperate, driven by the need to protect her daughter and end the conflict in one risky crossing.

name: One Life
description: In 1930s Czechoslovakia, a British stockbroker encounters refugee families in desperate danger and joins a mission to help Jewish children reach safety before World War II. The story focuses on practical courage, compassion, and the burden of trying to do enough.

name: Mufasa: The Lion King
description: Mufasa, a cub lost and alone, crosses paths with a sympathetic lion connected to royalty, and their meeting sparks an expansive journey. A group of misfits searches for destiny while facing danger, shifting alliances, and life-changing choices along the way.

name: The Burial
description: After a high-stakes business deal collapses, a funeral home owner turns to a charismatic attorney to fight for his family business. Their clash quickly turns into a bond as they uncover corporate wrongdoing and racial injustice in the legal process.

name: Ambulance
description: A decorated veteran, under pressure to pay urgent family medical bills, turns to his adoptive brother for help. Instead, he is pulled toward a massive Los Angeles bank robbery that quickly spirals into a high-stakes escape.

name: Tetris
description: Set in 1988, a video game salesman discovers Tetris and pushes to bring it to the world. His journey turns into a tense tangle of licensing, corruption, and Cold War power struggles behind the Iron Curtain.

name: Parallel Mothers
description: Two unmarried expectant mothers meet in a hospital room as they approach childbirth—one is unrepentant and happy, the other is a teenager, remorseful and frightened. Their parallel experiences unfold with tension, emotion, and a sense of urgency around motherhood and consequences.

name: The Hand of God
description: Set in 1980s Naples, Italy, this coming-of-age story follows an awkward teen searching for where he fits as heartbreak and family life collide. After a freak accident, he’s unexpectedly saved by football legend Diego Maradona, turning a painful moment into something like liberation.

name: Heart of Stone
description: An intelligence operative races to stop a hacker from stealing a powerful weapon tied to an AI system. As the chase intensifies, she and her team try to keep the dangerous tech from falling into the wrong hands.

name: Prey
description: A determined young hunter sets out to protect a Comanche community when a mysterious threat begins stalking the land. What first seems like a familiar danger becomes a deadly encounter with an advanced alien hunter.

name: Outside the Wire
description: In a near-future conflict zone, a drone pilot is sent on a dangerous mission to track down a doomsday threat. Along the way, the pilot must collaborate with an android officer while tensions rise and the situation turns increasingly deadly.

name: Summer of Soul (...Or, When the Revolution Could Not Be Televised)
description: Set during the summer of Woodstock, this documentary follows the Harlem Cultural Festival, where more than 300,000 people gathered to celebrate African American music and culture. Hidden footage from the event sat unseen for over 50 years, until it was rediscovered and finally shared.

name: Love Hard
description: A romance-weary woman travels across the country to surprise an online match for Christmas, only to learn the profile was not what it seemed. Stranded in a festive small-town setup, she agrees to a holiday arrangement that could lead to honesty, awkward laughs, and unexpected connection.

name: Terrifier 2
description: A year after a deadly massacre, Art the Clown is brought back by a sinister force just in time for Halloween. He returns home to torment and hunt down two siblings, turning the night into a fight for survival as the full horror of his evil intent comes into focus.

name: See How They Run
description: In 1950s London’s West End, a movie adaptation of a smash-hit play is derailed when a key crew member is murdered. Two detectives—one world-weary, one eager—dig into a theatrical whodunit beneath the glamor, where the investigation puts them in danger as they sort through suspicious showbiz secrets.

name: Belfast
description: A young boy grows up surrounded by family affection, neighborhood adventures, and first feelings of romance while his hometown becomes increasingly unsafe. As tensions rise around them, his family must weigh staying with the life they know against searching for a safer future elsewhere.

name: Decision to Leave
description: A man dies after a fall from a mountain peak in South Korea, raising questions about whether it was an accident or something more. As a detective investigates and watches a grieving wife, he becomes entangled in a tangled mix of deception, longing, and romantic suspicion.

name: Space Sweepers
description: A debris-collecting crew on The Victory discovers a humanoid robot, Dorothy, tied to a weapon of mass destruction. What begins as a risky business deal soon threatens everyone aboard as their lives hang in the balance.

name: Old Henry
description: A widowed farmer and his son shelter an injured stranger carrying cash, only to draw the attention of armed men claiming to be law officers. As danger closes in on their remote homestead, the farmer must weigh trust, survival, and the violence he hoped to leave behind.

name: My Policeman
description: In the late 1990s, an elderly invalid moves into a home shared by two others, prompting a look back at events from decades earlier. Their passionate relationship unfolds during a time when homosexuality was illegal, and the past returns through personal records and memories.

name: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
description: In a collapsing world, a young survivor is taken from a safe homeland by a ruthless biker horde and thrust into a harsh struggle for power. As they clash with a fortified regime, she faces brutal trials while working toward a way back home.

name: Quiz Lady
description: A tightly wound gameshow superfan and her estranged, reckless sister team up to help cover their mother’s gambling debts. When a beloved dog is taken, they embark on a wild cross-country scramble to raise money—using the only skill they trust: turning one of them into a real gameshow champion.

name: Men
description: After a personal tragedy, a woman retreats alone to the English countryside to heal. Soon, dread builds as someone—or something—from the nearby woods seems to be stalking her, turning quiet isolation into an escalating nightmare filled with her deepest memories and fears.

name: Belle
description: A shy teenager in a rural town escapes into a vast online world through a dazzling virtual persona. As her sudden fame grows, a strange beast-like presence draws her into an emotional search for connection, courage, and healing.

name: Damsel
description: A young woman’s marriage to a charming prince quickly turns into a desperate fight for survival when she’s offered up as a sacrifice to a fire-breathing dragon. Trapped in a deadly pact, she must push through fear and keep moving when rescue never comes.

name: The Fallout
description: In the aftermath of a school tragedy, three teenagers form a close bond as they try to heal. Their journey is messy and deeply personal, unfolding in a world that feels permanently changed, with friendship and support helping them cope.

name: The Whale
description: A reclusive English teacher, living in isolation, tries to reconnect with his estranged teenage daughter and make amends before it’s too late. As attempts at redemption unfold, the story focuses on regret, vulnerability, and the struggle to reach the people you’ve pushed away.

name: Firebird
description: Set at the height of the Cold War, a troubled soldier at a Soviet air base becomes entangled in a forbidden love triangle involving a daring pilot and his female comrade. With surveillance and harsh consequences looming, their bond puts everyone in the triangle at serious risk.

name: The Ministry of Ungentlemanly Warfare
description: During World War II, a British unit of skilled, unconventional soldiers is tasked with striking Nazi forces behind enemy lines. Inspired by a real secret organization, the mission blends sabotage and espionage to disrupt German operations.

name: Blue Beetle
description: Recent college grad Jaime Reyes returns home and finds it has changed. While searching for his purpose, he comes into possession of an ancient alien relic: the Scarab, which thrusts him into a new superhero life and pits him against powerful forces tied to a tech company.

name: Girl in the Basement
description: A teen looks forward to turning 18 and finally getting away from a controlling father, but her birthday is shattered when she’s imprisoned in the basement of their home. Trapped and isolated, she must endure a terrifying situation until help becomes possible.

name: 8-Bit Christmas
description: Set in suburban Chicago in the late 1980s, a young boy launches a determined Christmas quest to get the video game system he wants most. His search drives nonstop effort and setbacks, while the journey emphasizes family and what truly matters during the holidays.

name: Seaspiracy
description: A documentary follows an ocean-life advocate investigating human harm to marine species, from everyday consumption to large-scale industry practices. The journey presents troubling claims about ocean protection, seafood, and the systems that profit from marine exploitation.

name: A Good Person
description: After a fatal accident, a young woman’s life unravels as guilt, grief, and dependency take hold. An unexpected bond with an older man connected to her past offers a difficult path toward healing, forgiveness, and finding reasons to keep going.

name: Watcher
description: After moving to a new city, a young actress becomes convinced she’s being watched by a mysterious stranger across the street. As local reports of violent crime spread and her suspicions grow, she tries to figure out whether the threat is real or just in her head, all while feeling deeply isolated in her new life.

name: Boiling Point
description: During a busy night at a popular London restaurant, a head chef and the staff juggle mounting personal problems, demanding customers, workplace friction, and constant pressure. As mistakes and tensions pile up, the shift becomes an increasingly stressful test of control.

name: Ticket to Paradise
description: A divorced couple is forced to team up when their daughter announces a sudden wedding during a trip to Bali. As they try to prevent her from repeating what they see as their own past mistake, old tensions and awkward comedy follow.

name: The Fabelmans
description: Growing up in post-World War II Arizona, a young aspiring filmmaker becomes obsessed with making movies. As his family life changes, he learns that what he sees on screen can help him face unsettling truths, turning his love of film into a way to understand the world around him.

name: Jujutsu Kaisen 0
description: A nervous student is haunted by a powerful curse tied to his past and is drawn into a school that trains young exorcists. As he learns to face dangerous spirits, a larger threat puts his new path to the test.

name: Lady Chatterley's Lover
description: After a crippling injury leaves her husband unable to perform, Lady Chatterly faces a painful choice between duty and desire. With her husband’s consent, she turns to other means of finding physical fulfillment, setting her on an emotionally charged path.

name: Cha Cha Real Smooth
description: Fresh out of college and unsure what comes next, a young man in New Jersey takes work as a party starter for bar and bat mitzvahs. At one of these events, he connects with a single mom and her teenage daughter, leading to a friendship that tests expectations and grows into something more.

name: About Dry Grasses
description: In a remote Anatolian village, a young art teacher counts the days until a transfer to a bigger city. When troubling accusations involving a student surface, his plans stall, and the pressure of small-town scrutiny pushes him into a spiraling crisis about responsibility, power, and what kind of person he really is.

name: Empire of Light
description: Set in the 1980s on the south coast of England, a struggling duty manager at a seaside cinema forms a relationship with a new employee. As the job and her personal life collide, their bond grows amid the pressures of the cinema and the world around them.

name: Poor Things
description: Brought back to life by an unorthodox scientist, a young woman runs off with a lawyer on a whirlwind adventure across the continents. Free from the prejudices of her times, she grows steadfast in her purpose to stand for equality and liberation.

name: Downton Abbey: A New Era
description: An aristocratic family travels to the south of France to learn more about a newly inherited villa and the history behind it. Back at the grand estate, a Hollywood film production brings excitement, disruption, and fresh complications for everyone upstairs and downstairs.

name: The Swimmers
description: From war-torn Syria to the 2016 Rio Olympics, two young sisters take a dangerous journey to reach safety in Germany. Along the way, their courage and swimming drive them forward as they try to survive the risks of fleeing and start rebuilding their lives.

name: To Leslie
description: A struggling single mother in West Texas gets a sudden windfall and burns through it, leaving her life in pieces. Years later, with few options left, she tries to pull herself back together, face the damage, and earn a second chance.

name: Flow
description: After a great flood forces a solitary cat to flee, it finds refuge on a boat with several displaced animal companions. Together, they must adapt to a transformed world, facing shifting dangers and learning how to survive by cooperating and trusting one another.

name: Do Revenge
description: At a posh private high school, a dethroned queen bee and a new student strike up a secret deal that pulls them into a dangerous cycle of revenge against each other’s enemies. Their unlikely partnership turns personal grievances into escalating schemes with plenty of secrets along the way.

name: Good Luck to You, Leo Grande
description: After her husband’s death, a retired teacher decides to explore pleasure and self-acceptance by booking anonymous meetings in a modest hotel room. She enlists a sex worker who calls himself Leo Grande, and their conversations and encounters unfold across several sessions.

name: Wake Up Dead Man
description: A young priest is sent to assist a charismatic church leader, but unease quickly takes over when a shocking, difficult-to-explain death occurs in the town. With no clear suspect, the local police chief teams up with a renowned detective to untangle a mystery that resists easy answers.

name: The Killer
description: After a job goes wrong, a contract assassin finds himself clashing with the people who hired him and with his own code. While he insists it’s not personal, the fallout turns into an international manhunt that keeps him moving from place to place.

name: The Wonder
description: Haunted by her past, an English nurse travels to a remote Irish village in 1862 to investigate a young girl who is reportedly surviving without eating. Hired not to interfere, she and a nun instead observe as a local community wrestles with whether the situation is faith, science, or something darker.

name: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero
description: The Red Ribbon Army, once defeated in the past, has returned in a new form, fueled by revenge. They unveil Gamma 1 and Gamma 2, unleashing powerful new Androids and setting their sights on Goku and his family.

name: Beavis and Butt-Head Do the Universe
description: In 1998, two lifelong slacker misfits get sent to Space Camp because of a “creative” judge. Their obsession with a docking simulator leads to a trip on a real shuttle, disastrous results, and a jump to the modern era—where they chase love, bungle iPhones, and get hunted by powerful forces.

name: Drive My Car
description: A stage actor and director, still grieving, travels to a theater festival to direct a production of Uncle Vanya in Hiroshima. He meets an introverted young woman assigned to drive his car, and between rides their conversations gradually reveal secrets from the past and heartfelt confessions.

name: The Innocents
description: During summer holidays, four children form a close friendship and discover hidden powers away from the adults. Their playful exploration soon turns dark, as their abilities lead to strange events and an increasingly ominous mystery in forests and playgrounds.

name: Lee
description: Lee follows the true story of a fashion model who becomes a celebrated war correspondent for Vogue during World War II. Moving from the world of high style to the front lines, she insists on documenting the conflict firsthand through her photography as resistance and danger close in.

name: Speak No Evil
description: A family accepts an invitation to spend a weekend with people they barely know after meeting them on holiday. What begins as a friendly getaway slowly turns uneasy as politeness, social pressure, and mounting discomfort make it harder to walk away.

name: Bones and All
description: Abandoned by her father, a young woman sets off on a long journey through America, eventually meeting a disenfranchised drifter. Together they try to build something like love, but their disturbing pasts keep closing in, forcing a final test of whether their bond can last.

name: Broker
description: In financial trouble, two men run a baby box facility where a child left behind is taken on a rainy night for resale. Detectives track their moves to gather crucial evidence as the search turns into a tense crime road chase involving competing plans and escalating scrutiny.

name: A Quiet Place: Day One
description: In New York City, alien creatures hunt by sound, turning everyday life into a terrifying fight for silence. A woman determined to reach one last goal teams up with a man she meets during the chaos, while her cat helps them navigate a collapsing world.

name: Val
description: For more than 40 years, Val Kilmer documents his life and craft through thousands of hours of film and video. The documentary blends home movies and behind-the-scenes material with time spent in major roles, offering a raw, unflinching look at an artist living to extremes, at times hilarious and tender.

name: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
description: An attack led by a vengeful lord disrupts Rohan and sparks a desperate fight for survival. With the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg under threat, its defenders must hold their ground through betrayal, mounting pressure, and a brutal winter.

name: Women Talking
description: In an isolated religious colony, a group of women grapple with how to respond after repeated sexual assaults by the men in their community. As they weigh staying, leaving, or staying silent, they hold an intense conversation about faith, fear, and what comes next for their lives and families.

name: Bandit
description: After escaping a Michigan prison, a charming career criminal takes on a new identity in Canada and sets out to rob dozens of banks and jewellery stores. A rogue task force hunts him as his high-profile crime run continues.

name: Beau Is Afraid
description: After his mother’s death, a mild, anxious man sets off on an epic trip back home to face his fears. As he tries to navigate the journey, his worry and guilt spiral into a surreal, nightmare-like odyssey that tests him at every turn.

name: The Three Musketeers - Part I: D'Artagnan
description: After a brutal attack, a headstrong young man arrives in Paris determined to track down those responsible. His search pulls him into court intrigue and looming conflict, where he joins forces with the King’s musketeers, crosses paths with powerful enemies, and risks everything for loyalty, justice, and a growing romance.

name: 365 Days: This Day
description: Laura and Massimo are back together, but their new beginning is tangled up in family ties and a mysterious newcomer trying to win her trust. As complications pile on, romance and temptation collide in escalating ways.

name: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
description: After a family tragedy, three generations return to an old home where strange memories and supernatural trouble still linger. When a teenager accidentally opens a doorway to the afterlife, the family is pulled into a chaotic mix of ghosts, grief, and darkly funny mayhem.

name: Rebel Moon - Part One: A Child of Fire
description: When a ruthless power threatens a quiet farming village on a distant moon, a mysterious outsider steps in as the community’s best hope. With looming danger and little time to prepare, the village looks for allies to defend what they have.

name: Asteroid City
description: Set in an American desert town around 1955, a Junior Stargazer/Space Cadet convention runs on a tightly planned itinerary until major world-changing events throw everything off course. What begins as a ceremonial gathering turns into a disruptive, unusual situation that reshapes the day for everyone involved.

name: Thirteen Lives
description: Based on a true rescue, a Thai soccer team and their coach set out into a cave when heavy rain traps them inside flooded tunnels. As odds shrink in tight, dark spaces, a world-class team of divers and helpers face extreme danger to reach them, turning the search into only the first challenge.

name: Metal Lords
description: Two teenage misfits chase glory by forming a metal band and aiming for Battle of the Bands. Their journey blends teen awkwardness, growing respect between bandmates, and a hunger to be heard and admired.

name: We Have a Ghost
description: After a young family moves into a new home, they discover a haunting presence tied to a ghost. What begins as a social-media sensation turns into a high-stakes mystery as the hunt for answers brings them into conflict with the CIA.

name: Woman of the Hour
description: An aspiring actress crosses paths with a prolific serial killer during a casting for a classic dating show in ’70s LA. As the on-screen interaction unfolds, the story also revisits the danger he represents through other time periods.

name: Mad God
description: A silent figure known as The Assassin moves through a nightmare underworld of ruined cities and twisted creatures. Guided only by its own perilous path, it searches through brutal, surreal landscapes toward a central tower said to be at the source of the horror.

name: She Said
description: New York Times reporters dig into a major Hollywood sexual assault story, pursuing statements, verifying details, and pushing for voices to be heard. Their reporting helps break decades of silence and becomes a defining moment for the #MeToo movement.

name: Look Both Ways
description: On the night of her college graduation, a life-changing pregnancy test splits a young woman into two parallel realities. Each path tests what she thought she wanted in love and career, and shows how different choices can shape the future.

name: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
description: Decades before the rise of Panem’s feared ruler, a young student from a fallen family gets a chance to reshape his future. Assigned to mentor the female tribute from District 12, he is pulled into the dangerous world of the Games, ambition, and shifting loyalties.

name: Till
description: Based on a true story, this follows a mother’s relentless pursuit of justice after her 14-year-old son is lynched in 1955 while visiting relatives in Mississippi. Fueled by grief and determination, she confronts a racially divided system and refuses to let the case disappear.

name: Reptile
description: A brutal killing pulls a weary detective into a murky investigation where every lead raises new doubts. As suspects, personal ties, and hidden motives pile up, the case begins to challenge his sense of trust and the life he thought he understood.

name: Luckiest Girl Alive
description: A successful woman in New York City sees her carefully built life disrupted when she’s drawn back into an unresolved past. As old memories resurface, she’s pushed to face a dark truth that threatens to unravel everything she’s worked for.

name: Argylle
description: A reclusive author’s fictional spy stories start reflecting real covert actions, dragging her out of quiet life and into escalating danger. With her cat and a traveling companion who has allergies, she races across the world to stay ahead of killers as the line between her novels and reality starts to blur.

name: Marcel the Shell with Shoes On
description: A tiny shell lives a cozy but lonely life with an elderly relative and a pet ball of lint after being separated from a larger community. When a filmmaker notices this hidden world, online attention brings both new risks and a chance to search for family.

name: The Iron Claw
description: The Iron Claw tells the true story of the closely bonded Von Erich brothers as they chase glory in the high-pressure world of professional wrestling in the early 1980s. Set against a demanding family influence, their ambition is tested by a heartbreaking mix of triumph and tragedy.

name: Murder Mystery 2
description: After starting their own detective agency, a couple of amateur investigators get pulled into a high-stakes kidnapping tied to a lavish wedding. As they chase clues and question suspects, the case turns into a nonstop adventure full of chaos, comedy, and mystery.

name: Oppenheimer
description: During World War II, a physicist is appointed to work on the top-secret atomic bomb project. The film follows years of scientific development through the bomb’s testing and the lasting consequences that follow.

name: You People
description: A new couple faces pressure from their families as modern love collides with cultural expectations and generational differences. What starts as a hopeful relationship turns into a series of awkward, funny, and tense moments as everyone tries to make sense of each other.

name: Dune: Part Two
description: Paul joins forces with Chani and the Fremen as he pursues revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Torn between personal love and the fate of the known universe, Paul tries to prevent a catastrophic future he can foresee.

name: Red One
description: After Santa Claus is kidnapped, the North Pole’s Head of Security must team up with a notorious tracker for a fast, globe-trotting rescue mission. Packed with holiday lore and nonstop action, the search for Santa pushes them to race against time and save Christmas.

name: Boy Kills World
description: After his family is killed, a deaf-mute young man flees into the jungle and undergoes brutal training under a mysterious mentor. With his imagination and inner narration pushing him forward, he returns to a violent, media-driven society as a one-man weapon set on revenge.

name: Caddo Lake
description: When an 8-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes on Caddo Lake, a chain of past deaths and disappearances begins to connect. The mystery reshapes a fractured family’s history, pulling multiple timelines and losses into one unsettling web.

name: The Son
description: A successful lawyer tries to build a new life with a wife and baby, but he takes on responsibility for his teenage son after concerns surface about the boy’s increasingly concerning behavior. As the home adjusts, tension grows and the family dynamic is tested.

name: Senior Year
description: A 37-year-old woman wakes up after 22 years in a coma and heads back to the high school where she was once a popular cheerleader. She tries to finish her senior year and chase a prom dream, even as the world—and the school—have moved on.

name: God's Crooked Lines
description: A private investigator enters a psychiatric hospital by pretending to be mentally ill, hoping to gather evidence around a death with unclear circumstances. Inside, her investigation becomes tense as she tries to understand what really happened.

name: 14 Peaks: Nothing Is Impossible
description: In 2019, Nepalese mountain climber Nirmal “Nims” Purja sets out to climb the world’s fourteen highest summits in less than seven months as part of “Project Possible 14/7.” The film follows his team as they push past naysayers and test the limits of human endurance.

name: South Park: Post COVID
description: After surviving a long pandemic, the kids wake up to a future where nothing feels the same. The story follows how life changed for them, and how their relationships are tested in a post-pandemic world.

name: Nyad
description: At 60, swimmer Diana Nyad sets out to swim from Cuba to Florida across more than 100 miles of open ocean. Driven by a lifelong dream, she tackles repeated attempts and setbacks while building support with her best friend and coach.

name: Boston Strangler
description: In 1960s Boston, two women reporters push past newsroom resistance and public pressure to investigate a series of terrifying murders. As they connect patterns others overlook, the pursuit of truth puts their work, families, and safety under strain.

name: Missing
description: When her mother disappears on a vacation in Colombia with her new boyfriend, June’s search is blocked by international red tape. Far away in Los Angeles, she turns to technology to track clues, but her online investigation keeps uncovering bigger questions and personal secrets she never knew.

name: Tár
description: Tár follows a celebrated conductor as she begins rehearsals for a career-defining symphony, with the consequences of her earlier choices surfacing in the present. As the process unfolds, power, ambition, and reputation become inseparable from the work itself.

name: One Piece Film: Red
description: A new adventure starts for Luffy and his crew when a mysterious pop superstar reveals herself and unleashes a misguided plan aimed at world peace. As her idea spreads, the group finds themselves pulled into escalating conflict and high-stakes choices.

name: Violent Night
description: On Christmas Eve, a crew of mercenaries storms a wealthy family compound and takes everyone hostage. Their plans get disrupted when Santa Claus is already on the grounds, turning the standoff into an over-the-top holiday fight for survival.

name: Ghosted
description: Cole thinks he has found a perfect first romance, but things quickly get complicated when he learns the woman he is falling for has a dangerous secret life. The two are pulled into a globe-spanning mission full of chases, danger, and unlikely teamwork.

name: Strays
description: After being left behind on the mean city streets, a loyal dog is sure the abandonment wasn’t personal. When he teams up with a fast-talking stray who embraces freedom, he starts to question his owner’s behavior and see the relationship for what it really is.

name: The Holdovers
description: Over Christmas break at a New England prep school, a grumpy teacher is forced to stay behind to supervise a few students who can’t go home. As the campus empties out, an unexpected bond forms between the reluctant chaperone, a troubled student, and a grieving staff member, turning an isolated holiday into something quietly meaningful.

name: Barbarian
description: A young woman arriving late for a job interview finds her Airbnb double-booked and an unsettling man already there. Despite growing unease and warning signs, she stays the night, and the situation spirals into mounting dread and escalating danger around the property.

name: Nefarious
description: On the day a convicted killer is set to be executed, a psychiatrist is brought in to decide whether the prisoner is mentally fit. The evaluation turns into a tense battle of belief, fear, and unsettling claims about evil.

name: Fire of Love
description: Fire of Love follows a doomed love triangle between intrepid French scientists and the volcanoes they study. Their work drives them ever closer to nature’s most explosive, deadly forces as they try to observe and understand what could come next.

name: Wolfs
description: Hired to clean up a high-profile mess, a fixer soon finds his night unraveling when he’s forced to team up with an unexpected counterpart. As they scramble through chaotic setbacks, the work turns into a fast-moving test of cooperation and nerve.

name: May December
description: Twenty years after a tabloid romance once captivated the nation, a long-married couple is thrown off balance when an actress arrives to research a film about their past. As she spends time with them, pressure builds and uncomfortable truths start resurfacing.

name: The Wandering Earth II
description: Humans build massive engines to move Earth toward a new home, but the journey through space is dangerously unpredictable. When crises strike, young trainees are pulled into a high-stakes race against time to protect the planet and its future.

name: The Quiet Girl
description: A quiet, neglected girl is sent to live with distant relatives in rural Ireland for the summer. In their gentle care she begins to open up and feel seen, but the calm household’s promise of honesty is tested when she senses something important being kept unspoken.

name: Suzume
description: After losing her mother, Suzume encounters a mysterious young man and is drawn into a crisis she accidentally helps set in motion. As dangerous calamities spread, she joins a journey to seal the threats and protect Japan from further harm.

name: Incantation
description: A mother is forced to protect her child after a family becomes caught in a terrifying curse tied to spiritual beliefs. As fear spreads, she must face unsettling forces and the consequences of past choices while trying to keep her family safe.

name: Rescued by Ruby
description: Chasing his dream to join an elite K-9 unit, a state trooper partners with a clever but mischievous shelter pup, Ruby. Their journey blends training and teamwork with a warm, uplifting story based on true events.

name: The Out-Laws
description: A straight-laced bank manager is weeks away from his wedding when his bank gets hit by notorious bandits during wedding week. Believing the danger is tied to the strange new in-laws who just arrived, he gets pulled into increasingly chaotic trouble.

name: Venom: The Last Dance
description: A fugitive human-and-alien duo is hunted from every side as threats from Earth and beyond close in. With danger escalating, their bond is tested by a fight that may force them into an impossible choice.

name: The Tinder Swindler
description: Posing as a wealthy, jet-setting diamond mogul, an Israeli conman targets people through online dating and lures them into parting with millions. With some victims now determined to fight back, the story follows how the scam unfolded and what happens afterward.

name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - Tsuzumi Mansion Arc
description: A demon-slaying trainee heads south-southeast and meets a fearful fellow survivor from a brutal selection test. Asked to help keep the newcomer focused, the pair are drawn into a dangerous mission, presented as a recap with some new footage and special end credits.

name: Downfall: The Case Against Boeing
description: Investigators dig into how Boeing’s alleged focus on profit over safety could have played a role in two devastating crashes occurring within months of each other. The documentary examines decisions, responses, and the aftermath as scrutiny grows.

name: Close
description: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, forming a close friendship. When they return to school, their bond becomes the subject of speculation, and the pressure that follows starts to strain what once felt effortless.

name: The Wonderful Story of Henry Sugar
description: A wealthy man becomes fascinated by a strange skill that lets someone see without using their eyes. Hoping to use it for gambling, he sets out to learn the technique and begins a curious journey filled with quirky storytelling and unusual charm.

name: When Evil Lurks
description: Brothers Pedro and Jimi discover a demonic infection hidden in a nearby farmhouse and try to get the victim out of their land. When they don’t follow proper exorcism rites, their efforts backfire and an epidemic of possessions spreads through their rural community.

name: Weird: The Al Yankovic Story
description: This biopic plays fast and loose with every facet of “Weird Al” Yankovic’s life, from early breakthroughs to a whirlwind of fame. It leans into absurd celebrity romance and a wildly depraved lifestyle for a truly unbelievable ride.

name: Red, White & Royal Blue
description: A public clash between a president’s son and a British prince creates a diplomatic headache, so they are pushed into pretending to get along. As their staged truce continues, old friction gives way to unexpected warmth in a glossy, high-profile romantic comedy.

name: Navalny
description: This documentary follows a political activist after a deadly poisoning attempt and shows his difficult recovery. As he pieces together what happened, he uncovers unsettling facts and chooses to go back home despite the risks.

name: Insidious: The Red Door
description: Trying to finally put their demons to rest, a father and his college-aged son push into The Further again through a mysterious red door. As repressed memories resurface, the pair face unsettling new terrors tied to their family’s past.

name: Saltburn
description: At Oxford University, a struggling student becomes drawn to a charming aristocratic peer and is invited to spend a transformative summer at the peer’s eccentric family estate. What begins as acceptance and excitement gradually gives way to tension and unsettling discoveries as the household’s darker dynamics come into focus.

name: The Call of the Wild
description: A big-hearted dog is uprooted from a comfortable life and pushed into the rugged Yukon during the Gold Rush of the 1890s. As he joins a mail delivery sled team—and later leads—he faces hard work and shifting fortunes, all while searching for where he truly belongs.

name: Mortal Kombat II
description: Earthrealm’s champions face a brutal, no-holds-barred fight as they clash against each other while trying to stop a dark ruler from threatening the world’s existence. The stakes are high, and the battle is fueled by fierce rivalries and relentless action.

name: The Substance
description: A fading celebrity turns to a black-market drug that briefly creates a younger, better version of herself. The two versions must follow strict rules about time and coexistence, but the pursuit of relevance and perfection leads to escalating tension and increasingly disturbing consequences.

name: Madame Web
description: After a life-changing accident, a New York paramedic begins seeing glimpses of the future. As she tries to make sense of her new ability, she becomes connected to three young women who may be tied to a dangerous threat in the present.

name: Troll
description: When an explosion in the Norwegian mountains awakens an ancient troll, officials turn to a fearless paleontologist to contain the disaster. As the creature’s deadly rampage spreads, the mission becomes a race against mounting chaos and destruction.

name: Kandahar
description: After his mission is exposed, an undercover CIA operative is trapped in hostile territory in Afghanistan and must push toward an extraction point in Kandahar. With his Afghan translator, he battles elite enemy forces and foreign spies closing in on them, racing through danger to survive long enough to get out.

name: Father Stu
description: A longtime boxer’s life takes a drastic turn after an injury, pushing him to Los Angeles in search of money and attention. Working through relationships and faith, he’s led toward the idea of becoming a Catholic priest, even as a life-changing accident raises difficult questions about purpose and helping others.

name: The Boys in the Boat
description: A University of Washington men’s rowing team rises from tough circumstances to reach the 1936 Berlin Olympics, stunning more heavily favored opponents along the way. Guided by determined coaches and shaped by hard training, their journey blends pressure, teamwork, and perseverance on and off the water.

name: They Cloned Tyrone
description: Eerie happenings disrupt a tightly knit inner-city neighborhood, pulling together an unlikely trio as they dig for answers. Their investigation leads to a disturbing government-style conspiracy operating right beneath their community, with unsettling experiments at the center of it.

name: Bob Marley: One Love
description: Jamaican singer-songwriter Bob Marley faces adversity as his music and message help shape his rise to fame. The story follows his personal journey alongside the political and cultural backdrop that informs his work, as his songs become a driving force for unity and hope.

name: Migration
description: After a migrating duck family lands on their pond and shares stories of far-off places, the Mallard family sets off on a road trip. Traveling from New England to New York City, they ultimately head toward tropical Jamaica, navigating big-city challenges along the way.

name: The Beekeeper
description: After a kindhearted person is devastated by an online scam, a quiet beekeeper is pulled back into a violent past and launches a relentless revenge mission. As he tears through the people behind the fraud, the trail leads to a secretive organization and a much bigger web of power than anyone expected.

name: Here
description: Here is a multi-generational story set in one New Jersey home, where love, loss, struggle, hope, and legacy unfold over time among couples and families. It looks at how a single place holds memories, showing life changing across generations as people come and go.

name: The Last Kingdom: Seven Kings Must Die
description: After a king’s death, a divided land faces new rivalries, old loyalties, and the threat of war. A seasoned warrior and his companions are drawn into a dangerous struggle that could shape the future of England.

name: Joy Ride
description: A business trip to Asia derails for a corporate lawyer, who pulls in her irreverent childhood best friend for help. As their group expands with friends and family, the chaos turns into an over-the-top adventure about bonding, belonging, and discovering self-acceptance.

name: Deadstream
description: A disgraced internet personality tries to win back followers by livestreaming himself alone in a haunted house. When something vengeful is accidentally unleashed, the stream turns into a frantic fight to survive the night.

name: Pearl
description: Trapped on an isolated family farm, Pearl cares for her ailing father under the strict watch of her overbearing mother. Yearning for the glamorous life she’s seen in movies, Pearl’s ambitions, desires, and frustrations collide in a slow descent filled with tension and disturbing impulses.

name: Anatomy of a Fall
description: A woman is suspected of her husband’s death, and the case pulls apart the truth of their relationship as the investigation unfolds. Their blind son becomes the key witness, caught between loyalty, doubt, and the search for what really happened.

name: Moonage Daydream
description: Moonage Daydream is a cinematic journey through David Bowie’s creative and musical life, built from never-before-seen footage and extensive archival material. Rather than a traditional biography, it blends performances and reflections to capture his artistic world and shifting ideas over time.

name: Young Woman and the Sea
description: Based on a true story, this follows a determined swimmer who became the first woman to successfully cross the English Channel. With the help of her sister and supportive trainers, she pushes through adversity and the hostility of a patriarchal society, rising through Olympic-level training before attempting the demanding 21-mile swim.

name: The Fall Guy
description: Fresh off an almost career-ending accident, a stunt performer is pulled into tracking down a missing movie star. Along the way, he uncovers a conspiracy while juggling his day job and trying to rebuild the romance in his life.

name: Dumb Money
description: A financial influencer puts life savings into GameStop stock, sparking viral attention and a movement of everyday investors. As the share price surges, both regular people and powerful institutions face major consequences when the conflict escalates and pushes everyone’s lives into upheaval.

name: Argentina, 1985
description: In the 1980s, a determined group of lawyers take on leaders of Argentina’s violent military dictatorship, pursuing justice despite intimidation and mounting pressure. Their work becomes a high-stakes legal fight against the clock, as they race to bring crucial testimony to light.

name: Holy Spider
description: A journalist travels to the Iranian holy city of Mashhad to investigate serial killings of sex workers by a self-described “Spider Killer.” As the investigation unfolds, the story turns into a grim look at religion, society, and the struggle to hold civic justice accountable.

name: Bottoms
description: Unpopular best friends PJ and Josie start a high school self-defense club to meet other girls and have more romantic fun. But their plan spirals as popular students get involved, and the situation turns into a chaotic, over-the-top mess of “self-defense” gone wrong.

name: Sick of Myself
description: A woman finds herself increasingly overshadowed by her boyfriend’s sudden rise in Oslo’s art scene. Feeling entitled to her own spotlight, she devises a ruthless plan to reclaim attention within the cultural elite.

name: Leila's Brothers
description: A 40-year-old woman has spent her life holding together a family of parents and four brothers as constant arguments and heavy debts mount under economic pressure. With everyone struggling to get by, she decides to take matters into her own hands with a risky plan.

name: Horizon: An American Saga - Chapter 1
description: In 1859, families push into the Old West, settling across Wyoming to Kansas as new communities form and tensions rise. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy is forced to flee with a prostitute and a young boy after a deadly showdown.

name: The Equalizer 3
description: A lone vigilante finds unexpected peace in a small town in Southern Italy, until local crime bosses tighten their grip on the people he’s come to care about. When intimidation turns deadly, he steps back into action to protect the community and confront the mafia head-on.

name: Purple Hearts
description: An aspiring musician enters a marriage of convenience with a soon-to-deploy Marine to meet his need to avoid trouble. But as the relationship deepens, a tragedy makes their fake arrangement feel all too real.

name: Land of Bad
description: After a special ops rescue mission goes wrong, a drone pilot has 48 hours to help fix the chaos. With no weapons and limited communication, the drone’s oversight becomes the team’s lifeline as the situation turns into a full-scale battle once they’re discovered.

name: Cocaine Bear
description: An odd mix of cops, criminals, tourists, and teens cross paths in a Georgia forest after a black bear gets into a stash of cocaine. What follows is a fast, absurd survival story built around chaotic encounters, dark humor, and bursts of bloody mayhem.

name: The Nun II
description: In 1950s France, a priest is murdered under disturbing circumstances, and a young nun is sent to look into a growing trail of strange deaths. As the investigation leads through churches and a school, she finds herself facing a relentless evil that won’t stay buried.

name: Aftersun
description: Sophie looks back on a holiday she took with her father twenty years earlier, weaving warm memories through camcorder footage. As she tries to understand who he really was, the recollections bring both shared joy and lingering unease into focus.

name: Godzilla X Kong: The New Empire
description: After an explosive showdown, Godzilla and Kong must work together again when a colossal, previously hidden threat surfaces within the world. Their survival is put to the test as the danger escalates across our planet and into the unknown.

name: Elemental
description: In a bustling city where fire, water, land, and air residents live side by side, two very different young people are brought together by an unexpected problem. As they spend time together, they begin to question old assumptions about family, belonging, and what they want from life.

name: Blink Twice
description: A young service worker is swept into a billionaire’s glamorous inner circle and invited to a private-island getaway filled with luxury, parties, and nonstop indulgence. As the days blur together, the paradise starts to feel off, and she grows convinced something dangerous is hiding beneath the island’s polished surface.

name: Pain Hustlers
description: After losing her job, a single mom gets pulled into a lucrative prescription-drug scheme. What begins as a financial lifeline quickly becomes dangerous, as the push for wealth brings tragic consequences for others and puts her own life in jeopardy.

name: Jerry & Marge Go Large
description: Retiree Jerry discovers a mathematical loophole in the Massachusetts lottery, and with his wife’s help, they win $27 million. They then use the money to revive their struggling Michigan town, turning a clever discovery into a community-minded comeback.

name: What Is a Woman?
description: A provocative documentary uses interviews, travel, and humor to question modern ideas about gender and definitions of womanhood. It aims to challenge prevailing views by pressing for clear answers from academics, activists, and everyday people, sparking debate along the way.

name: Knox Goes Away
description: A contract killer learns he has a fast-moving form of dementia and is given a chance to redeem himself by saving his estranged adult son. He races both the police closing in and the worsening limits of his own mind, trying to finish one last, high-stakes mission.

name: Air
description: A struggling sportswear company’s basketball division takes a bold gamble on a rising young athlete, hoping one risky partnership can change its future. What follows is a brisk, feel-good look at ambition, persuasion, and the birth of a cultural sports brand.

name: Fall
description: Best friends Becky and Hunter chase adrenaline by climbing to the top of a remote, abandoned radio tower—only to find themselves stranded with no way down. With vertigo-inducing heights, harsh conditions, and dwindling supplies, their climbing skills are pushed to the limit as they fight to survive.

name: Fallen Leaves
description: In modern-day Helsinki, two lonely, working-class souls searching for love cross paths by chance at a karaoke bar. Their connection is repeatedly derailed by mishaps and setbacks, including lost contact details, mistaken directions, alcoholism, and the unexpected comfort of a charming stray dog.

name: Old Dads
description: A cranky middle-aged dad and his two best friends struggle as fatherhood meets a rapidly changing world led by millennial CEOs and demanding preschool administrators. After their business life gets disrupted, their frustrations spill into their families, pushing them into an off-kilter quest around Los Angeles.

name: Late Night with the Devil
description: Late Night with the Devil takes place during a live late-night talk show broadcast in 1977, when an Halloween special begins to spiral into something far beyond rehearsals. As the event unfolds, the tension mounts and the program’s attempt at control turns disastrous, pushing horror into viewers’ living rooms.

name: The Wrath of Becky
description: Two years after escaping a violent attack, a 16-year-old tries to start over with an older caregiver and their beloved dog. When a violent group breaks into their home and takes the dog, she has to tap back into her past skills to protect herself and the people she cares about.

name: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
description: After an ancient artifact triggers an evil force, the Ghostbusters—new and old—have to team up to protect their home. With a looming threat tied to a second Ice Age, they race to stop what’s coming and save the world.

name: A Different Man
description: An aspiring actor gets a radical procedure that changes his appearance and seems to offer a fresh start. But the new life quickly becomes complicated as he struggles with identity, self-worth, and how others see him.

name: Back to Black
description: A gifted young singer rises from local London stages to global attention while trying to stay true to her own voice. As fame grows, the film follows her music, family ties, public pressure, and a turbulent romance behind a landmark album.

name: Fly Me to the Moon
description: A marketing specialist is brought in to overhaul NASA’s public image, stirring chaos for a launch director already under pressure to get a man to the moon. With politics demanding results, a backup plan is set in motion as the countdown truly begins.

name: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
description: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails reunite as they face a powerful new adversary: Shadow, whose abilities push their team beyond what they’ve handled before. With their strength outmatched, they set out to form an unlikely alliance to stop Shadow and protect the planet.

name: Nimona
description: In a futuristic kingdom of knights and strict traditions, a disgraced warrior is blamed for a terrible crime and must go on the run. Help comes from a chaotic shape-shifting teen, turning the search for truth into a funny, emotional adventure about fear, difference, and acceptance.

name: Wicked Little Letters
description: In a 1920s English seaside town, residents are shocked by anonymous letters packed with outrageous insults and profanity. When a blunt newcomer is blamed, several local women begin to question the accusation and look into what is really going on.

name: Past Lives
description: After decades apart, two childhood friends reunite in New York for one weekend that forces them to re-examine destiny, love, and the decisions that shaped their lives. Spanning multiple chapters of their journey, the reunion becomes a chance to ask what might have been—and what ultimately is.

name: Talk to Me
description: A group of friends discovers a strange way to contact spirits using an embalmed hand, and what starts as a risky party thrill quickly turns into something far more dangerous. As the group keeps pushing the limits, fear, grief, and peer pressure begin to spiral together.

name: Hit Man
description: A mild-mannered professor moonlights as a fake hit man for police stings, and his steady routine turns chaotic when he gets pulled into new cases. Falling for a potential client sparks a fast-moving chain of complications.

name: Kung Fu Panda 4
description: Po prepares to become the spiritual leader of his Valley of Peace, but he also has to find someone new to take his place as Dragon Warrior. He trains a new kung fu practitioner while facing the Chameleon, who conjures villains from the past.

name: Wallace & Gromit: Vengeance Most Fowl
description: Concerned that Wallace is leaning too hard on his inventions, Gromit watches as a “smart” garden gnome seems to take on a mind of its own. When a vengeful force from the past turns the situation sinister, Gromit must step in to stop the chaos and protect Wallace—possibly forever changing what he dares to build.

name: Saw X
description: Between the first two films, a desperate man travels to Mexico seeking an experimental procedure for his cancer, only to learn the clinic is running a scam. Turning the tables, he sets out to punish the con artists through his notorious, vicious traps and devious games.

name: The Bikeriders
description: A young woman falls for a member of a Midwestern motorcycle club, and their relationship unfolds as the group changes over time. What starts as a tight-knit community of riders begins to face darker pressures, forcing him to choose between love and loyalty.

name: Jeanne du Barry
description: Jeanne Bécu, born to poverty in 1743, climbs her way through the Court of Louis XV to become his last official mistress. Along the way, court protocol, rivalries, and shifting alliances shape her rise and struggle for recognition.

name: BlackBerry
description: Two mismatched entrepreneurs join forces to build and market a groundbreaking smartphone that quickly becomes a worldwide hit. The story follows its fast rise and the pressures of staying competitive, leading to a dramatic, unforgettable collapse.

name: Carry-On
description: On Christmas Eve, an airport security officer rushes to stop a mysterious traveler from getting a dangerous item onto a crowded flight. As pressure rises inside the terminal and beyond, he must outsmart the threat before departure.

name: Hundreds of Beavers
description: In the 19th century, a hard-drinking cider seller loses everything and is forced to survive a brutal winter in the wilderness. To rebuild a life and prove himself, he throws himself into fur trapping, learning new skills through escalating, cartoonish battles against an overwhelming number of beavers.

name: Influencer
description: After being left to travel alone in Thailand, a social media influencer tries to keep her trip entertaining for her followers. She meets a charming traveler who shows her a wilder way to live, but their connection quickly turns unsettling and dangerous.

name: Ricky Stanicky
description: After a childhood prank goes wrong, three friends invent a fake person to take the blame. Years later, they still use the lie to dodge responsibility, until suspicious loved ones demand to meet him and the friends scramble to make their imaginary alibi seem real.

name: MaXXXine
description: In 1980s Hollywood, an adult film star tries to cross into mainstream acting after landing a promising opportunity. As a killer targets young women around the city, her rising career is threatened by danger, suspicion, and a past she wants buried.

name: The Idea of You
description: A 40-year-old single mom unexpectedly connects with the lead singer of a worldwide-famous boy band, and their romance quickly turns into a whirlwind. But life in the constant spotlight brings intense pressure and outside judgment, forcing them to navigate what love means when fame and media attention won’t let up.

name: In the Land of Saints and Sinners
description: In a remote Irish village during a time of unrest, a weary man trying to leave his violent past behind is pulled into a dangerous clash that threatens the community. As old sins resurface and loyalties are tested, he’s forced to decide how far he’ll go to protect others—and whether redemption is still possible.

name: The Family Plan
description: A car salesman who seems like the perfect family man has a dangerous past as an assassin. When that history resurfaces, he drags his unsuspecting family into an action-packed road trip that mixes comedy, tension, and heartfelt family moments as they head for Las Vegas.

name: Kinds of Kindness
description: Kinds of Kindness is told as three linked fables about control and what people do in the name of kindness. A man tries to take charge of his life under pressure, a policeman suspects his returned wife is not the same, and a woman pursues a special someone tied to a spiritual path.

name: A Haunting in Venice
description: A retired detective is drawn from quiet exile in Venice to attend a Halloween séance inside a decaying palazzo rumored to be haunted. When a guest is killed, a night of eerie claims, hidden motives, and uneasy suspicion turns into a murder investigation.

name: A Real Pain
description: Two mismatched cousins reunite for a trip through Poland to honor their late grandmother and reconnect with family history. As the tour unfolds, their clashing personalities stir up old tensions, mixing awkward humor with reflections on grief, heritage, and how people carry pain.

name: Jesus Revolution
