description: In the 1970s, a restless teenager searches for meaning until he connects with a charismatic street preacher and a local pastor. Together, they help open a struggling church to an unexpected revival that spreads beyond their community.

name: Snack Shack
description: Two inseparable best friends try to turn their summer into something bigger by running a pool snack shack, especially after their earlier money-making plan fails. Their hopes get complicated when they meet a cool lifeguard with her own big ideas, putting their friendship and future plans at risk.

name: Twisters
description: A former storm chaser is pulled back into the field as a dangerous storm season escalates across Oklahoma. Competing teams race toward violent tornadoes, testing new ideas, personal courage, and their ability to help communities in the path of disaster.

name: Maria
description: Maria follows Maria Callas in 1970s Paris during her final days, as she wrestles with identity and what remains of her voice. The story blends her present with reflections from her life, while tension grows around her struggles to separate what feels real from what her mind creates.

name: Bird Box: Barcelona
description: After a mysterious force wipes out much of the world, a survivor must make his way through a ruined Barcelona. As he struggles to stay alive, he forms uneasy alliances with other survivors and faces growing danger from both the city and a more sinister threat.

name: Stutz
description: In candid conversations, an actor sits down with a psychiatrist to explore his early life and his distinctive approach to therapy. The film blends personal storytelling with a visual, easy-to-follow therapy model meant to help viewers understand and practice key tools.

name: Nickel Boys
description: Nickel Boys chronicles the intense friendship between two young Black teenagers trapped in a brutal reform school in Florida. Together, they face unfair treatment and violence while trying to hold onto hope through shared days, fear, and survival.

name: Dream Scenario
description: A mild-mannered family man becomes an overnight curiosity when strangers everywhere start seeing him in their dreams. As the attention grows stranger and darker, he struggles with sudden fame, public judgment, and the way a bizarre phenomenon disrupts his ordinary life.

name: Godzilla Minus One
description: In postwar Japan, Godzilla brings fresh devastation to a landscape already scarred by war. With little help available, survivors band together and confront despair as they fight an unrelenting horror threatening their future.

name: The Last Stop in Yuma County
description: At an isolated Arizona rest stop with a delayed resupply, a traveling young knife salesman is pulled into a brutal hostage situation. Two stranded bank robbers arrive with a stolen fortune and will do anything to protect it, turning the wait into a high-stakes fight for survival.

name: Rye Lane
description: Two twenty-somethings, both hurting after bad break-ups, meet by chance and spend an eventful day in South London. As they swap stories and get pulled into spontaneous detours, they help each other process their past relationships and consider what romance could look like next.

name: Monster
description: A concerned single mother presses for answers after a school outburst involving her son, only to find that suspicions and rumors keep shifting as different people interpret the same events. What begins as one set of worries grows into mounting turmoil, with each viewpoint adding new pressure and doubt.

name: It's What's Inside
description: A pre-wedding reunion between college friends takes a dark turn when an unexpected guest arrives with a mysterious suitcase. What starts as a strange game quickly spirals into a psychological nightmare for the group, forcing them to confront hidden motives and unsettling consequences.

name: Theater Camp
description: When the founder of a scrappy upstate New York theater camp falls into a coma, the camp’s future suddenly looks uncertain. An inexperienced new leader and a group of eccentric arts-loving staffers must work together to keep their beloved creative haven alive.

name: Memoir of a Snail
description: After being forcibly separated from her twin brother, a melancholic misfit grows up carrying loss, everyday disappointments, and a stubborn sense of humor. Told like a personal memoir, she searches for confidence in herself while her life gets increasingly cluttered with misfortune.

name: Thelma
description: After a 93-year-old woman is tricked by a phone scammer posing as a family member, she refuses to let it go. Determined to reclaim what was taken, she sets off on a risky cross-city mission, pushing past ageist assumptions and family worries while discovering what independence really means.

name: Thanksgiving
description: After a violent Black Friday riot ends in tragedy, a mysterious Thanksgiving-inspired killer terrorizes Plymouth, Massachusetts, targeting residents one by one. What starts as revenge-driven mayhem escalates into a larger holiday plan with residents caught in a deadly countdown.

name: Hunger
description: A talented street-food cook pushes past her limits after accepting an invitation to train under an infamous, ruthless high-end chef. As she moves between two very different food worlds, her ambition collides with harsh standards and a widening divide between rich and poor.

name: Jules
description: A flying saucer crashes in a suburban backyard, throwing an elderly man with memory troubles into the orbit of a frightened, non-speaking alien. As worry and skepticism circle outside, he and a small circle form a gentle bond, sharing intimate conversations while trying to keep the situation under wraps.

name: Kill Boksoon
description: At work, a renowned assassin handles lethal jobs with ease. At home, she’s a single mom to a teenage daughter, and balancing both worlds proves far harder than the missions.

name: The Deepest Breath
description: Bonded by a shared love of freediving, a record-setting champion and a safety diver push to make history together. As they chase a remarkable deep-water feat, they’re willing to risk everything to reach their goal.

name: Red Rooms
description: A high-profile serial killer case goes to trial, and a true-crime obsessive becomes fixated on every detail. As her fascination takes over her reality, she digs deeper for what she believes is the missing piece, blurring the line between legal drama and a darker online world.

name: Leo
description: Jaded over-the-hill lizard Leo has spent decades in the same Florida classroom, sharing life with his turtle pal and watching students come and go. When he learns he has limited time left, he tries to escape—only to get swept into the anxious classroom problems, including a startlingly strict substitute.

name: My Old Ass
description: On her 18th birthday, a free-spirited teen’s psychedelic mushroom trip brings her face-to-face with a wisecracking older version of herself. As the warnings start to land, she must reconsider how she treats family, love, and the choices that shape her summer.

name: Longlegs
description: An FBI recruit is pulled into an unsolved case involving an elusive serial killer. As the investigation grows more complex and occult clues surface, she uncovers a personal connection to the killer and races to prevent more families from being targeted.

name: Queer
description: Set in 1950s Mexico City, an American expat in his late forties lives largely alone until a younger student’s arrival draws him toward connection. Their unsettled bond pulls them from city life into a journey in search of answers, where longing and obsession take on a strange, dreamlike edge.

name: In the Grey
description: A covert team of elite operatives work from the shadows until a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune. Tasked with retrieving it through an impossible heist, they juggle strategy, deception, and survival as the plan spirals into relentless danger.

name: Robot Dreams
description: In 1980s New York, a lonely dog buys a robot companion and the two quickly become close friends. A beach trip changes everything, leaving them separated and each wondering if they will ever be together again as they try to carry on.

name: Take Care of Maya
description: When a 10-year-old is taken to the ER, her parents face a catastrophic turn as they’re wrongfully accused of child abuse. What starts as a medical visit quickly spirals into a relentless struggle involving the healthcare and legal systems, leaving the family trapped in a nightmare.

name: We Live in Time
description: An up-and-coming chef and a recent divorcée are brought together by a chance encounter, and their connection keeps unfolding in a decade-spanning romance. Told across time, it blends humor, tension, and heartfelt emotion as their shared life grows and strains.

name: Chaos Walking
description: In a harsh future on an unexplored planet, all inner thoughts are heard and seen by everyone, creating constant pressure and confusion. Two unlikely companions team up to survive dangerous territory and try to escape the reality around them.

name: Omniscient Reader: The Prophecy
description: An ordinary young man finishes an obscure web novel—then watches its apocalypse become real. Armed with knowledge no one else has, he teams up with other survivors to navigate deadly, game-like trials, face terrifying creatures, and try to change the outcome by shaping a new ending.

name: My Fault
description: A proud teen must leave her city, boyfriend, and friends to move into her wealthy stepfather’s mansion, where her flashy new life clashes with her independence. There, she meets her new stepbrother, and their intense personalities spark an immediate pull and nonstop tension in a world full of luxury.

name: Heretic
description: Two young missionaries knock on the wrong door and meet a charming but diabolical man who turns their visit into a dangerous game. As they’re drawn deeper into his cat-and-mouse traps, their faith is tested in a tense, psychological struggle to survive.

name: The Watchers
description: A young artist stranded in an immaculate forest in western Ireland finds shelter, then discovers she can’t leave as mysterious creatures stalk the area each night. After she joins three strangers, they must follow dangerous routines to survive until they can find a way out.

name: Paradise
description: In a near future, lifespan can be transferred like a financial transaction, exposing who benefits and who pays. When crushing debt forces a wife to sell decades of her life to a powerful company, her husband becomes desperate to undo what was taken, turning his own job into a dangerous turning point.

name: Abigail
description: A group of criminals kidnap a teenage ballet dancer to demand a huge ransom from her powerful father. But as the plan collapses, they realize she isn’t an ordinary girl—and they end up trapped in a locked, creepy mansion with no easy way out.

name: Surongo
description: A marriage begins to unravel when two partners want very different things, pushing one to leave home for work abroad while the other looks for comfort elsewhere. As money pressures and betrayal mount, the situation spirals into desperate choices that test love, trust, and the possibility of starting over.

name: Sirat
description: A father and his son arrive at a rave in Morocco searching for their missing daughter and sister, who vanished months earlier. When they lose their first lead, they choose to follow a group of ravers into the desert, chasing one last party and hoping to find her, even as danger closes in.

name: Nowhere
description: A young pregnant woman escapes a war-torn country by hiding inside a maritime container on a cargo ship. After a violent storm leaves her lost at sea and trapped, she must give birth while isolated and then fight to survive against the elements.

name: Death of a Unicorn
description: A father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn on the way to a weekend retreat at their boss’s home. The billionaire plans to exploit the creature’s miraculous healing properties, dragging the trip into a darkly weird mess of greed, fantasy, and danger.

name: Nirvanna the Band the Show the Movie
description: After a scheme to land a gig at a famous venue goes off the rails, two friends find themselves accidentally thrown back to 2008. Stuck in the past, they scramble to make the most of the situation while their friendship and big ambitions are tested in chaotic, fast-moving ways.

name: His Three Daughters
description: Three estranged sisters reunite in a cramped New York City apartment to care for their ailing father during his final days in home hospice care. As they wait and try to manage day-to-day responsibilities, old wounds and unresolved disagreements resurface.

name: No One Will Save You
description: A lonely woman is thrown into a tense home invasion when extraterrestrials threaten her and push her to confront what she’s been avoiding. With her future at risk, she fights back while being forced to face painful memories from her past.

name: Dìdi (弟弟)
description: Set in 2008 during the last month of summer before high school, a Taiwanese American boy tries to figure out who he wants to be. He struggles with skateboarding, flirting, and learning what family love looks like when he still feels misunderstood.

name: Oficina do Diabo
description: In a competition set in Hell, a seasoned devil coaches an apprentice on how to exploit everyday weaknesses and steer people off course. Their lessons unfold as they shadow a troubled person standing at a crossroads, weighing faith, temptation, and the consequences of small choices.

name: Taylor Swift: The Eras Tour
description: A large-scale concert film brings a record-breaking tour to the screen, moving through distinct musical eras with dozens of songs, changing styles, elaborate staging, dancers, costumes, and crowd energy. It aims to recreate the feel of a major live pop event for viewers at home or in theaters.

name: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
description: With her life falling apart, a therapist tries to manage her child’s mysterious illness, her husband’s prolonged absence, and a missing person, all while dealing with an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist. As setbacks pile up, her world grows tense and unstable, forcing her to cope on her own amid escalating stress.

name: American Fiction
description: A novelist fed up with how the entertainment industry profits from “Black” stories writes a new book under a pen name, hoping to expose hypocrisy. Instead, his prank-like act turns into major success, forcing him to wrestle with his choices while a separate family struggle adds pressure.

name: The Promised Land
description: In 1755 Denmark, a determined captain takes on the challenge of conquering a barren heath to build a colony for the king, trading his efforts for status. He faces relentless pressure from a powerful local lord, and his goal hangs in the balance—will it bring honor and wealth, or cost him his life?

name: Poison
description: When a poisonous snake slithers onto an Englishman’s stomach in India, his associate and a doctor race to save him. The tense effort builds as they try to keep things under control while time runs out.

name: A Million Miles Away
description: A biographical journey follows an engineer and former NASA astronaut who rose from a migrant farm worker background to reach space. It traces his path through a life shaped by family, hard work, and repeated attempts to pursue his dream.

name: Sing Sing
description: In a prison, an incarcerated man who maintains his innocence finds meaning through a theater group with others serving time. As rehearsals bring different personalities together, the story focuses on resilience, dignity, and the way creative expression can help people feel human again.

name: Flora and Son
description: Single mom Flora struggles to manage her rebellious teenage son, pushing her toward unexpected help—from a beat-up acoustic guitar to an LA musician she meets through online lessons. As their connections grow, music becomes the bridge that helps a frayed Dublin family find harmony and common ground.

name: Kneecap
description: In West Belfast, a schoolteacher finds their world tangled with a rebellious Irish-language rap trio, and their music quickly becomes more than entertainment. Driven by anger, humor, and a fierce push to save their mother tongue, they spark attention from political figures and authorities alike.

name: Troll 2
description: A dangerous new troll tears through the homeland of a close-knit group determined to stop it. Nora and her allies team up for an increasingly perilous mission as devastation spreads and their plan is put to the test.

name: The Apprentice
description: In 1970s New York, a wealthy young striver looking to build a bigger name is drawn into the orbit of a ruthless legal power broker. Their uneasy mentor-student bond becomes a study of ambition, influence, and the moral compromises that can come with chasing success at any cost.

name: I Was a Stranger
description: A mother and child flee a war-torn city, setting off a tense journey that brings several strangers into each other’s lives. As conflict, fear, and survival collide, the story focuses on difficult choices, compassion, and the human cost of crisis.

name: The Teachers' Lounge
description: When a teacher at a German middle school suspects theft connected to the teachers’ lounge, she tries to get clarity while staying true to her ideals. But as her actions meet resistance from the school system, the situation grows more toxic and threatens to unravel relationships across the community.

name: Black Phone 2
description: Four years after a prior defeat, a young man struggles with trauma while his younger sister starts receiving unsettling dream calls and eerie visions tied to a winter camp. Determined to understand what’s happening, the siblings investigate together and face a dangerous threat that feels stronger and more personal than ever.

name: Send Help
description: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island after a plane crash, forcing them to survive while clashing over old grievances. As their situation turns into a battle of wills, survival becomes as much about strategy and manipulation as it is about getting rescued.

name: Sorry, Baby
description: Agnes feels stuck in a quiet New England life that used to be shared. After something terrible, she struggles to return to normal while her close friend moves away and prepares for a baby, stirring up complicated feelings over the years.

name: September 5
description: Set during the 1972 Munich Olympics, an American sports broadcasting crew is pulled into covering a hostage crisis involving Israeli athletes. As reports come in amid mounting danger, the team tries to keep its live coverage going while verifying information under extreme pressure.

name: Will & Harper
description: After a longtime friend comes out as a trans woman, the pair take a 16-day cross-country road trip to reconnect and support each other as they navigate a new reality. Along the way, they revisit past places and face differing reactions from people across the country.

name: Nuremberg
description: In postwar Germany, an American psychiatrist is tasked with determining whether Nazi prisoners are fit to stand trial for war crimes, setting off a tense clash of intellect and ethics. As the tribunal preparations unfold, the evaluation becomes a deeply personal battle of values with a prominent Nazi leader.

name: The Secret Agent
description: Set in Brazil in 1977, this tense drama follows a man on the run who travels to Recife during Carnival, hoping to find safety and reunite with his son. But the city soon feels far less secure than he expected, and danger closes in from all sides.

name: The Greatest Night in Pop
description: In January 1985, major music stars come together to record the charity song “We Are the World.” This documentary looks behind the scenes of how the idea took shape and how the session unfolded from start to finish.

name: Springsteen: Deliver Me from Nowhere
description: A rising musician faces the weight of sudden success while trying to make honest, personal work away from the spotlight. As expectations grow, old pain and self-doubt shape a quieter, more inward creative journey.

name: Fountain of Youth
description: A treasure-hunting mastermind gathers a team for a high-stakes hunt for the Fountain of Youth. To stay ahead of escalating threats, he leans on the one person he needs most: his estranged sister.

name: The Mandalorian and Grogu
description: With the evil Empire gone, scattered warlords still threaten the galaxy. The young New Republic seeks help to protect what was won, enlisting a legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter and his young apprentice to take on dangerous missions.

name: No Other Land
description: No Other Land is a documentary about the destruction of Masafer Yatta in the occupied West Bank by Israeli soldiers, and the partnership that grows between a Palestinian activist and an Israeli journalist. As they document daily life and setbacks, they focus on trying to prevent the demolition of their community and preserve homes and livelihoods.

name: Deep Cover
description: A struggling improv teacher gets an unexpected chance when a police operation recruits the class for undercover work. With two students along for the ride, the trio bluffs their way into London’s criminal world, where quick thinking and staying in character become the only way through.

name: Friendship
description: Suburban dad Craig becomes intensely taken with his charismatic new neighbor, Austin, and tries to force their budding connection into something bigger. As his efforts to make a real adult bond spiral, it threatens to unravel both of their lives in increasingly uncomfortable ways.

name: Exhuma
description: A team of paranormal experts traces a supernatural affliction to a wealthy family’s ancestral gravesite and relocates the remains. Soon, they discover consequences for anyone who disturbs the wrong grave, as the situation escalates beyond their expectations.

name: Moana 2
description: After an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana sets off with Maui and a new crew to explore far seas across Oceania. The voyage leads into dangerous, long-lost waters where they must face threats and search for a mystery tied to her people’s history.

name: Roofman
description: A struggling former soldier turns to an unusual pattern of robberies, then finds an even stranger hiding place after escaping prison. While trying to stay unnoticed and plan a way forward, an unexpected connection with a single parent makes his secret life harder to maintain.

name: Small Things Like These
description: In 1980s Ireland, a hardworking coal merchant trying to provide for his family stumbles on troubling treatment at a local convent. As memories of his own upbringing resurface, he must weigh personal risk against doing what’s right in a town shaped by fear, tradition, and silence.

name: Twinless
description: Two men grieving the loss of their twin brothers meet through a support group and form a friendship that grows fast. As they lean on each other, long-hidden secrets surface and put their bond—and their ability to heal—under serious strain.

name: Dracula
description: A grieving nobleman turns against heaven after losing his beloved and is cursed with eternal life. Across centuries, he becomes a feared vampire figure driven by longing, rage, and the hope of reclaiming a love that death took away.

name: Raja Shivaji
description: Set during a turbulent period in Indian history, this film follows a young leader’s rise as he challenges powerful empires and works to build a new kingdom founded on the idea of self-rule. It frames his journey as both personal and political.

name: The Tank
description: In 2025’s The Tank, a German tank crew is sent on a lethal mission behind enemy lines to rescue a missing officer from a top-secret bunker. As they push through deadly no-man’s land, the danger escalates into a psychological journey shaped by fear and inner demons.

name: Sleeping Dogs
description: A retired detective with a failing memory is pulled back into a murder case he can’t recall, with an execution date looming. As he retraces old interviews and evidence, he uncovers a trail of hidden connections, betrayals, and unsettling clues that suggest the past may be more personal than he ever realized.

name: Ready or Not: Here I Come
description: Moments after surviving a brutal attack, Grace learns she’s reached the next level of a nightmarish game. This time, her estranged sister joins her as rival wealthy families hunt them for control of a powerful council and the right to rule.

name: Trap
description: A father takes his teenage daughter to a packed pop concert, only to notice something is off as security tightens and the crowd grows uneasy. As the night unfolds, they realize the event is part of something far darker than a show, turning the arena into a tense, high-stakes situation.

name: The Ugly Stepsister
description: In a fairy-tale kingdom where beauty decides everything, a scrappy young woman tries to outshine her stepsister and win the prince’s attention. Driven by desperation and social pressure, she pursues increasingly extreme measures, turning the classic romance into a brutal, body-horror fairy tale.

name: Pillion
description: A shy young man falls hard for a mysterious biker and is pulled into an intense BDSM relationship that tests his limits, independence, and sense of self. As the connection deepens, he begins to question what he wants and how much control he is willing to give up.

name: Christy
description: After growing up in small-town West Virginia, a determined fighter earns a chance in boxing with help from a trainer and manager who also becomes personally tied to her life. As her career rises, her toughest challenges play out outside the ring, involving family, identity, and a dangerous relationship.

name: A House of Dynamite
description: A tense crisis erupts when an unidentified missile is launched toward the United States, forcing officials and military teams into a frantic search for answers. As time runs short, the story focuses on uncertainty, pressure, and the weight of impossible decisions.

name: Anora
description: A young sex worker from Brooklyn gets pulled into a sudden Cinderella-style romance after meeting and impulsively marrying the son of an oligarch. When word reaches Russia, pressure builds as his parents push to have the marriage annulled, turning her dream into a chaotic fight to keep her place.

name: They Will Kill You
description: A woman takes a housekeeping job in a strange New York high-rise and soon realizes the building’s residents are tied to years of disappearances. As the danger closes in, the story shifts into a fast, violent fight for survival with darkly comic touches.

name: The Count of Monte Cristo
description: A young sailor is framed for a crime he didn’t commit and torn from his future on the day of his wedding. After years of brutal imprisonment and an unlikely education, he escapes, gains immense wealth, and returns under a new persona to pursue carefully planned revenge against those who betrayed him.

name: The Last Viking
description: After serving fourteen years for robbery, a man is released and reconnects with his brother, who holds the key to where the stolen money is hidden—though he can’t remember where. Their search pulls them into painful self-confrontation as they travel to recover the loot.

name: Under Paris
description: To prevent an international bloodbath in Paris, a grieving marine scientist is pulled back into danger when a giant shark is discovered in the Seine. Racing against disbelief and time, she teams up with local authorities to stop the threat before it escalates.

name: GOAT
description: A small goat with big dreams gets a rare chance to join the pros and play roarball, a fast, co-ed, full-contact sport featuring fierce animals. As he tries to earn his place among the team, the stakes rise on and off the court through pressure, ambition, and the push to work together.

name: Blue Moon
description: On March 31, 1943, a famous lyricist spends the night at a Broadway hangout while the opening of a major new musical brings bittersweet celebration and rising tension. As the party builds, he wrestles with doubt, strained relationships, and complicated feelings—talking to the people around him as the evening unfolds.

name: The Sheep Detectives
description: A quiet farm routine is upended by a mysterious incident, prompting a flock of sheep to follow clues and investigate the humans around them. With a love of detective stories as inspiration, they set out to prove they can solve a case too.

name: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
description: A young daughter vanishes into the desert without a trace. Years later, she is returned home, but the reunion quickly turns into a frightening, unraveling ordeal for the family.

name: How to Train Your Dragon
description: On the rugged isle of Berk, Vikings and dragons have been bitter enemies for generations. When a young outcast befriends a feared Night Fury, their bond challenges the island’s traditions and sparks a new way of thinking about dragons.

name: F1: The Movie
description: A retired racing great is pulled back into Formula 1 to help a struggling team and guide a talented rookie. As pressure builds on and off the track, the film follows a high-speed comeback story about teamwork, rivalry, and one last shot at success.

name: Strange Darling
description: Nothing is what it seems when a chance, one-night encounter turns into a brutal path of violence. As the story unfolds in a twisted, non-linear way, it spirals from flirtation into a relentless murder spree.

name: "Wuthering Heights"
description: In 18th-century England, a love story takes root between a resilient outsider and a woman from a wealthy family as fortunes and social status shift around them. When a wealthy bachelor enters their world, the bond is tested by ambition, longing, and complicated choices.

name: I Swear
description: After developing Tourette Syndrome as a teenager, a young person faces misunderstanding, bullying, and isolation while trying to build an independent adult life. With compassion from others, the story explores resilience, acceptance, and finding purpose through helping a wider community understand.

name: Attack on Titan: The Last Attack
description: A colossal compilation movie brings together two final episodes from the franchise’s first theatrical release. After heading beyond the walls, a determined leader sets a horrifying plan in motion, and a mixed group of former friends and foes races to stop it before the world’s fate is decided.

name: Terrifier 3
description: Years after a brutal holiday massacre, two survivors try to rebuild their lives and find peace as Christmas approaches. Their fragile sense of safety is shattered when a sadistic killer clown returns, turning festive cheer into a new nightmare.

name: I'm Still Here
description: During Brazil’s military dictatorship, a family’s stable life is shattered when a sudden act of state violence leaves them searching for answers. As fear and uncertainty grow, a mother must protect her children and rebuild their future.

name: Obsession
description: After breaking a mysterious “One Wish Willow” to win his crush’s heart, a hopeless romantic gets exactly what he asked for. But the fulfillment quickly turns sinister, revealing that some desires come with a dark, troubling cost.

name: Babygirl
description: A powerful executive risks her carefully built career and family life when she starts an affair with a much younger intern. What begins as a forbidden attraction turns into a tense drama about desire, control, and the cost of crossing personal and professional lines.

name: Tuner
description: A piano tuner’s precise ear and careful routine suddenly open a new, risky path when he realizes his skills can be used to crack safes. His quiet life is thrown into upheaval as his talent draws attention from a dangerous world.

name: Better Man
description: Better Man follows Robbie Williams from childhood to becoming the youngest member of Take That, then charting his rise as a record-breaking solo artist. Along the way, it confronts the pressures that come with fame and success, including the personal challenges that can follow.

name: Conclave
description: After a pope dies unexpectedly, a senior church official must oversee the secret election of a successor inside the Vatican. As powerful leaders gather behind closed doors, ambition, doubt, and hidden agendas turn an ancient ritual into a tense struggle for the church’s future.

name: Speak No Evil
description: An American family is invited to a peaceful weekend at a British countryside estate by the charming family they met while traveling. What starts like a dream holiday quickly turns into a tense psychological nightmare as uncomfortable dynamics spiral out of control.

name: The Platform 2
description: After a mysterious leader imposes his law inside a brutal vertical prison, a newcomer confronts a troubling food distribution system. With resistance and uncertainty spreading, the arrival pushes back against the rules that decide who gets what.

name: Apocalypse Z: The Beginning of the End
description: A rabies-like virus spreads worldwide, turning people into aggressive creatures. One man tries to stay safe at home with his cat, then must venture out by land and by sea to find food as dangers multiply around every turn.

name: Smile 2
description: About to embark on a new world tour, a global pop sensation starts facing increasingly terrifying, inexplicable events. With the pressure of fame mounting, she’s pushed to confront her dark past before everything spirals out of control.

name: Predator: Killer of Killers
description: In three different eras, legendary warriors take on a new, terrifying hunter who turns each matchup into a deadly ordeal. What begins as separate confrontations builds toward a larger threat that demands survival at any cost.

name: Juror #2
description: While serving as a juror on a high-profile murder trial, a family man faces a painful moral dilemma as new evidence and personal implications start to affect how he views the case. As deliberations intensify, he must decide whether to help sway the verdict toward conviction or freedom.

name: Is God Is
description: Two sisters set out on a high-stakes revenge quest, driven by a painful family past. As they search for answers and accountability, their journey pushes them toward extreme choices and escalating danger.

name: Jay Kelly
description: A famous actor sets off on a reflective trip, trying to make sense of who he is beyond the spotlight. With his longtime manager at his side, he confronts old choices, strained relationships, and the weight of success, searching for a more grounded way forward.

name: Hamnet
description: Hamnet tells a sweeping love-and-loss story inspired by the real-life circumstances behind Shakespeare’s timeless masterpiece, Hamlet. Set in a family’s life as they balance devotion, distance, and grief, the film explores how tragedy can shape what comes next through writing and memory.

name: AKA
description: A steely special ops operative goes undercover to infiltrate a crime syndicate. During the mission, he unexpectedly forms a bond with the boss’s young son, forcing him to balance duty and morality as tensions escalate.

name: The Six Triple Eight
description: In World War II, an all-Black, all-women US Army battalion is tasked with clearing a massive backlog of undelivered mail for American soldiers. They must complete the work in just a few months, despite being doubted, facing bigotry and sexism, and working under constant wartime pressure.

name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu No Yaiba - To the Swordsmith Village
description: This theatrical special stitches together key episodes from the series, mixing recap material with some new footage and special end credits. A demon-slaying team heads into a lively district on a dangerous mission, where they face powerful foes and set the stage for the next chapter.

name: Normal
description: An interim sheriff arrives in the snowbound town of Normal, MN, expecting routine trouble. Instead, when he helps a bank-robbing couple caught in a deadly situation, he finds signs of an international criminal conspiracy behind the town’s quiet surface.

name: The Great Flood
description: A massive flood traps a researcher and her young child, turning a desperate bid for safety into a race against time. As the waters rise and hard choices pile up, a sudden call to a critical mission forces them to weigh survival against a much bigger responsibility.

name: Rental Family
description: An American actor in Tokyo hits a rough patch until he joins a Japanese “rental family” agency, filling in stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in clients’ lives, the work starts to feel less like acting and more like real connection, raising uncomfortable questions along the way.

name: Vini Jr.
description: This documentary follows a young Brazilian soccer talent as he rises from his early days to global stardom with a top European club. Alongside highlight moments and personal reflections, it also confronts the racism he faces in stadiums, turning his story into both a sports journey and a social statement.

name: Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice
description: Two gangsters and the woman they both care about struggle to survive a brutal night, where loyalty is tested at every turn. Just when things seem impossible, a time machine turns the danger up even further.

name: Sentimental Value
description: Two sisters reconnect with their estranged father when he returns with plans for a personal comeback film and asks one of them to star. After she refuses, he casts a rising Hollywood actor instead, stirring old resentments and forcing the family to face unresolved grief, ambition, and the cost of turning real life into art.

name: Primate
description: College students head to a family home in Hawaii for a vacation that includes a pet chimp. After the animal is bitten by a rabid creature and becomes violent, the group must scramble to survive the dangerous outbreak.

name: Swapped
description: After a sudden body swap, a small forest animal and a proud bird must work together to navigate unfamiliar lives and a chaotic journey through the wild. Their unlikely partnership turns survival into a fast-moving adventure.

name: Good Fortune
description: A well-meaning but clumsy angel meddles in the lives of a struggling gig worker and a wealthy capitalist. What starts as guidance turns into an uncomfortable life change that tests what money can—or can’t—fix, as the angel scrambles to set things right with consent and real-world consequences.

name: Iron Lung
description: In a future where the stars and planets have vanished, survivors send a desperate expedition to a barren moon with an ocean of blood. A prisoner is sealed inside a cramped, windowless submarine and ordered to explore the depths for vital resources, guided only by distant instructions as the vessel strains and reality begins to blur.

name: The Perfect Neighbor
description: Police bodycam footage reveals how a long-running neighborhood dispute turned fatal in this documentary exploring fear, prejudice, and Stand Your Ground laws. The film uses on-scene recordings to show the escalation from repeated tensions to a deadly outcome.

name: The Devil Wears Prada 2
description: As a powerful fashion magazine leader approaches retirement, she reconnects with a former assistant while facing a sharp new rivalry from someone once in her inner circle. The story sets up a high-stakes clash of ambition, loyalty, and career reinvention.

name: Ne Zha 2
description: After a catastrophic event leaves two heroes’ bodies destroyed, they’re granted a fragile second chance at life. Rising tensions between dragon clans and celestial forces push them into perilous trials that test their bond, challenge who they are, and shape the fate of both mortals and immortals.

name: The Shadow's Edge
description: Macau Police pulls a tracking expert out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves. With high-tech surveillance in the mix, the hunt becomes a tense cat-and-mouse pursuit that tests both experience and new methods.

name: Brick
description: After a fight leaves a couple on the brink, a mysterious black wall suddenly seals off their apartment building overnight. With no clear way out, they must link up with wary neighbors and navigate the trapped space to survive, as uncertainty around what caused it starts to mount.

name: Palestine 36
description: Set in 1936, the film follows one young man torn between rural life and the pull of Jerusalem as villages rise against British colonial rule. Against a backdrop of new immigration and a growing, unified uprising, everyday hopes are overtaken by escalating conflict that pushes the region toward confrontation.

name: Death on the Nile
description: Belgian sleuth Hercule Poirot travels to Egypt aboard a glamorous river steamer for a vacation that quickly turns into a deadly mystery. When a picture-perfect honeymoon is disrupted by murder, Poirot must investigate the passengers and uncover who is responsible.

name: Sisu: Road to Revenge
description: Returning to the house where his family was brutally murdered during the war, a determined survivor tears it apart and tries to move it to safety in their honor. But when the commander responsible comes back to finish what he started, a relentless cross-country chase follows.

name: EPiC: Elvis Presley in Concert
description: EPiC: Elvis Presley in Concert pairs long-lost Las Vegas residency footage with rare archive material from tours and personal archives, plus recordings of Elvis sharing his own perspective. The film weaves these sources into an energetic concert experience, showing the preparation, performance, and personality behind the legendary stage presence.

name: It Was Just an Accident
description: A mechanic’s life takes a sharp turn when he thinks he has found the man who abused him in prison years earlier. As he searches for proof, he draws in other former prisoners, and the situation becomes a tense mix of fear, doubt, and dark humor around revenge and justice.

name: My Mom Jayne
description: Through deeply personal interviews and a look at photographs, letters, and belongings, a daughter reassembles a portrait of her mother, a celebrated yet complex Hollywood figure. As the family reflects, the story also explores what it means to grow up with missing pieces of the past.

name: The Voice of Hind Rajab
description: On January 29, 2024, Red Crescent volunteers receive an emergency call from a five-year-old girl trapped in a car under fire in Gaza, pleading for rescue. While they try to keep her on the line, they do everything they can to arrange an ambulance and help her, guided only by her voice.

name: undertone
description: A paranormal podcast host starts receiving terrifying voice recordings she never asked for. As she and her co-host investigate, the content turns from unsettling entertainment into something far more sinister that threatens her home life and peace of mind.

name: Two Distant Strangers
description: A man races to get home to his dog, but he’s trapped in a time loop. Each reset forces him to relive a deadly encounter with a cop, testing his resolve as the situation repeats.

name: All Too Well: The Short Film
description: Set to an extended version of a well-known song, this short film follows a couple as their romance blooms into an intense, autumn-tinged whirlwind. As the relationship deepens, cracks begin to show, revealing emotional imbalance, conflict, and the lingering memories that remain after love starts to unravel.

name: A Family Affair
description: A lonely assistant to a high-maintenance celebrity gets pulled into his personal life when he starts developing feelings for her mom. As romance sparks unexpectedly, the family dynamic is tested and the relationship affects everyone involved.

name: The Order
description: A veteran FBI agent is sent to a quiet part of the Pacific Northwest after a wave of violent robberies. As the investigation deepens, he uncovers a dangerous white supremacist group building support through crime and fear, forcing a tense hunt for the people behind it.

name: Unlocked
description: A woman’s life is upended when a dangerous man gains access to her lost phone and uses it to track her every move. As her normal routine starts to collapse, the danger grows with each step.

name: The House
description: Across different eras, a poor family, an anxious developer, and a fed-up landlady find themselves drawn into the same mysterious house. As their lives collide with odd rules and creeping dread, the dark humor keeps tightening the atmosphere around what “home” can cost.

name: Entergalactic
description: An ambitious artist tries to juggle rising success and a growing romance after moving into a dream apartment in Manhattan. As sparks fly with his next-door neighbor, the story explores love, dreams, and everyday life in a city built for reinvention.

name: Saturday Night
description: The story unfolds during the 90 minutes before the first broadcast of Saturday Night Live, following the tense rush to get sketches, rehearsals, and the set ready. As the show inches toward air, the behind-the-scenes world turns increasingly chaotic, with confidence wavering at every turn.

name: Moxie
description: Inspired by her mom’s rebellious past and a confident new friend, a shy 16-year-old publishes an anonymous zine that calls out sexism at her high school. Her bold stand sparks conversations and challenges how people treat girls and take their voices seriously.

name: Luther: The Fallen Sun
description: A disgraced detective escapes prison to hunt a sadistic serial killer who is terrorizing London and taunting the authorities. As the case spirals into a high-stakes chase, he pushes past the rules to stop a threat that keeps growing.

name: Munich: The Edge of War
description: Set during the tense 1938 Munich Conference, former friends now working for opposing governments find themselves pulled into reluctant espionage. As Europe edges closer to war, they race to uncover a Nazi secret and influence the diplomatic outcome.

name: Help
description: A woman in Liverpool finds her calling at a care home, using a special talent to connect with residents. In March 2020, the coronavirus pandemic upends daily life, testing her compassion and the care system around her.

name: South Park: Joining the Panderverse
description: Cartman’s disturbing dreams suggest that the world he knows may be coming to an end, sparking chaos and fear. At the same time, the adults grapple with their own choices as AI begins to upend daily life in unexpected ways.

name: John Candy: I Like Me
description: Friends and family share memories of an iconic comedian’s life through never-before-seen archival footage, imagery, and interviews. The documentary looks back at how he became a beloved presence on screen and beyond, while also reflecting on who he was to the people closest to him.

name: Kyle Larson vs. The Double
description: Two-time NASCAR champion Kyle Larson attempts the notorious “Double,” racing the Indianapolis 500 and the Coca-Cola 600 on the same day. As weather, exhaustion, and risk pile up, 1,100 miles becomes a rare inside look at one of motorsports’ toughest challenges.

name: Godzilla vs. Kong
description: When monsters roam the planet, humanity’s struggle for survival forces two legendary Titans into direct conflict. As their paths converge, the stage is set for a massive showdown between the most powerful forces of nature.

name: Greyhound
description: A first-time naval captain must guide an Allied convoy across a dangerous stretch of the Atlantic during World War II. With air protection days away, the crew faces relentless submarine threats while trying to keep thousands of soldiers and supplies moving toward the front.

name: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3
description: A ragtag team of space heroes faces a dangerous mission to protect the universe and save one of their own. As old grief and team tensions linger, their bond is tested in a high-stakes adventure about loyalty, loss, and found family.

name: Jungle Cruise
description: A doctor and her witty companion hire a wisecracking skipper to guide them down the Amazon in search of an ancient tree tied to healing and medicine. Their expedition turns into a fast, peril-filled adventure as rivals and dangers close in along the way.

name: Mulan
description: In this live-action retelling, a brave young woman takes her father’s place in the army by pretending to be a man. As she faces harsh training and dangerous battles, she must hide her true identity while learning to trust her own strength and honor her family.

name: Sonic the Hedgehog
description: Powered with incredible speed, Sonic settles on Earth—until an evil genius targets him after Sonic draws unwanted attention. What follows is a global showdown as super-villain schemes and super-sonic action collide, forcing Sonic to stop the plan before his unique power is used for world domination.

name: Dolittle
description: A reclusive animal doctor is drawn back into the world when a royal illness threatens his home and the people who depend on him. With a lively group of talking animals, he sets off on a colorful sea adventure in search of a rare cure.

name: Underwater
description: After an earthquake devastates an underwater station, six researchers must push through two miles of perilous, unexplored ocean floor to reach safety. Their desperate journey becomes a race against time as they struggle with the dangers of deep water and what else may be out there.

name: Morbius
description: A doctor with a rare blood disorder makes a dangerous breakthrough in his search for a cure. What seems to help at first carries a terrifying cost that may be worse than the illness itself, forcing him to confront what he’s unleashed.

name: Benedetta
description: In a 17th-century convent, a young nun’s intense religious visions elevate her status and draw powerful attention from the Church. As she forms a forbidden relationship with a newcomer, faith, desire, and suspicion collide, putting the convent and its leaders under mounting pressure.

name: Synchronic
description: Two paramedics in New Orleans are drawn into a string of horrifying deaths tied to a designer drug. As bizarre, otherworldly effects ripple through their lives, their work and choices begin to unravel in frightening ways.

name: Stowaway
description: A small crew on a mission to Mars must deal with a sudden, unplanned passenger who throws everything off course. As the clock keeps ticking, difficult choices threaten the survival of everyone on board.

name: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
description: A pair of paranormal investigators are drawn into a disturbing case involving a child, a violent crime, and a claim of demonic possession. As the investigation expands beyond a single haunted home, they face a darker mystery tied to faith, fear, and the unseen.

name: The Suicide Squad
description: A group of imprisoned supervillains is recruited for a secret, dangerous mission on a remote, hostile island. Dropped into chaos with little room for trust or control, the team must navigate enemies, shady orders, and their own wild impulses.

name: The Bob's Burgers Movie
description: A ruptured water main opens a huge sinkhole in front of a family burger restaurant, blocking the entrance and derailing their summer plans. As the parents work to keep the business afloat, the kids chase a mystery that might help save their home.

name: The Way Back
description: A former basketball star, struggling with addiction and grief after major personal losses, takes a coaching job at his old high school. As he tries to guide a troubled team, he also faces his own painful past and looks for a chance to rebuild his life.

name: First Cow
description: In the 1820s Oregon Territory, a quiet traveler with a gift for cooking befriends a newcomer chasing a better life. Together they start selling sweets, but their plan depends on secretly borrowing milk from a powerful landowner’s prized cow, putting their fragile opportunity at risk.

name: Bill & Ted Face the Music
description: Still chasing their rock-and-roll legacy, two middle-aged musicians are warned by a visitor from the future that only their song can save life as they know it. With trouble closing in and time running short, they embark on a new adventure through time to try to set their destiny in motion.

name: Honest Thief
description: A bank robber tries to turn himself in to start living honestly after falling in love and wanting a normal life. But when he discovers troubling corruption among federal agents, he has to fight back to clear his name.

name: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
description: In a decaying Midwestern town abandoned by a powerful pharmaceutical company, something dangerous begins spreading after years of secrets underground. As night falls, a small group of survivors faces infected residents, strange creatures, and a desperate fight to understand what went wrong.

name: Uncharted
description: A clever young thief joins a seasoned treasure hunter on a risky globe-trotting search for a legendary lost fortune. As they follow old clues and dodge dangerous rivals, the journey also connects to a personal mystery from the past.

name: All Quiet on the Western Front
description: Eager young recruits volunteer for the German army, fueled by romantic dreams of heroism. Once they reach the Western Front, their expectations collapse into the soul-destroying horror of World War I.

name: Emma.
description: In 1800s England, a wealthy young woman enjoys arranging romances for people around her, convinced she knows what is best. Her well-meant meddling stirs up misunderstandings, social tension, and comic embarrassment as she begins to face her own flaws.

name: The Brutalist
description: A gifted architect escapes post-war Europe and tries to rebuild his life and career in America. As a wealthy patron offers a major opportunity, the promise of a fresh start becomes tangled with ambition, dependence, family strain, and the harsh realities of belonging.

name: Over the Moon
description: Fueled by memories of her mother, a young girl builds a rocket and sets out for the moon to prove the existence of a legendary moon goddess. Along the way, her journey blends wonder, myth, and heartfelt determination.

name: Possessor
description: An elite corporate assassin uses brain-implant technology to take control of other people’s bodies and carry out high-stakes terminations. As she dives deeper into a new assignment, she finds herself trapped inside a mind that threatens to swallow her control.

name: Kraven the Hunter
description: Kraven Kravinoff’s relationship with his ruthless gangster father ignites a dangerous path of vengeance, leading him to become a feared hunter. As criminal violence escalates, he’s driven to prove himself through brutal trials and hard-won determination.

name: Five Nights at Freddy's
description: Recently fired and desperate, a troubled young man takes a night security job at an abandoned theme restaurant. What he finds inside soon doesn’t feel like a simple workplace issue, as strange secrets and unsettling behavior turn the night into something far more dangerous than expected.

name: Chicken Run: Dawn of the Nugget
description: A fearless flock of chickens teams up to protect their kind from a troubling new threat near their sanctuary. When a modern poultry processing setup raises alarms, the chickens plan a risky rescue and attempt to disrupt the facility’s sinister operation.

name: Greenland
description: As a massive comet threatens Earth, a separated family must navigate panic, danger, and desperate crowds in search of a possible safe haven. Their journey mixes disaster thrills with tense choices and glimpses of both kindness and cruelty under pressure.

name: Coming 2 America
description: As a beloved royal prepares to take the throne, he learns he has an unexpected adult son in Queens. A return trip to America turns into a fish-out-of-water comedy about family, duty, and bringing someone from ordinary city life into a very grand palace.

name: Cuties
description: Amy, an 11-year-old, joins a school dance group called “the cuties” and quickly becomes aware of changes in herself. Her new focus strains her relationship with her mother and challenges the values she was raised with.

name: Promising Young Woman
description: A young woman haunted by a past trauma leads a double life, using nights out to confront men who prey on vulnerability and to challenge the excuses that protect them. As her mission escalates, dark humor and uneasy tension collide, forcing her to weigh what justice should look like in a world that often looks away.

name: Road House
description: Former UFC fighter Dalton takes a job as a bouncer at a Florida Keys roadhouse, expecting a simple gig. Instead, he finds trouble brewing behind the island atmosphere, and must handle escalating local threats tied to a larger criminal presence.

name: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
description: After burning through most of his nine lives, Puss in Boots has only one left and faces the pressure of mortality. He sets out on an epic journey to find a mythical wish that could restore his lives and change his future.

name: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
description: Six people are forced into yet another series of escape rooms, where they must survive while figuring out what they share. As the puzzles escalate, they realize they’ve played before—and that staying alive may depend on understanding the competition behind the game.

name: Tenet
description: Armed with only one word, a covert operative is pulled into a high-stakes international mission where espionage unfolds across a twilight world. With the fate of the world on the line, the operation plays out in a way that challenges normal sense of time and causality.

name: The Mother
description: A deadly female assassin comes out of hiding to safeguard the daughter she gave up years earlier. Targeted by dangerous men, she fights to keep her child safe while navigating a relentless chase.

name: Fear Street: Part Three - 1666
description: A fear-stricken colonial town falls into a deadly witch-hunt whose consequences echo across generations. Centuries later, a group of teenagers races to understand the curse haunting their town before it destroys more lives.

name: Peninsula
description: A soldier and his team fight for survival against waves of post-apocalyptic zombies across the Korean Peninsula. In a world left ruined after the outbreak, their mission turns into a brutal struggle amid relentless undead threats.

name: Never Rarely Sometimes Always
description: Two teenage girls travel from rural Pennsylvania to New York City to seek medical help after an unintended pregnancy. Their trip is stressful and challenging as they search for a way forward in unfamiliar circumstances.

name: The Boys in the Band
description: Set during a birthday party in late-1960s New York, seven close friends face a surprise visitor and a rowdy game that spirals out of control. As the night goes on, they’re forced to deal with unspoken feelings, personal truths, and the emotional fallout between them.

name: Cherry
description: A drifting college dropout, shaken by heartbreak, signs up as an army medic and is sent to Iraq. When he returns home carrying deep war trauma, his life unravels into addiction and crime, while he struggles to hold on to love and any sense of purpose.

name: The Power of the Dog
description: A domineering rancher bullies the brother’s new wife and her teen son, turning everyday visits into a tense campaign of intimidation. As their strained relationships worsen, long-buried secrets begin to surface, reshaping the power dynamic on the ranch.

name: Spiral
description: A brash detective and a rookie partner investigate a string of grisly murders that echo the city’s violent past. As the case grows darker and more personal, the detective is pulled into a twisted game built around fear, punishment, and buried corruption.

name: The Hating Game
description: Determined to rise in her career without losing her ethics, a guarded office worker enters a sharp rivalry with a cold, capable coworker. Their escalating one-upmanship is complicated by an attraction that keeps getting harder to ignore.

name: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
description: A quirky, dysfunctional family’s road trip is thrown into chaos when they get caught in a robot apocalypse. Forced into action, they must rely on each other to become humanity’s unlikeliest last hope.

name: Spontaneous
description: High school students begin inexplicably exploding, turning everyday life into a countdown. Two seniors try to stay alive as each moment could be their last, while love and friendship start to shift under extreme pressure.

name: Project Power
description: In New Orleans, an ex-soldier, a teen, and a cop come together in a hunt for what’s behind a dangerous pill that grants temporary superpowers. Their search draws them into a high-stakes chase where power creates chaos—and not everyone wants it controlled.

name: To Catch a Killer
description: On a chaotic New Year's Eve in Baltimore, a troubled but perceptive police officer is pulled into a high-pressure investigation after a mass shooting. Working with federal authorities, the officer helps build a profile and search for a killer spreading fear across the city.

name: Fatherhood
description: A widowed new dad struggles with doubt and grief as he brings home a baby and tries to raise his daughter on his own. Balancing dirty diapers, fears, and heartache, he learns how to keep going day by day.

name: Palm Springs
description: At a wedding in Palm Springs, two guests connect and soon find themselves unable to leave the day behind. As they keep reliving the same events, they are pushed to deal with each other, their choices, and what it means to keep moving forward.

name: The Guilty
description: A demoted police officer working at an emergency call desk tries to manage his personal turmoil while handling a frightening call from a kidnapped woman. As clues emerge through the conversation, he races to figure out what’s happening and what to do next.

name: Bros
description: Busy lives and quick sparks set two men on a messy, funny path toward possible love. As they keep running into each other, their differences—work, habits, and ideas about life—cause tension, but also lead to growing feelings and awkward, heartfelt moments.

name: The Tomorrow War
description: When a team of time travelers arrives from decades ahead, it warns that humanity is losing a war against a deadly alien species. To change the odds, present-day recruits are sent to the future to fight and try to rewrite the planet’s fate, including a determined teacher who must balance survival with his family.

name: Narvik: Hitler's First Defeat
description: April 1940: the world watches Narvik in northern Norway, where iron ore is crucial for Hitler’s war effort. Over two months of harsh winter fighting, a German campaign faces its first major defeat.

name: Jingle Jangle: A Christmas Journey
description: An eccentric toymaker creates an invention that brings an imaginary world to life, setting their holiday life on an unexpected path. With help from their adventurous granddaughter, they race to protect what matters and reshape their future.

name: Bad Trip
description: In this hidden-camera prank comedy, two best friends hit the road to New York and pull real people into outrageous, raunchy antics. Their chaotic journey turns everyday moments into shocking, laugh-out-loud surprises along the way.

name: Hillbilly Elegy
description: A phone call pulls a Yale law student back to his Ohio hometown, where he reflects on his family’s past and the choices that shaped his future. As old tensions resurface, he must face the difficult realities of home while trying to move forward.

name: The Greatest Beer Run Ever
description: In 1967, a New York man sets out to personally deliver American beer to friends serving in Vietnam as a way to show support. His good intentions quickly spiral into a dangerous journey that reshapes how he understands the war and his place in it.

name: No Other Choice
description: After a ruthless job market strips a veteran paper mill manager of his livelihood, he spirals into violence as he struggles to reclaim his dignity. With work becoming harder to find and competition rising, his desperation turns into a dangerous plan that targets rivals.

name: The Mauritanian
description: Based on a true story, this film follows a man held for years without charges at Guantanamo Bay. When a defense lawyer takes on his case, the fight for justice begins to expose the harsh reality of his detention and the challenges of standing up to the system.

name: The Eyes of Tammy Faye
description: Across decades, the story follows an ambitious evangelical couple as they rise from humble beginnings to build a powerful religious broadcasting empire. Their journey comes with public triumphs and private flaws, culminating in their eventual fall from grace.

name: IF
description: A child going through a difficult family moment discovers she can see imaginary friends others have forgotten. Drawn into their colorful world, she joins a gentle adventure about memory, growing up, and the comfort imagination can bring.

name: His House
description: After escaping war-torn South Sudan, a young refugee couple attempts to build a new life in a small English town. Their struggle to adapt is complicated by an unspeakable evil that seems to be connected to their new home.

name: Judas and the Black Messiah
description: Bill O'Neal infiltrates the Black Panthers on behalf of the FBI, ordered to report on rising leaders. As one revolutionary’s influence grows and loyalties are tested, a tense struggle unfolds over what happens when personal conscience clashes with a mission.

name: The Shadow in My Eye
description: On March 21st, 1945, a British Royal Air Force bombing mission targets Gestapo headquarters in Copenhagen. The raid goes tragically wrong when some bombers hit a school instead, killing more than 120 people, including 86 children.

name: The Voyeurs
description: After moving into a dream apartment, a young couple discovers their windows offer a direct view into a volatile relationship across the street. What begins as curiosity quickly turns into obsession, pushing them toward increasingly dangerous consequences.

name: C'mon C'mon
description: Johnny brings his young nephew along for a cross-country trip, shifting their lives beyond Los Angeles. Along the way, their strained situation turns into a lasting, life-changing bond as they witness different communities and reflect on what growing up means.

name: Dog
description: An army ranger and his dog set off on a Pacific Coast Highway road trip to attend a friend's funeral. Along the way, their journey is filled with emotionally charged moments as they try to make it to their destination.

name: The Ice Road
description: After a remote diamond mine collapses in far northern Canada, a veteran ice road trucker takes on a high-risk rescue mission. With time running out and danger on every mile of frozen ocean, the team must push their rigs—and their nerves—to the limit to reach trapped workers in time.

name: Amsterdam
description: In 1930s America, three close friends get pulled into danger after witnessing a murder and becoming suspects themselves. As they try to clear their names, they stumble into a strange, wide-reaching scheme tied to power, history, and unrest.

name: Flamin' Hot
description: Flamin' Hot is an inspiring true-story drama about a snack idea that grows from everyday life into a global pop culture phenomenon. Channeling identity and hard work, the creator challenges the status quo and helps spark a major shake-up in the food industry.

name: Monkey Man
description: An anonymous young man survives by fighting in an underground club while wearing a gorilla mask, taking brutal beatings for cash night after night. After years of suppressed rage, he finds a way into the city’s corrupt elite and launches a furious campaign of retribution to settle old scores.

name: Jackass Forever
description: The Jackass crew, joined by a handful of newcomers, returns for a final round packed with hilarious, absurd, and seriously dangerous stunts. Expect crude humor, bold challenges, and nonstop mayhem from start to finish.

name: The Adam Project
description: After crash-landing in 2022, a time-traveling fighter pilot teams up with his 12-year-old self on a mission meant to save the future. Together they set out to correct what went wrong, while their partnership forces them to confront personal loss and who they are.

name: Cobweb
description: Eight-year-old Peter is tormented by a mysterious tapping from inside his bedroom wall, while his parents insist it’s just his imagination. As his fear grows, he suspects they’re hiding something dangerous and starts questioning who he can trust.

name: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
description: A planet-threatening enemy arrives on Earth, drawing giant transforming allies and two ordinary humans into a race to stop a dangerous power from falling into the wrong hands. As new robot factions join the fight, the mission becomes a fast-moving battle for humanity’s survival.

name: Transformers One
description: Transformers One tells the origin story of two sworn rivals who once felt like brothers and helped change the fate of their world. When new truths surface after life in a harsh system, their bond and leadership are tested, setting the stage for what comes next.

name: Quo Vadis, Aida?
description: Bosnia, July 1995: a UN translator in Srebrenica is drawn into dangerous negotiations as a Serbian army takes over the town. Her family joins thousands of residents seeking shelter at a UN camp, while crucial information she interprets raises the question—rescue or death—and what choice she must make next.

name: Operation Fortune: Ruse de Guerre
description: A covert team is pulled into a globe-trotting mission to stop a dangerous weapons technology from being sold. To get close to the deal, they bring in a famous movie star, turning a high-stakes operation into a slick mix of spy action, comedy, and undercover chaos.

name: Hocus Pocus 2
description: Nearly 29 years after a powerful Halloween candle was last lit, a trio of resurrected witches return to cause trouble in Salem. Three high school students find themselves in the fight to stop the ravenous witches before dawn on All Hallow’s Eve.

65 million years ago, two survivors of a crashed spaceship on Earth must reach an escape vessel before a coming asteroid strike destroys the planet. Along the way, they face constant danger from dinosaurs while trying to stay alive and make it to their only way off.

name: Dara of Jasenovac
description: Set during WWII in the Nazi-occupied Ustasha regime “NDH” in former Yugoslavia, a young girl is sent to the Jasenovac concentration camp complex in Croatia, sometimes called “Balkan’s Auschwitz.” The story follows her experience as the horrors of the camp unfold.

name: The Lost City
description: A reclusive adventure-romance author is taken by an eccentric billionaire, who believes she can help lead them to a legendary lost treasure from her latest novel. While promoting the book, her cover model joins forces with unexpected allies to rescue her and chase the treasure in the real world.

name: Swan Song
description: In the near future, a man facing a terminal illness is offered an experimental way to spare his wife and son from grief. As he weighs the choice, the story explores love, loss, and the sacrifices people make for the people they care about.

name: A Classic Horror Story
description: Five people traveling by camper crash into a tree, then find the road they were on has vanished into an impenetrable forest. They stumble upon a wooden house as tensions rise and unsettling horror escalates around them.

name: The Tender Bar
description: A boy grows up without a steady father figure, finding guidance and comfort in a neighborhood bar run by a charismatic relative. As his hardworking mother pushes for a better future, he navigates a lively extended family, school ambitions, and early romance while trying to shape a life beyond his troubled home.

name: CODA
description: A hearing teenager in a Deaf family helps keep the household connected while their fishing business faces trouble. As a passion for music grows, family responsibilities and personal dreams pull in different directions, creating a warm coming-of-age story about love, identity, and support.

name: Mass
description: Two couples meet to talk face to face after a violent tragedy that changed both of their lives. What begins as an uneasy conversation turns into a raw, painful attempt to understand grief, guilt, and whether healing is even possible.

name: Sharper
description: A small, wealthy New York family becomes tangled in a web of secrets, lies, and a theft that keeps escalating. As the story shifts between different perspectives, the groundwork for each deception comes into focus, turning the family’s world into a tightly wound con game.

name: Turning Red
description: Thirteen-year-old Mei must navigate the awkwardness of adolescence—until strong emotions trigger a surprising transformation into a giant red panda. Trying to keep her life steady, she deals with family pressure, friendships, and the challenge of coping with big changes.

name: X
description: In 1979, a group of young filmmakers head to rural Texas to shoot an adult film, but their reclusive hosts catch them. What starts as an uneasy setup turns into a deadly fight for survival when the situation escalates fast and violently.

name: Fresh
description: Tired of disappointing dating apps and awkward dates, a young woman takes a chance on an oddly charming stranger she meets in a grocery store. What begins like a promising modern romance soon shifts into a much darker, more unsettling experience.

name: Red Rocket
description: After hitting rock bottom in Los Angeles, a former porn star returns to his Texas hometown to live with his estranged wife and her mother. As old tensions start to ease, he develops an intense infatuation with a young doughnut shop worker, setting their lives on a reckless collision course.

name: Lamb
description: An Icelandic couple lives on a remote farm, tending their flock of sheep. Their quiet routine changes when they find a mysterious newborn on their land, and they choose to raise it, bringing hope and joy that gradually turns into ruin.

name: The Medium
description: A shaman’s family learns that their goddess appears to be controlling one of them. But their situation turns frightening when they realize the possession isn’t caused by the goddess as believed.

name: The Sadness
description: A young couple fights to reunite as a fast-moving pandemic outbreak sends the world spiraling into brutality. As the streets descend into chaos, infected people unleash extreme, unimaginable cruelty, pushing the pair toward the edge of sanity.

name: The Pale Blue Eye
description: In 1830, a grim death at a military academy draws a weary investigator into a disturbing case. As fear spreads, he turns to an unusual young cadet for help untangling clues in a dark, wintry mystery.

name: Asterix & Obelix: The Middle Kingdom
description: Asterix and Obelix travel to China to help a princess protect the empress and her country from a dangerous prince. Along the way, they face new allies, comic obstacles, and plenty of adventurous detours in a big, lively journey far from home.

name: Roadrunner: A Film About Anthony Bourdain
description: This intimate documentary offers a behind-the-scenes look at how an anonymous chef rose to become a world-renowned cultural icon. Tracing his evolution over the years, it presents an unflinching portrait shaped by his own voice and lasting influence.

name: The Outfit
description: After a personal tragedy, an English tailor ends up in Chicago and runs a small shop in a rough area. When local gangsters seek shelter there, his workdays turn into a tense night of betrayal and danger inside his shop.

name: Enola Holmes 2
description: A young detective opens her own agency and takes on a case involving a missing girl, only to uncover a larger danger beneath the surface. As the mystery grows, she must rely on allies and a famous sibling to follow the clues.

name: The Stranger
description: Two strangers connect during a long journey, but their conversations hide troubling secrets. As one nation’s large police operation tightens its net, an undercover effort tests trust while the threat in the background grows harder to ignore.

name: Schumacher
description: Using exclusive interviews and archival footage, this documentary offers an intimate look at seven-time Formula 1 champion Michael Schumacher. It traces his life story from early beginnings through his rise in racing, alongside reflections from those close to him.

name: Farha
description: Set in Palestine in 1948 after the British withdrawal, tensions escalate between Arabs and Jews. Against this backdrop, a village mayor’s smart daughter pursues her dream of studying in the big city, unaware of the tragedy ahead.

name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - Mt. Natagumo Arc
description: Tanjiro, now a registered Demon Slayer, teams up with fellow slayers Zenitsu and Inosuke to investigate missing person cases on the mountain Natagumo. After they’re separated in battle, they uncover that the entire mountain is under the control of a clan of Demon spider creatures.

name: Emily the Criminal
description: Desperate for income, Emily takes a shady gig buying goods with stolen credit cards provided by a charismatic middleman. What starts as quick cash and high-risk thrills soon pushes the duo to consider going further.

name: Through My Window
description: A teen girl's longtime crush on her next-door neighbor grows into a more serious romance when his feelings start shifting too. Their connection faces resistance from his family, adding pressure as their attraction deepens.

name: Athena
description: After the sudden death of a youngest brother in a troubled housing project, three siblings are pulled into rising unrest and conflict. As anger spreads and tensions with the police grow, each brother faces a different path in a night of chaos and fear.

name: Smile
description: After witnessing a terrifying incident involving a patient, a doctor begins to experience frightening, unexplained events. As the fear escalates, she’s forced to confront what’s happening and what it means for her past.

name: Knock at the Cabin
