description: A family’s quiet vacation at a remote cabin is shattered when four armed strangers force their way inside with a terrifying demand. Cut off from the outside world, the family must face a desperate choice and decide what they believe as rising danger makes everything feel more urgent.

name: The Covenant
description: During the war in Afghanistan, a local interpreter risks everything to help an injured sergeant make it across dangerous terrain. With allies pushed back and help out of reach, the two must survive relentless hostility to reach safety.

name: You Hurt My Feelings
description: A novelist learns that her husband has a very different, brutally honest reaction to her latest book than she thought. The discovery throws their long marriage into an uncomfortable new spotlight, sparking awkward questions about honesty, support, and what hurts most.

name: No Hard Feelings
description: A financially strapped woman facing the loss of her longtime home answers an unusual job ad from wealthy parents. They want someone to help their sheltered, introverted 19-year-old come out of his shell before college, but the arrangement proves far messier than expected.

name: Passages
description: In Paris, a long-term gay couple faces a crisis when one partner impulsively starts a passionate affair with a young schoolteacher. When the other partner follows suit, the relationship spirals into a messy cycle of competing desires and difficult choices they may not be ready for.

name: The Beasts
description: A French couple tries to build an eco-friendly life in a quiet Galician village by restoring abandoned houses and farming responsibly. But their opposition to a wind turbine project ignites a brutal feud with their neighbors, and the growing tension threatens to become irreversible.

name: Superman: Red Son
description: Set during the Cold War, this version of Superman begins life in the USSR and grows into a powerful Soviet symbol. As he rises to prominence, his ideals collide with the real costs of maintaining a hardened political system, reshaping the meaning of heroism.

name: Batman: The Long Halloween, Part One
description: After a brutal series of murders hits Gotham City on major holidays, a young vigilante known as Batman begins a relentless hunt for a mysterious serial killer. Teaming up with police and the district attorney, Batman searches for answers while the case unfolds across multiple special days.

name: Batman: The Long Halloween, Part Two
description: In Gotham City, a young vigilante presses on while chasing a brutal serial killer. Meanwhile, the district attorney becomes caught in tensions tied to a powerful criminal family, pulling the investigation into deeper conflict.

name: Civil War
description: In a near-future United States torn by internal conflict, a small group of war journalists travels through dangerous territory to report what they see. The story focuses less on political explanations and more on fear, survival, and the emotional cost of witnessing violence up close.

name: Scream VI
description: After the latest Ghostface killings, four survivors leave Woodsboro behind and begin a fresh chapter in a new city. As threats escalate, they must survive while trying to figure out who is behind the violence and why it’s targeting them.

name: Vengeance
description: A New York City journalist travels to West Texas to investigate the death of a girl he once connected with. While digging into what happened, he’s pulled into a mystery that blends small-town life, a podcast angle, and the search for answers.

name: Challengers
description: A tennis player turned coach pushes her husband toward stardom, hoping to snap him out of a slump. She enters him in a lower-level pro event, where he must face a former best friend who also has a personal history with her.

name: Champions
description: A hotheaded minor league basketball coach must complete community service by training a team of athletes with intellectual disabilities. What starts as an unwanted assignment becomes a feel-good sports story about teamwork, patience, and finding common ground.

name: Alien: Romulus
description: A group of young space colonizers scavenging a derelict space station run into the universe’s most dangerous life form. As the mission turns into a fight for survival, they must escape a dark, claustrophobic place where danger waits around every corner.

name: The Valet
description: After a paparazzi photo sparks a public scandal, a hardworking valet is pulled into a celebrity’s damage-control plan and asked to pretend they’re dating. The fake relationship throws him into a world of fame, culture clashes, and constant misunderstandings, creating messy situations that test his patience and priorities.

name: Ordinary Angels
description: Inspired by a true story, a hairdresser steps into a family’s crisis after finding a local newspaper plea about a critically ill young daughter. With determination and community support, she helps rally resources to give the family a real chance at saving her life.

name: Totally Killer
description: The infamous “Sweet Sixteen Killer” returns 35 years after his first spree to claim another victim. A teen is accidentally pulled back to 1987, where she must deal with a new world while trying to stop the killer before it’s too late.

name: Society of the Snow
description: Based on true events, this survival drama follows the aftermath of a plane crash deep in the Andes. Stranded in brutal cold with little hope of rescue, a group of survivors must rely on endurance, teamwork, and sheer will to stay alive.

name: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey
description: After Christopher Robin leaves for college, Pooh and Piglet become restless and turn feral as they search for food. Their rampage brings deadly terror to a new group who cross their path, turning a familiar woodland into a brutal slasher playground.

name: Love Lies Bleeding
description: A reclusive gym manager falls for an ambitious bodybuilder passing through town on a road trip to Las Vegas. Their romance intensifies as they get pulled into the darker side of the manager’s criminal family, triggering escalating violence and chaos.

name: Sisu
description: In the remote Lapland wilderness near the end of World War II, a hardened former soldier uncovers a stash of gold and tries to carry it back to civilization. When a ruthless German patrol gets in his way, the journey turns into a brutal test of survival and determination.

name: The Pope's Exorcist
description: In 1987, Vatican exorcism expert investigates a horrifying possession case involving a young boy. Traveling to Spain, he works with local clergy as the investigation reveals a centuries-old Vatican conspiracy that’s been kept secret.

name: Girl in the Picture
description: A young mother’s mysterious death sends a shockwave through her family and reveals a decades-long mystery tied to her true identity. When her son is later taken, the case draws attention to a dangerous federal fugitive at the center of it all.

name: Gran Turismo
description: A teenage Gran Turismo player’s gaming talent wins him a shot at Nissan competitions, pushing him from the virtual world into real professional racecar driving. As he trains and competes, the dream of going from fan to racer becomes the driving force behind his rise.

name: Emilia Pérez
description: Rita, an underappreciated lawyer at a firm focused on getting criminals released, is hired by a powerful criminal organization. She soon learns her new assignment is tied to the leader’s plans to change his life dramatically, pulling her into dangerous, high-stakes negotiations with his family and allies.

name: All of Us Strangers
description: In a near-empty London tower block, Adam’s lonely routine is disrupted by a chance encounter with a mysterious neighbor. As their connection develops, Adam’s reflections on his past and grief spill into the present, reshaping how he thinks about intimacy, identity, and longing.

name: Inside Out 2
description: Teenager Riley’s mind headquarters is suddenly under renovation as new emotions arrive, creating fresh tension with the ones who thought they already had everything under control. When anxiety shows up, Riley’s struggles with growing up—and fitting in—become even more complicated, as the emotions scramble across her inner world.

name: Priscilla
description: When teenage Priscilla meets a famous rock star, their connection quickly reveals a private dynamic that’s both thrilling and unsettling. Set against the pressures of love and fame, the story follows her shifting sense of belonging as a controlling world closes in, along with the quieter comfort of friendship and loneliness.

name: The Old Oak
description: In a struggling former mining town, a pub landlord fights to keep his rundown local alive as new families arrive seeking safety. With jobs gone and hope fading, resentment flares between longtime residents and newcomers, forcing the community to confront prejudice, hardship, and what it means to stand together.

name: Still: A Michael J. Fox Movie
description: A young pop culture sensation rises from a military base upbringing into 1980s fame, only for his life to change after a difficult medical diagnosis. The story asks how an unbreakable optimist faces a life-altering illness, and what it means to keep moving forward.

name: 20 Days in Mariupol
description: As the Russian invasion begins, a team of Ukrainian journalists becomes trapped in the besieged city of Mariupol. Working under relentless attack, they keep documenting the war’s atrocities and the effects on civilians.

name: Pamela: A Love Story
description: Told in her own words, through personal video and diaries, Pamela Anderson recounts her rise to fame, difficult romances, and the media storm that followed a leaked sex tape scandal. The documentary blends career highlights with intimate reflections on how it all affected her life.

name: Reality
description: In Augusta, Georgia, a woman comes home after running errands and is approached by two men. A warrant leads to an investigation and an intense, word-driven confrontation as questions about possible classified leaks unfold.

name: Frankenstein
description: A brilliant but egotistical scientist pushes beyond accepted limits and succeeds in bringing new life into the world. As the consequences of the experiment spread, both creator and creation are pulled into a dark, gothic spiral shaped by fear, rejection, and a desperate need for understanding.

name: Bank of Dave
description: A working-class entrepreneur in Burnley fights to create a community bank to help local businesses survive and thrive. His bid to get a new banking license pits him against elitist financial institutions in London, forcing him to rally support and push through opposition.

name: Michael
description: Michael follows one of the world’s most influential pop artists from early fame to the rise of a visionary performer. It moves beyond the music to show key moments off-stage, while revisiting several iconic early performances and the ambition that drove him to become the biggest entertainer in the world.

name: Blood & Gold
description: At the end of World War II, a German soldier searches for his daughter while an SS troop hunts for a Jewish treasure hidden in a small town. As the war collapses around them, greed and survival drive a dangerous pursuit through the ruins.

name: Perfect Days
description: A toilet cleaner in Tokyo finds contentment in a structured routine, along with music on cassette tapes, books, and photos of trees. Through unexpected encounters and brief disruptions, he reflects on how beauty can be found in everyday life.

name: Super/Man: The Christopher Reeve Story
description: Christopher Reeve is best known for playing a beloved superhero on screen, and this documentary also follows his life beyond the spotlight. After a near-fatal horseback accident left him paralyzed, he became a charismatic leader and activist, campaigning for spinal cord injury care and disability rights with support from family and friends.

name: Anyone But You
description: After an unforgettable first date, sparks between two people quickly turn to cold distance. When they end up unexpectedly crossing paths again at a destination wedding in Australia, they agree to pretend they’re a couple to handle the chaos around them.

name: Wham!
description: Built from archival interviews and footage, the documentary revisits the journey of a famous pop duo, from early friendship to chart-topping stardom and their time as 80s icons. It traces their career arc through a chronological mix of remembered moments and performance history.

name: The Swan
description: Two large, cruel bullies relentlessly torment a small, brilliant boy in a young adult Roald Dahl short tale. The story is told through a framing narrator, turning bullying into a tense, dark experience with a bitter emotional impact.

name: The Wild Robot
description: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot is stranded on a remote island and must learn how to survive among wary wild animals. Along the way, it forms unexpected bonds and takes responsibility for an orphaned baby goose.

name: The Room Next Door
description: Longtime friends reunite after years apart—one becoming an acclaimed writer and the other a war reporter. When serious illness forces a difficult decision, their reconnection unfolds in an intense, unusually tender situation that tests loyalty, fear, and what it means to choose on your own terms.

name: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
description: In a savage world of devils, hunters, and hidden enemies, a young fighter is drawn into a dangerous new connection that blurs love, trust, and survival. As threats close in, the story shifts from uneasy romance to relentless supernatural action.

name: It Ends with Us
description: When a woman’s first love reenters her life, her relationship with a charming yet abusive partner is thrown into turmoil. Faced with painful realities, she must lean on her own strength to make an impossible choice about her future.

name: Train Dreams
description: A logger’s quiet life is shaped by love and loss as early 20th-century America transforms around him. As the world changes, he keeps moving forward, carrying memories and meaning through hardship and heartfelt moments.

name: Highest 2 Lowest
description: A celebrated music mogul known for his “best ears” is pulled into a tense ransom crisis. When an apparent kidnapping collides with his business plans, he faces a life-or-death moral choice with consequences for everyone close to him.

name: Oddity
description: After the brutal murder of her twin sister, a blind psychic tracks down those responsible, using haunted items as tools for revenge. Set in an isolated home and dark institutions, her search blends supernatural elements with a mystery-driven pursuit of answers.

name: Eternity
description: After death, a woman discovers that souls have one week to choose where to spend forever. Her decision becomes complicated when she must weigh a lifetime of love against a long-ago first romance, turning the afterlife into a tender and funny test of the heart.

name: The Ballad of Wallis Island
description: A lottery winner living alone on a remote island tries to turn his fantasies into reality by hiring his favorite musicians to play at his home. When the plans bring old feelings back to the surface, the island stay becomes a mix of humor, music, and reflections on loneliness and loss.

name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle
description: The Demon Slayer Corps are drawn into the Infinity Castle, where an escalating fight against terrifying demons unfolds as a desperate final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji begins. Amid the chaos, the heroes and their allies push through relentless encounters inside the castle’s nightmarish depths.

name: Marty Supreme
description: Marty Mauser, a young man with a dream few people take seriously, dives into a chaotic journey to become great. After going to hell and back, he pushes forward through mounting obstacles and high-stakes competition in pursuit of championship glory.

name: Relay
description: A broker who arranges dangerous deals between corrupt corporations and the people who threaten them breaks his own rules when a new client begs for help to stay alive. As the tension rises, the broker must navigate escalating pressure and threats while trying to keep everything under control.

name: Song Sung Blue
description: Two struggling musicians find a fresh start when they team up to perform Neil Diamond songs, turning a tribute act into a source of joy, connection, and renewed purpose. Based on a true story, it follows love, music, and resilience through life’s highs and lows.

name: Good Boy
description: A volatile young man with a dangerous lifestyle is abducted after getting separated from his friends and wakes up imprisoned in a remote Yorkshire home. Kept in a basement by a strange family, his situation turns into an unsettling, unpredictable attempt at “rehabilitation.”

name: Is This Thing On?
description: As a marriage quietly unravels, a middle-aged man and his wife face an impending divorce while trying to find personal purpose. Each turns to a new path—one in the New York comedy scene and the other through coaching—forcing them to rethink identity, co-parenting, and what love can look like next.

name: Weapons
description: After nearly an entire elementary school class disappears at the same exact time overnight, a shaken town searches for answers. As fear, suspicion, and grief spread, the mystery pulls different people into an increasingly unsettling web.

name: Exit 8
description: A man trapped in an endless, sterile subway passageway searches for Exit 8 by following strict rules: keep going if nothing seems wrong, but turn back immediately if he spots an anomaly. With a single oversight sending him back to the start, he must decide what to notice—before time and progress reset.

name: Good Boy
description: A loyal dog moves with his owner into a remote rural home and soon realizes supernatural forces are lurking nearby. As dark entities threaten his human companion, the brave pup fights to keep the one he loves safe.

name: Hokum
description: A grieving novelist retreats to a remote inn to scatter his parents’ ashes, but stories about a witch tied to the honeymoon suite begin to unsettle him. As disturbing visions mount and someone vanishes, the trip turns into a tense reckoning with buried memories.

name: If Anything Happens I Love You
description: A pair of grieving parents are left to navigate an overwhelming emotional emptiness after the tragic loss of a child in a school shooting. Through quiet, wordless storytelling, their journey explores love, mourning, and how grief reshapes daily life.

name: Werewolf by Night
description: A secret group of monster hunters gathers at the Bloodstone Temple after the death of their leader, drawn into a mysterious, deadly competition for a powerful relic. As the memorial unfolds, the contest turns personal and puts the hunters face to face with a dangerous monster.

name: The Boy, the Mole, the Fox and the Horse
description: A young boy lost in the frozen countryside sets out to find home, crossing paths with a mole, a fox, and a horse who travel alongside him. Their journey turns into an unlikely friendship as the search for home begins to mean something more.

name: Together
description: Years into their relationship, a couple relocates to the country, trying to hold onto what matters while new tensions rise. As their lives become strained, an unsettling, unnatural force pushes them toward a terrifying and intimate kind of corruption that threatens their bond.

name: Nemesis
description: A man talks with his therapist about recurring terror he’s faced over four separate times. Each incident involves a masked killer who has remained unseen for years, leaving him to piece together what happened.

name: Depeche Mode: M
description: Depeche Mode: M documents the band’s 2023 Mexico City shows, mixing concert footage with brief interludes. The film reflects on music alongside themes of mortality, while also connecting that perspective to Mexican culture’s relationship with death.

name: Being Towards Death
description: After personal loss and financial hardship, a despairing man takes a caregiving job in a hospital ward to pay off debt. As he forms supportive bonds with people facing the end of life, he slowly rediscovers purpose, connection, and a reason to keep going.

name: Pizza Movie
description: A simple pizza pickup turns into a surreal college adventure when a group of students, deeply under the influence of a homemade drug, tries to make it from their dorm room to the lobby. What should be an easy trip becomes a strange, chaotic quest.

name: New Group
description: A quiet high school student feels crushed by social pressure when classmates suddenly begin building human pyramids, and teachers start pushing everyone to join. As the bizarre formations spread beyond the school and into the wider community, she and another outsider struggle to resist a growing wave of conformity.

name: We Are Aliens
description: One summer in the third grade, a quiet boy named Tsubasa meets Kyotaro, a boy everyone in the class looked up to, and the two become close friends. Within their small world, they share irreplaceable moments—until a small incident suddenly tears them apart.

name: The Day She Returns
description: After wrapping an independent film, an actor is scheduled for three interviews and later asked to recreate them in class. What should be a simple exercise turns unsettling when the memories of those conversations seem to have vanished.

name: Cold War 1994
description: Set in Hong Kong in 1994 as a key police unit nears disbandment, a tycoon’s kidnapping sparks a covert struggle for control. Rival interests from law enforcement, organized crime, political power, and a wealthy family collide in a tense battle shaped by ambition, betrayal, and shifting loyalties.

name: Bomb
description: Bomb is a comedy set in the fictional village of Kaalakammaipatty, where a man dies unexpectedly and the chaos only gets bigger afterward. With his body becoming the center of confusion, the villagers search for the reason behind the strange situation.

name: Dead to Rights
description: Set during the 1937 Nanjing Massacre, a traveling postman secretly shelters Chinese refugees while posing as someone who helps Japanese forces. He later risks his life to evacuate them and reveal evidence of the atrocities.

name: Atonement
description: Based on Dexter Filkins’ resonant New Yorker article of the same name, about Marine Lu Lobello, haunted by memories of a deadly incident in Baghdad, whose journey of guilt and remorse leads him to reach out to Nora, the sole surviving member of the family he believes he may have harmed.

name: Quinze Dias
description: An insecure teenager's vacation plans are ruined by an unexpected visitor: his neighbor and school crush who will spend two weeks sleeping at his house. The days that promised peace, tranquility and epic series marathons end up bringing a whirlwind of feelings and unresolved issues.

name: Trad
description: From a home in Ireland’s Donegal Gaeltacht, a gifted young fiddle player and her younger brother join a troupe of wandering musicians and set off across the country. Along the way, the journey brings adventure, budding romance, and a deepening connection to traditional music, with moments that blend everyday life and a touch of fantasy.

name: Sore: A Wife from the Future
description: A young man living alone in Croatia is visited by a woman who says she is his wife from the future. She’s sent to help him correct his bad habits and improve his lifestyle, and their cross-time connection pushes them toward change through repeated opportunities.

name: Daadi Ki Shaadi
description: A grandmother’s social media mishap sparks worry among her children and puts a major dent in plans for her granddaughter’s wedding. As concerns rise, everyone scrambles to contain the fallout from the post.

name: The Sea
description: A Palestinian boy set on seeing the sea for the first time is denied entry at a checkpoint and chooses to sneak in. As he heads toward the coast, his father searches anxiously for him, risking his own safety and job.

name: The Cowboy
description: Ten years in the life of young cowboy Crowley as he comes of age in the vastness of Colorado. On his rocky path, he endures loss, separation, and shattered dreams.

name: Cover-Up
description: Veteran investigative journalist Seymour “Sy” Hersh has spent decades uncovering stories powerful figures try to bury. This documentary traces his work from major wartime revelations to later reporting on global crises, drawing from candid interviews and a wide range of supporting materials.

name: Good Vibes Only
description: Based on a true story, the film follows a married couple who invent a groundbreaking sex toy. Praised as a game-changer for how women experience pleasure, their invention sets off a new chapter in both their lives and mission.

name: On the Road
description: A rebellious young drifter talks a guarded long-haul trucker into giving him a ride across northern Mexico. As they travel through a tough, macho world on the road, a fragile closeness grows, but unresolved trouble from the past threatens their safety.

name: Last Night in Sorrento
description: A newly married couple leave London for a fresh start in Sorrento, but their dream life soon frays under growing tension, addiction, and temptation. As buried family issues come to light, they are forced to confront painful truths about their future together.

name: The Good Assassin
description: A new contract killer is thrown off balance when he becomes roommates with his apathetic target. As the week closes in, he must find the courage to deal with the situation—or risk consequences from the criminal underworld’s top authorities.

name: Kenny Loggins: Conviction of the Heart
description: This documentary follows a multi-award-winning singer-songwriter as he looks back on a career shaped by hit songs, major soundtrack work, and decades of change. It explores both the public success and the personal journey behind a generation-defining music legacy.

name: Wolves
description: A young woman feels trapped by her family, society, and a draining job, and goes looking for stability and belonging. She finds it in a local black metal scene while touring with a band as their social media manager, but a new romance and rising conflicts test what she’s willing to ignore.

name: Je m'appelle Agneta
description: After losing a job and craving a change, a woman takes an au pair position in Provence expecting a simple reset. Instead, the move becomes a lush escape that opens the door to pleasure, freedom, and an unexpected personal awakening.

name: A Fading Man
description: When her ex-husband reappears, now living with dementia and having forgotten their divorce, Hanne’s carefully arranged life with her partner is gently thrown off balance. As routines shift, the relationship dynamics grow more tender and complicated than expected.

name: Another Man's Wife
description: A millionaire makes a shocking offer to a married couple in crisis, financially devastated while caring for a terminally ill parent. What starts as a bid for survival grows into a high-stakes emotional reckoning about trust, love, and the cost of sacrifice.

name: Tod meiner Jugend
description: A janitor with a loving wife and a devoted son leads a seemingly quiet, orderly life. One day, the boy asks his father an inconspicuous but profound question: “Dad, why are there no photos of you at my age?” Driven by a restlessness that can no longer be suppressed, the man returns to the place of his childhood: a children's home he has avoided for decades.

name: In-I in Motion
description: In 2007, Juliette Binoche and Akram Khan took a break and co-created In-I, an original performance that toured the world. Today, Juliette Binoche revisits that exhilarating journey. Through unfamiliar images, she reflects on creation, its challenges, and the personal transformation it brings as a filmmaker.

name: The Monkey Hero
description: A legendary journey begins as Tang Sanzang sets out with a team that includes Monkey King Jazz and Sha Wujing. But one key member is missing, adding uncertainty to their quest as they travel together.

name: Jujutsu Kaisen: Execution
description: A sudden barrier drops over a crowded city district, trapping civilians and sparking a desperate battle between sorcerers and curses. As the fallout spreads and a deadly new game begins across Japan, a powerful enforcer is tasked with carrying out an execution that could reshape the conflict.

name: Ozzy Osbourne: No Escape from Now
description: Ozzy Osbourne confronts identity and mortality as his health challenges take center stage and his world changes. With Parkinson's affecting his ability to perform, he looks inward, questioning whether he can return to what he loves most—music.

name: Youth
description: Youth follows a 15-year-old who rushes into adolescence with a big goal: finding true love before school ends. Through several relationships and heartbreaks, he learns what love really means and how it changes him, shaping his growth and outlook on life.

name: Devil's Game
description: After a fiancée turns to a Ouija board to cope with his grief, terrifying events begin to unfold. As the manipulation escalates, he races to uncover the truth behind her deceit before the situation pushes him toward madness.

name: Sakamoto Days
description: A once-feared assassin has left his violent life behind to build a quiet family life. When old enemies resurface, he is forced to protect the people he loves while trying to keep his peaceful new world from falling apart.

name: Babo: The Haftbefehl Story
description: Using personal interviews, this documentary traces the life behind a German rap icon, as he confronts the hardest parts of his past and how they shaped his music and identity. It follows a brutally honest look at the struggles between self-expression and self-exploitation.

name: The A List: 15 Stories from Asian and Pacific Diasporas
description: This documentary brings together public figures from Asian and Pacific diasporas as they reflect on identity, ambition, and belonging in America. Through personal stories of hardship and success, it explores racism, resilience, and the many ways people define themselves across cultures.

name: The Lunch: A Letter to America
description: Eduardo, a Mexican cook in a Coney Island diner who crossed the desert two decades ago, becomes the unsuspecting centre of a story unfolding during the last week of the U.S. presidential campaign. Around him swirl fleeting encounters, patriotic hymns, prayers, accidental violence, tenderness, and landscapes of desperate beauty – an America at once raw and poetic.

name: The Red Hangar
description: In Chile during 1973, a military coup upends life on an Air Force base. As fear and violence spread, an officer is pushed to decide whether to follow orders that harm others or risk everything to protect people struggling to survive.

name: Lau Chu Hoa
description: In the early 20th century, the daughter of a wealthy family in Saigon met a tragic end in the family's grand estate. Though her death was officially declared as an accident, the rumors of a woman in white, seen weeping by the old window of the mansion late at night, begin to spread.

name: Kentucky Roses
description: A warm romance unfolds amid the elegance and excitement of Kentucky traditions, where a mystery from decades earlier adds intrigue to the setting. The story blends heartfelt connection with a sense of heritage and lingering questions.

name: Baab
description: After finding cassette tapes hidden behind a green door, Wahida starts unraveling what happened to her twin sister. Struggling with tinnitus, she travels into the mountains and encounters a deeply unsettling discovery.

name: The Misconceived
description: A struggling filmmaker and single father tries to earn a living without losing his identity in an offbeat home renovation comedy. Blending experimental 3D visuals with sharp workplace satire, it looks at the pressures facing creative workers today.

name: Dhurandhar: The Revenge
description: A covert mission turns into an all-out fight for survival as a driven operative is hunted by rival gangs, corrupt officials, and a ruthless military figure in Lyari. As the violence escalates, duty and revenge collide, and the line between heroism and brutality starts to blur.

name: Tri cima
description: Once classmates Petar, Strahinja, and Lazar reunite for their prom anniversary and are forced to face old wounds during one turbulent night.

name: Club Kid
description: A washed-up underground party promoter's life takes an unexpected turn when he is forced to care for a son he never knew he had.

name: Doll
description: After serving time for a violent mistake in her youth, a woman tries to rebuild her life and find the child she gave birth to in prison. As she searches for a fresh start, maternal love and her inner world begin to shape how she faces reality.

name: Shaka Oh Shaka
description: A chance meeting at a concert upends a college student’s life, leading to a close bond with her idol. What starts as admiration grows into a mutual romance, but everyday pressures and the passing of time test whether they can stay together.

name: Yang Lain Boleh Hilang Asal Kau Jangan
description: A final-year film student enjoys a close-knit life with her mother, who is also her beloved teacher. When the teacher’s memory loss worsens, the student must choose between chasing her dreams and staying home to cherish limited time together.

name: The Great Money Robbery
description: Pushed by betrayal, bullying, and desperation, Wu Xiaobao is drawn into an armed bank robbery. As events unfold, he slowly descends into a dark, irreversible path.

name: Queen of Chess
description: A Hungarian girl dreams of conquering international men’s chess, driven by relentless training and ambition. After years of struggle against powerful forces in both her personal life and the sport itself, she changes the game’s patriarchal culture and rises to become one of the greatest chess players ever.

name: Evil Influencer: The Jodi Hildebrandt Story
description: This true-crime documentary looks at the arrest of a Utah therapist and a popular parenting creator after serious abuse allegations came to light. It follows how manipulation, control, and distorted beliefs affected families and exposed a troubling pattern behind the headlines.

name: Claim Me
description: A driven lawyer brings a young tutor into her home to help her younger sister, but the arrangement quickly blurs boundaries. As lessons turn into charged encounters, the sisters find themselves pulled into a risky, intimate awakening that tests trust and self-control.

name: Cosmic Princess Kaguya!
description: Iroha’s life is upended when Kaguya, a carefree runaway from the Moon, moves in and urges her to perform in a shared virtual world. Together, they explore friendship, fame, and what responsibility means as their new world pulls them forward.

name: A Messy Tribute to Motherly Love
description: In a village where intense emotions can make people literally explode, a grieving family and a close friend struggle to carry on. Their mourning spills into everyday life in strange, surreal, and increasingly chaotic ways.

name: Semua Akan Baik-Baik Saja
description: A sudden loss pushes estranged siblings to come together under a caretaker’s guidance. Through their ongoing conflicts and emotional pain, they begin to accept what happened and slowly rebuild a sense of family and belonging.

name: Almost Us
description: A longtime best friend quietly loves the person closest to him, but she is focused on an idealized crush. When he gets a chance to bring her dream closer, he must decide how much of his own heart he is willing to risk for her happiness.

name: Tekenchu: The Rite of the Nahuales
description: A federal agent investigates chilling infanticides in which the victims’ teeth have been extracted. In a nearby village, two healers take in a wounded man found in the woods, adding another layer to the growing mystery.

name: Aakhri Sawal
description: A volatile scholar sparks a nationwide firestorm by accusing his revered mentor of institutional bias. What starts as an academic dispute is quickly taken over by media and politics, turning into a high-profile, televised intellectual trial for millions.

name: Time and Water
description: Facing the death of his country’s glaciers and the loss of his beloved grandparents, Icelandic writer Andri Snær Magnason turns his archives into a time capsule to hold what is slipping away — family, memory, time, and water.

name: Mythos
description: A college student turns to Greek mythology in hopes of saving a failing grade, framing an anthology of classic tales through a modern lens. As the stories unfold, the film connects old legends to timeless human behavior, choices, and flaws.

name: Future Science - Das Ende der Tierversuche?
description: This documentary-style film looks at efforts to move beyond animal testing through AI and artificial organs. As researchers push for a new approach to medicine, they face resistance from the very system that helped shape modern science.

name: Tarung: Unforgiven
description: After a tragic death in a martial arts tournament, a fighter swears off competition for good. But when a family medical crisis brings crushing costs, he is pulled toward an underground fighting ring by an offer that comes with dangerous strings attached.

name: Round 13
description: A former sports star living a quiet family life is thrown into crisis when an accident leads to devastating news about his young son’s health. As fear, hope, and separation test them, the family must find the strength to come together and keep fighting.

name: Variations on a Theme
description: An elderly goat herder is targeted by a scam that promises long-awaited reparations for her father's WWII service. Told through recurring visual “variations,” Variations on a Theme explores endurance and loss.

name: The Samurai and the Prisoner
description: Based on Honobu Yonezawa's novel. Set in 16th century Japan, follows Lord Murashige Araki who, besieged in his castle, confronts mysterious crimes and allies with imprisoned strategist Kanbei Kuroda to uncover the truth.

name: Time of Plenty
description: Time of Plenty is an essayistic documentary about man-made climate change, Easter Island, and our place in the universe.  Written and directed by Robin Jensen  Narrated by Renate Reinsve  Produced by Mikrofilm AS

name: THE A-CARE -Disusebody-
description: At the "Ijinzaka Clinic" day service, a revolutionary treatment devised by Director Urushihara is secretly spreading among the elderly. Aiming for the ultimate cost-effective care, the amputation of "Disusebody" (limbs with no hope of recovery) has reportedly led to unexpected positive side effects, such as patients feeling "lighter in body and mind" or "developing a gentler personality." Yagura, an editor who hears these rumors, senses a potential revolution in geriatric medicine and proposes a book deal to Urushihara. However, an internal whistleblower leak about the daycare center soon surfaces in a weekly magazine. Following a shocking incident at a patient's home, everything begins to spiral into darkness.

name: They Wait in Shadows
description: Two sisters return to their family home after their mother’s death, only to face terrifying monsters they accidentally conjured with a Ouija board. As the haunting grows, their attempt to survive turns into a struggle against the shadows they awakened.

name: Patlabor EZY: File 1
description: Patlabor EZY File 1 is the first of a 3-part theatrical series taking place in 2036, 38 years after the events of Patlabor on Television and The New Files. Set in the TV continuity, this new production does not take place in the same timeline as the Patlabor film series or live-action drama.

name: National Theatre Live: The Playboy of the Western World
description: Pegeen Flaherty’s life is turned upside down when a young man walks into her pub claiming that he’s killed his father. Instead of being shunned, the killer becomes a local hero and begins to win hearts, that is until a second man unexpectedly arrives on the scene...

name: Eat Pray Bark
description: A group of five unusual dog owners heads to the Tyrolean mountains for an intensive training course, hoping to solve problems with their unruly pets. The comedy follows their last-ditch attempt to find harmony with their four-legged companions.

name: Amityville Rex
description: The Amityville curse takes a prehistoric turn when a dinosaur is resurrected and possessed, unleashing fresh terror in town. A priest, a cop, and a fugitive team up to exorcise the creature and stop the carnage.

name: Kartavya
description: With his family’s safety on the line, a police officer faces escalating, menacing threats. As pressure mounts, he must decide how far to go to uphold his duty.

name: Untold: Chess Mates
description: Magnus Carlsen faces a challenge from a fast-rising online chess phenom whose rise sparks major controversy. After allegations and revelations of cheating cast a shadow over a key victory, he fights to restore his reputation and earn a high-stakes rematch.

name: Forsaken
description: Everyone knows his name, but this film retraces what happened in the days leading up to the murder of a history-geography professor at the end of his college. Through investigations and trials, it looks back on his final eleven days and the events surrounding his death.

name: The Story of Everything
description: This film takes a wide-ranging look at the universe, from the laws shaping the stars to the patterns inside living cells. It presents these connections as signs of intentional design woven throughout nature and existence.

name: I'll Hold You Always
description: A determined mother centers her whole life on giving her son opportunities she never had. As she pushes through hardship and sacrifice, the story follows a deeply personal fight for a better future.

name: Josh Padley vs. Aqib Fiaz
description: Josh Padley defends his European Super Featherweight Title against Aqib Fiaz at the Utilita Arena, Sheffield.

name: Call of My Life
description: The romantic comedy follows Soluchi, a hopeless romantic still healing from being jilted by her former lover, Kalu. When a regular work call puts her in touch with the charming Eli, Soluchi begins to see the possibility of the love story she has always wanted.

name: Authentic Games: No Império Desconectado
description: After years ruling an offline world, a ruthless empire sets its sights on revenge. The emperor targets the creator of an online game universe, pulling him inside where he becomes a friendly character and joins an adventure to rescue a family and confront the empire.

name: All's Fair in Love and Mahjong
description: Ronni balances life as a school nurse and mom while hosting a longtime mahjong game with close friends. When her daughter leaves for college, her routine changes fast—her work hours shrink and a loved home faces pressure—leaving her to wonder what comes next.

name: Best Served Cold: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
description: When a suspect in a forgery case is murdered and the prosecutor goes missing, Hannah and Chad must uncover how the two cases are connected and solve them in time for the trial.

name: Swallowed Star The Movie  - Battle on Primal Star
description: During training on the Original Star, a fighter faces mounting threats from alien groups who want his strength and resources. Calm and strategic, he pushes back with fierce skill, but a three-race alliance returns with massive firepower to encircle him.

name: Desire
description: A seemingly perfect family life masks growing dissatisfaction. When a young swimming coach enters the home, a secretive, passionate relationship stirs jealousy and secrecy, pulling mother and daughter into a volatile emotional triangle that threatens to unravel what has been built.

name: UFC 328: Chimaev vs Strickland
description: UFC 328: Chimaev vs Strickland is a mixed martial arts event produced by the Ultimate Fighting Championship, held on May 9, 2026, at the Prudential Center in Newark, New Jersey. The card features a Middleweight Championship headliner and a Flyweight Championship co-main bout.

name: Barurot 2
description: A struggling call center worker takes increasingly risky steps to earn enough money for a chance at a better life abroad. As desperation pushes her further, an unexpected connection with a local driver begins to shift her outlook and choices.

name: Check-In
description: Two receptionists at a cheap motel settle into a quiet routine until a mysterious regular guest disrupts the balance between them. As attraction, tension, and conflict rise, their fragile relationship is pushed into uncertain territory.

name: Pasakalye
description: Brotherhood versus duty drives this story as two childhood friends face off while searching for who truly rules the streets. Their rivalry tests loyalties and forces them into a high-stakes ride where friendship and obligation clash.

name: Jim Queen
description: When Heterosis - a mysterious virus that turns gay men straight sweeps through the Parisian gay scene, Jim, the six packed sovereign of the Gym Queens, goes from Pride royalty to social outcast. With only Lucien, a freshly-out twink with more heart than abs, still by his side, Jim must race to find a cure before the disease erases the community that once worshiped him.

name: Mommy Down to the Ride
description: A strict physics teacher tries to steer her teenage son away from dropping out to pursue professional skateboarding. She makes a bet that she’ll compete in a major skateboarding event to keep him in school, but learning the sport with a struggling student puts her own reputation on the line.

name: Seven Versts Before Dawn
description: Set in the early days of World War II, this war drama follows an elderly villager living under brutal occupation as suspicion and repression close in around his community. Forced into an impossible position, he makes a dangerous choice that could protect his family and support the wider resistance.

name: Qingtong & Kuihua
description: In Damai Field Village, a city girl named Kui Hua loses her artist father in a deadly weather-related accident and becomes an orphan. A kind family takes her in, where she grows up alongside Qing Tong, supporting each other through long stretches of hardship.

name: Dear You
description: An older woman living a quiet life is shaken when her grandson, desperate over debt, travels abroad to trace a rumored family connection and returns with unsettling news. As he digs deeper, a long-buried romance and painful questions from the past begin to surface.

name: Roya
description: A teacher imprisoned for her political beliefs must decide whether to give a forced televised confession or remain in a tiny cell. As memory and the present blur together, the story moves through confinement, inner resistance, and a fractured sense of time.

name: Opa Papa
description: A carefree young man learns he has a son and heads back to his small Armenian village. As he adjusts to fatherhood, close-knit village life, and the chance of new love, his easygoing world is turned upside down.

name: Vanishing Point
description: A quiet apartment building becomes the setting for a deeply unsettling chain of events when a child vanishes, a woman is attacked, and a blood-soaked neighbor tries to hide a terrible secret. As fear spreads through the halls, everyday familiarity starts to feel dangerous and deeply sinister.

name: Sabrina Carpenter: Live at Coachella 2026 (Week 1)
description: This concert film captures a pop star’s Week 1 Coachella 2026 set as the festival is transformed into a playful, star-powered showcase. Expect a lively live-performance experience built around big pop energy and a distinct event feel.

name: The Terror: Devil In Silver
description: After being wrongly sent to a psychiatric hospital, a man is forced to navigate dangerous patients, unsettling doctors, and a growing sense that something even darker is lurking inside. It sets up a tense survival story in a deeply unsettling place.

name: Hadestown: The Musical
description: The five principal members of the original Broadway cast—Reeve Carney, André De Shields, Amber Gray, Eva Noblezada, and Patrick Page—reunite on the West End for this reinterpretation of timeless love stories from Greek mythology.

name: Propeller One-Way Night Coach
description: During the golden age of aviation, a young airplane enthusiast and his mother embark on a cross-country journey to Hollywood—and their simple flight transforms into the trip of a lifetime.

name: Krishna Leela
description: A yoga expert returns to India and meets someone who feels strangely familiar, stirring memories of a love that may span lifetimes. As an old curse resurfaces, they face questions of destiny, reincarnation, and whether love can endure across centuries.

name: Earth to Colby
description: An aspiring online creator finds a strange notebook that points to hidden portals around her hometown. Following its clues, she begins uncovering a supernatural side of the city and gets pulled into a bigger mystery.

name: Gregg Allman: The Music of My Soul
description: This visionary music documentary traces the turbulent, transcendent life of Gregg Allman — from a childhood ruptured by his father’s murder to the soulful emergence that reshaped American music. Through archival recordings, candid interviews, and electric performances, the film follows Gregg’s musical awakening amid the blues he worshipped, the creation of the Allman Brothers Band with his brother.

name: Dimension 20: On a Bus
description: Dragon Master Katie Marovitch and her companions explore fantastical worlds across LA and Lisbon, where everyday objects can think and talk. Using the Perfect Six game system, four heroes face trials and work to save a wedding.

name: Just One More
description: A recovering addict crosses paths with a dying man who prays for one more chance to make a difference. As their lives collide, the recovering addict wrestles with shame and doubt, gradually finding faith, forgiveness, and hope for a future beyond addiction.

name: Eva and Alfie
description: A precocious 8-year-old grapples with her inability to connect with her immature, emotionally unintelligent boyfriend.

name: El Kalam Ala Eh
description: Four couples head into a night meant to feel perfect, but pressure quickly spirals into chaos. With expectations clashing and inexperience getting in the way, awkward choices lead to nonstop disasters and unexpected turns.

name: Bride of the Year
description: After her dream of starting a family falls apart, a determined woman turns to a scheming plan to win "Bride of the Year." With the contest in focus, she looks to get back at her ex.

name: Give Me Back My Baby
description: A couple searches for a surrogate to start a family, but their choice quickly leads to an obsession that threatens to unravel their lives. As the situation escalates, everything they built together begins to slip away.

name: Eliminate Criminals
description: In 1995 in Jixiong, two masked robbers commit a shocking massacre and a robbery, leaving the whole city reeling. Years later, a police captain teams up with a retired martial arts fighter to hunt the meticulous killers, uncovering clues as they face mounting difficulties in solving the case.

name: Hayok
description: A feisty thriller about a fiercely independent woman who becomes the obsession of a contractor desperate to possess her. But when betrayal turns violent, she strikes back with a revenge that destroys his pride and control.

name: The Nameless Season
description: As graduation nears, Do-wan becomes increasingly anxious that he and the boy he has long loved will drift apart. Years later, they meet again by chance, and he decides it’s time to confront his feelings.

name: Star Wars: Heir to the Empire
description: The Rebel Alliance has destroyed the Death Star, defeated Darth Vader and the Emperor, and driven the remnants of the old Imperial Starfleet to a distant corner of the galaxy. Princess Leia and Han Solo are married and expecting Jedi twins. And Luke Skywalker has become the first in a long-awaited line of Jedi Knights. But thousands of light-years away, the last of the Emperor's warlords has taken command of the shattered Imperial fleet, readied it for war, and pointed it at the fragile heart of the New Republic....

name: Obsessively Yours
description: A socially awkward young man searches for connection after a chance meeting at a party. As feelings grow, he becomes increasingly focused on finding "the one" and making it work.

name: Al Frensawy
description: The series revolves around Khaled Moshir, a smart and cunning lawyer who does not believe in absolute justice as much as he believes in the power of legal text. He is known in legal circles for his exceptional ability to turn the scales, not by seeking the truth, but by exploiting legal loopholes and bending them in favor of his clients.

name: England's Next Top Prince Consort
description: England’s Next Top Prince Consort turns Elizabethan court politics into a chaotic reality competition, as a queen tests a lineup of suitors with judges who seem as confused as they are determined. Confessionals and constant court intrigue drive shifting alliances, rumors, and relentless scheming as contenders vie for the queen’s hand and the power it brings.

name: Notun Premer Gaan
description: A man juggling corporate pressure and personal grief journeys to a place his late mother cherished. There, he crosses paths with a spirited traveler who is dealing with a restrictive, complicated relationship, leading to uneasy connection and emotional discovery.

name: Mulan: Light A fire
description: After returning home from war, Mulan finds her family shattered by corruption and violence. Searching for the truth behind her brother’s death, she uncovers a wide-ranging conspiracy that drags her into a dangerous, solitary quest for vengeance and justice.

name: The Mad Comedians
description: Centered on Wang Er’s filmmaking dream, the story follows his journey as idealism meets reality. Along the way, it highlights the quiet resolve of an ordinary man staying true to himself.

name: 100 Dates in Dallas
description: A forty-something former actor navigates online dating in Dallas.

name: HOME MOVIES
description: A compilation of recordings made between two friends in 2018.
